'); win.document.close(); setTimeout(() => { win.focus(); win.print(); }, 400); } // ── ADD NEW EPISODE FROM OUTPATIENT RECORD ──────────────────────────────── async function openNewEpisodeModal(patientId, patientName) { const existingModal = document.getElementById('new-episode-modal'); if (existingModal) existingModal.remove(); const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'new-episode-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,38,56,.55);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;'; modal.innerHTML = `
New Episode

${patientName || 'Patient'}

`; document.body.appendChild(modal); // Load stomas for this patient try { const stSel = document.getElementById('new-ep-stoma'); stSel.innerHTML = ''; const {data} = await SB.from('stomas_main').select('id,stoma_type,stoma_status,created_at').eq('patient_id', patientId).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); (data||[]).forEach(st => { const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = st.id; opt.textContent = `${st.stoma_type||'Unknown stoma'} — ${st.stoma_status||'Active'} (${st.created_at?new Date(st.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'})`; stSel.appendChild(opt); }); } catch(e) { console.warn('Stoma load for new episode:', e); } } async function saveNewEpisodeRecord(patientId) { const type = document.getElementById('new-ep-type')?.value; const ward = document.getElementById('new-ep-ward')?.value; const date = document.getElementById('new-ep-date')?.value || new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const stomaId = document.getElementById('new-ep-stoma')?.value; const notes = document.getElementById('new-ep-notes')?.value || ''; if (!type) { alert('Please select an admission type before saving.'); return; } const nurse = getLoggedInSubmitterName() || ''; const isInpatient = !type.includes('Outpatient') && !type.includes('Community'); const epPayload = { patient_id: patientId, episode_type: type, episode_status: 'Active', pathway_type: isInpatient ? 'readmission' : 'outpatient_followup', pathway_stage: isInpatient ? 'inpatient' : 'outpatient', admission_date: date, admission_ward: ward || null, stoma_id: stomaId || null, notes: notes || null, created_by: nurse, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }; let epId = null; try { let body = {...epPayload}; let last = null; for (let i = 0; i < 16; i++) { const r = await SB.from('episodes_main').insert(body).select('id').single(); if (!r.error) { epId = r.data?.id; break; } last = r.error; const m = String(r.error.message||'').match(/Could not find the '([^']+)' column/i); if (m && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(body, m[1])) { delete body[m[1]]; continue; } break; } if (!epId && last) console.warn('Episode insert warning:', last?.message||last); } catch(e) { console.warn('Episode insert:', e); } // Update patient status if (isInpatient) { try { await SB.from('patients_main').update({patient_status:'Inpatient',current_ward:ward||null,ward:ward||null,modified_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',patientId); } catch(e) {} try { await SB.from('patients').update({patient_type:'inpatient',patient_status:'inpatient',ward:ward||null,modified_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',patientId); } catch(e) {} } await logAuditTrailAction('insert', 'episodes_main', patientId, { description: `New episode opened: ${type}. Ward: ${ward||'—'}. Stoma linked: ${stomaId||'none'}. By ${nurse}.` }).catch(() => {}); document.getElementById('new-episode-modal')?.remove(); alert(`New episode saved: ${type}.`); if (typeof window.openPatientRecordPage === 'function') window.openPatientRecordPage(patientId); } async function loadPdTab(tab, patId){ const container = document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'); if(!container || !patId) return; container.innerHTML = '
Loading...
'; const p = await getProjectPatientById(patId); if(!p){ container.innerHTML='
Could not load patient.
'; return; } if(tab==='patient-info') renderPdTabPatientInfo(container, p, patId); else if(tab==='clinical-history') renderPdTabClinicalHistory(container, p, patId); else if(tab==='episode-history') await renderPdTabEpisodeHistory(container, patId); else if(tab==='care-outcomes') renderPdTabCareOutcomes(container, p, patId); else if(tab==='stoma-timeline') await renderPdTabStormaTimeline(container, patId); else if(tab==='appliances') await renderPdTabAppliances(container, patId); else if(tab==='teaching') await renderPdTabTeaching(container, patId); else if(tab==='discharge') await renderPdTabDischargeLetter(container, p, patId); else if(tab==='additional-notes') renderPdTabAdditionalNotes(container, p, patId); else { // legacy tabs fallback const legacyTab = tab==='reviews'?'reviews':tab==='referrals'?'referrals':tab==='appts'?'appts':tab==='followups'?'followups':null; if(legacyTab) await loadPdTabLegacy(legacyTab, patId, container); else container.innerHTML='
Tab not found.
'; } } function renderPdTabPatientInfo(container, p, patId){ const dob=p.date_of_birth?new Date(p.date_of_birth).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'; container.innerHTML=`
Patient Details
${paField('Hospital Number', p.hospital_number||p.patient_number, true)} ${paField('Date of Birth', dob, true)} ${paField('Contact Number', p.contact_number||p.mobile_number||p.phone_number, true)} ${paField('First Name', p.first_name, true)} ${paField('Locality', p.locality, true)} ${paField('Surname', p.surname, true)} ${paField('Sex', p.sex, true)} ${paField('ID Card', p.id_card||p.id_card_number, true)}
Stoma & Care
${paField('Op Performed & Findings', p.op_performed_findings||p.operation_performed)}
${paField('Stoma Type Summary', p.stoma_type_summary||p.stoma_type, true)} ${paField('Assigned Nurse', p.assigned_nurse, true)} ${paField('Consultant', p.consultant, true)} ${paField('Ward', p.ward||p.current_ward, true)} ${paField('Pathway Type', p.pathway_type?p.pathway_type.replace('_',' '):'—', true)}
Patient Stomas
${p.pathway_type==='elective'?``:''}
Loading stomas...
`; loadPatientStomas(patId); } function paField(label, value, inline=false){ return `
${label}
${htmlSafe(value||'—')}
`; } async function loadPatientStomas(patId){ const el=document.getElementById('pd-stomas-list'); const countEl=document.getElementById('pd-stoma-count'); if(!el)return; let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('stomas').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('formed_date',{ascending:true});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} // Also try stomas_main if(!data.length){ try{const r=await SB.from('stomas_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('created_at',{ascending:true}); data=(r.data||[]).map(s=>({...s,stoma_label:s.stoma_label||s.stoma_type,stoma_type:s.stoma_type||s.intended_stoma_type,formed_date:s.surgery_date||s.date_formed,status:s.stoma_status==='Active'?'active':s.stoma_status?.toLowerCase()||'active'}));}catch(e){} } if(countEl)countEl.textContent=data.length?`${data.length} record${data.length!==1?'s':''}` :''; if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='
No stoma records found. Click + New Stoma to add.
';return;} el.innerHTML=`${data.map(s=>``).join('')}
Stoma LabelTypeFormedStatusRod in SituRod RemovalNotes
${htmlSafe(s.stoma_label||'—')}${s.parent_stoma_id?'Refashioned':''} ${htmlSafe(s.stoma_type||'—')} ${s.formed_date?new Date(s.formed_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(s.status||'—')} ${s.rod_in_situ?'Yes':'—'} ${s.rod_removal_date?new Date(s.rod_removal_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(s.notes||'—')}
`; } function renderPdTabClinicalHistory(container, p, patId){ container.innerHTML=`
Medical Background
${paField('Past Medical History', p.past_medical_history||p.medical_history)} ${paField('Social History', p.social_history)} ${paField('Drug History', p.drug_history)} ${paField('Complications', p.complications)}
Episode History
Loading...
`; renderEpisodeMiniList(patId,'pd-episode-history-mini','pd-episode-mini-count'); } async function renderEpisodeMiniList(patId, containerId, countId){ const el=document.getElementById(containerId); const countEl=countId?document.getElementById(countId):null; if(!el)return; let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('opened_date',{ascending:false}).limit(10);data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} // Fallback to episodes_main if(!data.length){ try{const r=await SB.from('episodes_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(10); data=(r.data||[]).map(e=>({...e,episode_type:e.episode_type,opened_date:e.admission_date||e.created_at?.split('T')[0],status:e.episode_status==='Active'?'open':'closed'}));}catch(e2){} } if(countEl)countEl.textContent=data.length?`${data.length} record${data.length!==1?'s':''}` :''; if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='
No episodes recorded.
';return;} el.innerHTML=renderEpisodeSubGrid(data,patId); } function renderEpisodeSubGrid(episodes, patId){ return `${episodes.map(e=>``).join('')}
Episode IDTypeOpenedClosedStatusConsultantProblem Type
${htmlSafe(e.episode_id_label||e.id?.substring(0,8)||'—')} ${htmlSafe((e.episode_type||'—').replace(/_/g,' '))} ${e.opened_date?new Date(e.opened_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${e.closed_date?new Date(e.closed_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'Open'} ${htmlSafe(e.status||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.consultant||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.problem_type||'—')}
`; } async function renderPdTabEpisodeHistory(container, patId){ container.innerHTML='
Loading episodes...
'; let all=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('opened_date',{ascending:false});all=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} // Fallback to episodes_main if(!all.length){ try{const r=await SB.from('episodes_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); all=(r.data||[]).map(e=>({...e,episode_type:e.episode_type,opened_date:e.admission_date||e.created_at?.split('T')[0],status:e.episode_status==='Active'?'open':'closed',category:['Elective','Emergency','Reversal','Refashion'].includes(e.episode_type)?'hospital':'followup'}));}catch(e2){error=e2;} } const hospital=all.filter(e=>e.category==='hospital'); const followup=all.filter(e=>e.category!=='hospital'); container.innerHTML=`
Episode History
${all.length} total
🏥 Hospital Episodes ${hospital.length} record${hospital.length!==1?'s':''}
${hospital.length?renderEpisodeSubGrid(hospital,patId):'
No hospital episodes recorded.
'}
📋 Follow-Up Episodes ${followup.length} record${followup.length!==1?'s':''}
${followup.length?renderEpisodeSubGrid(followup,patId):'
No follow-up episodes recorded.
'}
`; } function renderPdTabCareOutcomes(container, p, patId){ container.innerHTML=`
Care & Status
${paField('Patient Status', p.patient_status, true)} ${paField('Last Outcome Date', p.last_outcome_date?new Date(p.last_outcome_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)} ${paField('DNTU Streak', p.dntu_streak>0?`${p.dntu_streak} consecutive`:'0', true)}
Key Dates
${paField('Surgery Date', p.surgery_date?new Date(p.surgery_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)} ${paField('Discharged Date', p.discharged_date?new Date(p.discharged_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)} ${paField('Proposed Reversal Date', p.proposed_reversal_date?new Date(p.proposed_reversal_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)} ${paField('Reversal Date', p.reversal_date?new Date(p.reversal_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)} ${paField('RIP Date', p.rip_date?new Date(p.rip_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—', true)}
Calculated Fields
${paField('Surgery Days Till RIP', calcDaysBetween(p.surgery_date,p.rip_date), true)} ${paField('Stoma Days', calcDaysBetween(p.surgery_date,p.reversal_date||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]), true)} ${paField('Age at Death', calcAgeAtDeath(p.date_of_birth,p.rip_date), true)}
`; } async function renderPdTabStormaTimeline(container, patId){ container.innerHTML='
Loading stoma timeline...
'; const [{data:stomas},{data:events},{data:urgentReviews}]=await Promise.all([ SB.from('stomas').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('formed_date').catch(()=>({data:[]})), SB.from('events').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('event_date').order('event_time').catch(()=>({data:[]})), SB.from('urgent_stoma_daily_review').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('review_date').order('review_time').catch(()=>({data:[]})) ]); const allEvents=events||[]; const allUrgent=(urgentReviews||[]).map(r=>({...r,event_type:'daily_review',event_date:r.review_date,event_time:r.review_time?new Date(r.review_time).toTimeString().substring(0,5):null,stoma_appearance:r.stoma_appearance,peristomal_skin:r.skin_condition,output_consistency:r.output_consistency_type,_source:'daily_review'})); const merged=[...allEvents,...allUrgent].sort((a,b)=>String(a.event_date).localeCompare(String(b.event_date))||String(a.event_time||'').localeCompare(String(b.event_time||''))); const allStomas=stomas||[]; const stomaSections=allStomas.length?allStomas:[{id:null,stoma_label:'Unlinked Events',stoma_type:'',formed_date:null,status:'active'}]; container.innerHTML=`
Stoma Timeline
${stomaSections.map(s=>{ const stomaEvents=s.id?merged.filter(e=>e.stoma_id===s.id||(!e.stoma_id&&!allStomas.length)):merged; return `
🔵
${htmlSafe(s.stoma_label||'Stoma')} ${htmlSafe(s.stoma_type||'')}${s.formed_date?' · Formed '+new Date(s.formed_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):''}
${htmlSafe(s.status||'active')}
${stomaEvents.length?`${stomaEvents.map(e=>``).join('')}
DateTimeTypeAppearanceOutputSkinPost-Op DayNurseNotes
${e.event_date?new Date(e.event_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(e.event_time||'—')} ${htmlSafe((e.event_type||'').replace(/_/g,' '))} ${htmlSafe(e.stoma_appearance||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.output_consistency||e.output_consistency_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.peristomal_skin||e.skin_condition||'—')} ${e.post_op_day_number!=null?'Day '+e.post_op_day_number:'—'} ${htmlSafe(e.nurse_name||e.nurse_signature||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.notes||'—')}
`:'
No events recorded for this stoma yet.
'}
`; }).join('')}
`; } async function renderPdTabAppliances(container, patId){ container.innerHTML='
Loading appliances...
'; let data=[],err=null; try{const r=await SB.from('appliances').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('started_date',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];err=r.error;}catch(e){err=e;} if(!data.length){ try{const r=await SB.from('appliances_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_active',true).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); data=(r.data||[]).map(a=>({...a,appliance_type:a.appliance_type,brand:a.manufacturer,product_name:a.product_name,size:a.appliance_size,product_reference:a.product_code,started_date:a.date_started,reason_for_change:a.reason_for_change}));}catch(e2){} } container.innerHTML=`
Appliances
${data.length} record${data.length!==1?'s':''}
${data.length?`${data.map(a=>``).join('')}
StartedTypeBrand / ProductSizeProduct RefAccessoryCurrentEndedReason for Change
${a.started_date?new Date(a.started_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(a.appliance_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(a.brand||'')} ${htmlSafe(a.product_name||'')} ${htmlSafe(a.size||a.appliance_size||'—')} ${htmlSafe(a.product_reference||a.product_code||'—')} ${htmlSafe(a.accessory_type||'—')} ${a.is_current?'✓ Current':'—'} ${a.ended_date?new Date(a.ended_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(a.reason_for_change||'—')}
`:'
No appliances recorded yet.
'}
`; } async function renderPdTabTeaching(container, patId){ container.innerHTML='
Loading teaching sessions...
'; const {data}=await SB.from('teaching_sessions').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('session_date',{ascending:false}).catch(()=>({data:[]})); const rows=data||[]; const items=[['seen_stoma','Patient has seen stoma and first flat change'],['assemble_items','Able to assemble items needed'],['remove_old_bag','Able to remove old bag'],['remove_flange','Able to remove flange'],['clean_stoma','Able to clean stoma'],['empty_bag','Able to empty bag'],['apply_bag_with_flange','Able to apply new bag with flange'],['apply_flange','Able to apply flange'],['dispose_waste','Able to dispose of waste']]; container.innerHTML=`
Teaching Sessions
${rows.length} session${rows.length!==1?'s':''}
${rows.length?rows.map(s=>{ const keys=['seen_stoma','assemble_items','remove_old_bag','remove_flange','clean_stoma','empty_bag','apply_bag_with_flange','apply_flange','dispose_waste']; const done=keys.filter(k=>s['item_'+(keys.indexOf(k)+1)+'_'+k]).length; return `
${s.session_date?new Date(s.session_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} Nurse: ${htmlSafe(s.nurse_name||'—')}
${done}/9 items complete
${items.map(([key,label],i)=>{ const checked=s['item_'+(i+1)+'_'+key]; return `
${checked?'✓':'○'} ${htmlSafe(label)}
`; }).join('')}
${s.notes?`
${htmlSafe(s.notes)}
`:''}
`; }).join(''):`
No teaching sessions recorded yet.
`}
`; } async function renderPdTabDischargeLetter(container, p, patId){ container.innerHTML='
Loading discharge letters...
'; const {data}=await SB.from('discharge_letters').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('letter_date',{ascending:false}).catch(()=>({data:[]})); const letters=data||[]; container.innerHTML=`
Discharge Letters
${letters.length?letters.map(l=>`
${l.letter_date?new Date(l.letter_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(l.nurse_name||'—')}
${htmlSafe(l.status||'draft')} ${l.status==='draft'?``:''}
${htmlSafe(l.procedure_performed||'—')} · ${htmlSafe(l.appliance_on_discharge||'—')}
`).join(''):`
No discharge letters yet. Click Generate AI Letter to create one.
`}
`; } function renderPdTabAdditionalNotes(container, p, patId){ container.innerHTML=`
Additional Notes
`; } function renderEpisodeTable(episodes, patId){ if(!episodes.length) return '
None recorded.
'; return `
${episodes.map(e=>``).join('')}
Episode IDTypeOpenedClosedStatusConsultantProblemActions
${htmlSafe(e.episode_id_label||e.id.substring(0,8))} ${htmlSafe((e.episode_type||'').replace(/_/g,' '))} ${e.opened_date?new Date(e.opened_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${e.closed_date?new Date(e.closed_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'Open'} ${htmlSafe(e.status||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.consultant||'—')} ${htmlSafe(e.problem_type||'—')}
`; } async function saveAdditionalNotes(patId){ const val = document.getElementById('pd-additional-notes')?.value||''; const {error} = await SB.from('patients').update({additional_notes:val, updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id', patId); if(error){alert('Could not save notes: '+error.message);return;} alert('Notes saved.'); } // ── AI SUMMARY FUNCTIONS ────────────────────────────── async function generateAiEpisodeSummary(){ if(!currentPatientId){alert('No patient loaded.');return;} const btn = document.getElementById('pd-ai-summary-btn'); if(btn){btn.textContent='⏳ Generating...';btn.disabled=true;} try{ const {data:episodes} = await SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('patient_id',currentPatientId).order('opened_date',{ascending:false}).limit(1); const {data:events} = await SB.from('events').select('*').eq('patient_id',currentPatientId).order('event_date',{ascending:false}).limit(20); const ep = episodes?.[0]; const p = await getProjectPatientById(currentPatientId); const prompt = `You are a stoma care nurse at Mater Dei Hospital, Malta. Write a brief clinical episode summary (3-5 sentences) for community nurses based on the following data. Be factual, clear, and professional. Patient: ${p?.first_name||''} ${p?.surname||''}, ${p?.date_of_birth?Math.floor((new Date()-new Date(p.date_of_birth))/31557600000)+'y':'unknown age'} Stoma type: ${p?.stoma_type_summary||p?.stoma_type||'unknown'} Episode type: ${ep?.episode_type?.replace(/_/g,' ')||'unknown'} Opened: ${ep?.opened_date||'unknown'}, Status: ${ep?.status||'unknown'} Consultant: ${ep?.consultant||'unknown'} Recent events: ${(events||[]).slice(0,5).map(e=>`${e.event_date} ${e.event_type?.replace(/_/g,' ')} - appearance: ${e.stoma_appearance||'—'}, output: ${e.output_consistency||'—'}, skin: ${e.peristomal_skin||'—'}`).join('; ')||'none recorded'} Write only the summary paragraph. No headings.`; const resp = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:400,messages:[{role:'user',content:prompt}]})}); const aiResp = await resp.json(); const summary = aiResp.content?.[0]?.text||'Could not generate summary.'; alert('AI Episode Summary:\n\n'+summary); }catch(e){alert('Error generating summary: '+e.message);} finally{if(btn){btn.textContent='✨ AI Episode Summary';btn.disabled=false;}} } async function generateAiFullPatientSummary(){ if(!currentPatientId){alert('No patient loaded.');return;} const btn = document.getElementById('pd-ai-full-btn'); if(btn){btn.textContent='⏳ Generating...';btn.disabled=true;} try{ const p = await getProjectPatientById(currentPatientId); const {data:episodes} = await SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('patient_id',currentPatientId).order('opened_date'); const {data:stomas} = await SB.from('stomas').select('*').eq('patient_id',currentPatientId).order('formed_date'); const {data:appliances} = await SB.from('appliances').select('*').eq('patient_id',currentPatientId).order('started_date'); const prompt = `You are a stoma care nurse at Mater Dei Hospital, Malta. Write a comprehensive clinical narrative summary of this patient's complete stoma care journey. Be factual, professional, and suitable for clinical records. Patient: ${p?.first_name||''} ${p?.surname||''}, DOB: ${p?.date_of_birth||'unknown'}, ID: ${p?.id_card||p?.id_card_number||'unknown'} Current status: ${p?.patient_status||'active'} Surgery date: ${p?.surgery_date||'unknown'} Stomas: ${(stomas||[]).map(s=>`${s.stoma_type} formed ${s.formed_date||'unknown'}, status: ${s.status}`).join('; ')||'none recorded'} Episodes (${(episodes||[]).length}): ${(episodes||[]).map(e=>`${e.episode_type?.replace(/_/g,' ')} opened ${e.opened_date} ${e.status==='closed'?'closed '+e.closed_date:'(open)'}`).join('; ')||'none'} Appliances: ${(appliances||[]).map(a=>`${a.brand||''} ${a.product_name||''} ${a.size||''} started ${a.started_date||'unknown'}${a.is_current?' (current)':''}`).join('; ')||'none recorded'} Key dates: surgery ${p?.surgery_date||'—'}, discharge ${p?.discharged_date||'—'}, reversal ${p?.reversal_date||'—'}, RIP ${p?.rip_date||'—'} Write a structured clinical narrative. Include: admission overview, stoma formation details, clinical progress, discharge status, follow-up status, current situation.`; const resp = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:800,messages:[{role:'user',content:prompt}]})}); const aiResp2 = await resp.json(); const summary = aiResp2.content?.[0]?.text||'Could not generate summary.'; const mo = document.getElementById('mo'); const mb = document.getElementById('mb'); if(mo&&mb){ mb.innerHTML=`

AI Full Patient History

${htmlSafe(p?.first_name||'')} ${htmlSafe(p?.surname||'')}
${htmlSafe(summary)}
`; mo.classList.add('open'); }else{alert('AI Full Patient History:\n\n'+summary);} }catch(e){alert('Error generating summary: '+e.message);} finally{if(btn){btn.textContent='✨ AI Full Patient History';btn.disabled=false;}} } // ── AI DISCHARGE LETTER ─────────────────────────────── async function generateAiDischargeLetter(patId){ const btn = document.querySelector('[onclick*="generateAiDischargeLetter"]'); if(btn){btn.textContent='⏳ Generating...';btn.disabled=true;} try{ const p = await getProjectPatientById(patId); const {data:appliances} = await SB.from('appliances').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_current',true).limit(1); const {data:episodes} = await SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('status','open').limit(1); const {data:events} = await SB.from('events').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('event_date',{ascending:false}).limit(5); const appliance = appliances?.[0]; const episode = episodes?.[0]; const lastEvent = events?.[0]; const nurseName = getLoggedInSubmitterName()||'Jason Fenech'; const nurseGrade = 'Practice Nurse'; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const prompt = `You are ${nurseName}, ${nurseGrade} at the Stoma Care Clinic, Mater Dei Hospital, Malta. Write an official MDH Stoma Care discharge letter for community nurses. Follow this EXACT structure. ${today} **${(p?.first_name||'')+' '+(p?.surname||'')} ${p?.id_card||p?.id_card_number||''}** Dear Nurses, The above named patient was admitted under ${p?.consultant||episode?.consultant||'[Consultant]'} and underwent ${p?.op_performed_findings||episode?.operation_performed||'[procedure]'}. [Add one sentence on outcome if known.] On discharge, the stoma ${lastEvent?.stoma_appearance?'was '+lastEvent.stoma_appearance:'was healthy and viable'}. The peristomal skin was ${lastEvent?.peristomal_skin||'intact'}. ${appliance?'The patient was discharged with **'+((appliance.brand||'')+' '+(appliance.product_name||'')+(appliance.size?' size '+(appliance.size||appliance.appliance_size||''):'')+(appliance.appliance_type?' ('+appliance.appliance_type+')':'')).trim()+'**.':'[Record appliance details in patient record.]'} [Patient first name] has been informed regarding stoma care and [practical sessions were carried out / still requires assistance]. Care Plan: ${appliance?.appliance_type?.toLowerCase().includes('two')||appliance?.appliance_type?.toLowerCase().includes('2')? `• The flange should be changed on **alternate days** — next change due: ___________ • The aperture should be cut according to the **shape and size of the stoma** (template provided) • The bag should be changed **daily** or when **one-third full** • Use **adhesive removal spray** in small amounts to remove the flange • Remove **peristomal hair** as necessary to prevent folliculitis • A stoma belt should be **worn at all times**, especially at bedtime` :appliance?.appliance_type?.toLowerCase().includes('drain')||appliance?.appliance_type?.toLowerCase().includes('ileo')||(p?.stoma_type_summary||p?.stoma_type||'').toLowerCase().includes('ileo')? `• The pouch should be changed **daily**, and emptied when **one-third full strictly** • If output is too thick to empty, change the bag when one-third full • Use **adhesive removal spray** in small amounts • Wash the stoma and peristomal skin with **warm tap water** and pat dry • A stoma belt should be **worn at all times** • Remove **peristomal hair** as necessary` :`• The pouch should be changed when **one-third full** (once or twice daily) • Use **adhesive removal spray** in small amounts • Wash the stoma and peristomal skin with **warm tap water** and pat dry • The aperture should be cut according to the **size and shape of the stoma** (template provided)`} Should you need any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us at the Stoma Care Clinic on **Tel: 2545 4431**. Yours sincerely, ${nurseName} ${nurseGrade} Stoma Care Clinic / Stoma Care Unit`; const resp = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:1000,messages:[{role:'user',content:prompt}]})}); const aiLetterResp = await resp.json(); const letterBody = aiLetterResp.content?.[0]?.text||'Could not generate letter.'; // Save as draft const {data:saved, error} = await SB.from('discharge_letters').insert({ patient_id:patId, episode_id:episode?.id||null, letter_date:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], nurse_name:nurseName, nurse_grade:nurseGrade, consultant:p?.consultant||episode?.consultant||'', procedure_performed:p?.op_performed_findings||episode?.operation_performed||'', operation_date:p?.surgery_date||null, stoma_status_on_discharge:lastEvent?.stoma_appearance||'', appliance_on_discharge:appliance?`${appliance.brand||''} ${appliance.product_name||''} ${appliance.size||''}`.trim():'', letter_body:letterBody, status:'draft' }).select('id').single(); if(error){console.warn('Letter save error:',error.message);} // Show preview const mo = document.getElementById('mo'); const mb = document.getElementById('mb'); if(mo&&mb){ const letterIdJs = saved?.id ? JSON.stringify(saved.id) : 'null'; mb.innerHTML=`

AI Discharge Letter — Editable Draft

Review, edit and finalise. Changes are saved when you click Save Edits or Finalise.
${saved?.id?``:''} ${saved?.id?``:''}
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } // Reload discharge tab await renderPdTabDischargeLetter(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'), p, patId); }catch(e){alert('Error generating letter: '+e.message);} finally{if(btn){btn.textContent='✨ Generate AI Letter';btn.disabled=false;}} } async function finaliseDischargeLetter(letterId){ if(!confirm('Mark this letter as finalised? This cannot be undone.')) return; const {error} = await SB.from('discharge_letters').update({status:'finalised',updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',letterId); if(error){alert('Error: '+error.message);return;} alert('Letter finalised.'); } // ── SAVE EDITED DISCHARGE LETTER ────────────────────────────────────────── async function saveDischargeLetterEdits(letterId){ const ta = document.getElementById('discharge-letter-editor'); if(!ta){alert('Editor not found.');return;} const body = ta.value; const {error} = await SB.from('discharge_letters').update({letter_body:body,updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',letterId); if(error){alert('Save error: '+error.message);return;} await logAuditTrailAction('update','discharge_letters',letterId,{description:'Discharge letter edited and saved by '+ (getLoggedInSubmitterName()||'nurse')}).catch(()=>{}); // Brief confirmation, no alert (called from finalise flow) const btn = document.querySelector('[onclick*="saveDischargeLetterEdits"]'); if(btn){const orig=btn.innerHTML;btn.innerHTML='✓ Saved';setTimeout(()=>{btn.innerHTML=orig;},1200);} } // ── PRINT DISCHARGE LETTER ──────────────────────────────────────────────── function printDischargeLetter(){ const ta = document.getElementById('discharge-letter-editor'); if(!ta){alert('Letter editor not found.');return;} const body = ta.value; const win = window.open('','_blank','width=800,height=900'); if(!win){alert('Please allow pop-ups for this site to print.');return;} // Render the markdown-like letter into a printable doc. const formatted = body .replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>') .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g,'$1') .replace(/^•\s/gm,'• ') .replace(/\n/g,'
'); win.document.write(`MDH Stoma Care Discharge Letter

MDH Stoma Care Clinic

Mater Dei Hospital · Malta · Tel: 2545 4431
${formatted}
Printed: ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-MT')} · MDH Stoma Care Dashboard
`); win.document.close(); setTimeout(()=>{win.focus();win.print();},400); } // previewDischargeLetter — see v66 version below // ── ADD STOMA MODAL ─────────────────────────────────── function openAddStomaModal(patId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; mb.innerHTML=`

Add Stoma

New stoma record for this patient
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewStoma(patId){ const type=document.getElementById('as-type')?.value; if(!type){alert('Stoma type is required.');return;} const {error}=await SB.from('stomas').insert({ patient_id:patId, stoma_label:document.getElementById('as-label')?.value.trim()||null, stoma_type:type, formed_date:document.getElementById('as-date')?.value||null, status:document.getElementById('as-status')?.value||'active', rod_in_situ:document.getElementById('as-rod')?.value==='true', rod_removal_date:document.getElementById('as-rod-date')?.value||null, notes:document.getElementById('as-notes')?.value.trim()||null }); if(error){alert('Error saving stoma: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); loadPatientStomas(patId); } // ── LEGACY NEW EPISODE MODAL (used by patient detail subgrid) ───────────────────────────────── function openNewEpisodeModalLegacy(patId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const episodeTypes=['elective_admission','emergency_admission','readmission_complication','readmission_refashioning','readmission_reversal','bagging_advice_inpatient','outpatient_followup','community_nurse_referral','direct_patient_contact','bagging_advice_outpatient','home_visit']; mb.innerHTML=`

New Episode

Opens a new care period for this patient
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewEpisode(patId){ const type=document.getElementById('ne-type')?.value; if(!type){alert('Episode type is required.');return;} const epCount = await SB.from('episodes').select('id',{count:'exact'}).eq('patient_id',patId); const label = 'EP-'+new Date().getFullYear()+'-'+String((epCount.count||0)+1).padStart(3,'0'); const {error}=await SB.from('episodes').insert({ patient_id:patId, episode_id_label:label, episode_type:type, opened_date:document.getElementById('ne-opened')?.value||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], consultant:document.getElementById('ne-cons')?.value.trim()||null, ward:document.getElementById('ne-ward')?.value.trim()||null, problem_type:document.getElementById('ne-problem')?.value.trim()||null, encounter_setting:document.getElementById('ne-setting')?.value.trim()||null, status:'open', created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName() }); if(error){alert('Error saving episode: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); await renderPdTabEpisodeHistory(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'),patId); } // ── OPEN EPISODE DETAIL ─────────────────────────────── async function openEpisodeDetail(episodeId, patId){ const [{data:ep,error},{data:events},{data:urgentReviews},{data:teaching},{data:preOpSiting}] = await Promise.all([ SB.from('episodes').select('*').eq('id',episodeId).single(), SB.from('events').select('*').eq('episode_id',episodeId).order('event_date').order('event_time'), SB.from('urgent_stoma_daily_review').select('*').eq('episode_id',episodeId).order('review_date'), SB.from('teaching_sessions').select('*').eq('episode_id',episodeId).order('session_date'), SB.from('pre_op_siting').select('*').eq('episode_id',episodeId).order('siting_date') ]); if(error||!ep){alert('Could not load episode.');return;} const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const evRows=events||[]; const urRows=urgentReviews||[]; const tsRows=teaching||[]; const posRows=preOpSiting||[]; mb.innerHTML=`

${htmlSafe((ep.episode_type||'').replace(/_/g,' '))}

${htmlSafe(ep.episode_id_label||ep.id.substring(0,8))} · Opened ${ep.opened_date||'—'} · ${htmlSafe(ep.status)}
Consultant
${htmlSafe(ep.consultant||'—')}
Ward
${htmlSafe(ep.ward||'—')}
Problem
${htmlSafe(ep.problem_type||'—')}
Clinical Events (${evRows.length})
${evRows.length?`
${evRows.map(e=>``).join('')}
DateTypeAppearanceOutputSkinNurseNotes
${e.event_date?new Date(e.event_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'}${htmlSafe((e.event_type||'').replace(/_/g,' '))}${htmlSafe(e.stoma_appearance||'—')}${htmlSafe(e.output_consistency||'—')}${htmlSafe(e.peristomal_skin||'—')}${htmlSafe(e.nurse_name||'—')}${htmlSafe(e.notes||'—')}
`:'
No clinical events recorded.
'}
Daily Reviews (${urRows.length})
${urRows.length?`
${urRows.map(r=>``).join('')}
DatePost-Op DayAppearanceOutputSkinSignature
${r.review_date?new Date(r.review_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'}${r.post_op_day_number!=null?'Day '+r.post_op_day_number:'—'}${htmlSafe(r.stoma_appearance||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.output_consistency_type||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.skin_condition||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.nurse_signature||'—')}
`:'
No daily reviews recorded.
'}
Pre-Op Siting (${posRows.length})
${posRows.length?`
${posRows.map(s=>`
${s.siting_date?new Date(s.siting_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} · Agreed site: ${htmlSafe(s.agreed_site||'—')} · Nurse: ${htmlSafe(s.nurse_name||'—')}
Sites: ${[s.site_marked_ru&&'RU',s.site_marked_rl&&'RL',s.site_marked_lu&&'LU',s.site_marked_ll&&'LL'].filter(Boolean).join(', ')||'—'}
`).join('')}
`:'
No pre-op siting records.
'}
Teaching Sessions (${tsRows.length})
${tsRows.length?`
${tsRows.map(s=>`
${s.session_date?new Date(s.session_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} · ${htmlSafe(s.nurse_name||'—')} · ${[s.item_1_seen_stoma,s.item_2_assemble_items,s.item_3_remove_old_bag,s.item_4_remove_flange,s.item_5_clean_stoma,s.item_6_empty_bag,s.item_7_apply_bag_with_flange,s.item_8_apply_flange,s.item_9_dispose_waste].filter(Boolean).length}/9 items completed
`).join('')}
`:'
No teaching sessions recorded.
'}
${ep.status==='open'?``:''}
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function closeEpisode(episodeId, patId){ if(!confirm('Close this episode? It will be marked as closed with today\'s date.')) return; const {error}=await SB.from('episodes').update({status:'closed',closed_date:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],updated_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',episodeId); if(error){alert('Error: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); await renderPdTabEpisodeHistory(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'),patId); } // ── ADD EVENT MODAL ─────────────────────────────────── function openAddEventModal(patId, stomaId){ openAddEventModalForEpisode(patId, null, stomaId); } function openAddEventModalForEpisode(patId, episodeId, stomaId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const eventTypes=['daily_review','teaching_session','appliance_change','nurse_visit','bagging_advice','referral','complication_noted','discharge_prep','pre_op_siting','intraop_note','community_advice','direct_contact','general_note']; mb.innerHTML=`

Add Event

Clinical event — append-only audit record
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewEvent(patId, episodeId, stomaId){ const type=document.getElementById('ae-type')?.value; if(!type){alert('Event type required.');return;} const {error}=await SB.from('events').insert({ patient_id:patId||null, episode_id:episodeId||null, stoma_id:stomaId||null, event_type:type, event_date:document.getElementById('ae-date')?.value||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], event_time:document.getElementById('ae-time')?.value||null, nurse_name:document.getElementById('ae-nurse')?.value.trim()||null, stoma_appearance:document.getElementById('ae-appear')?.value||null, output_consistency:document.getElementById('ae-output')?.value||null, peristomal_skin:document.getElementById('ae-skin')?.value||null, self_care_status:document.getElementById('ae-selfcare')?.value||null, post_op_day_number:parseInt(document.getElementById('ae-pod')?.value)||null, appliance_type:document.getElementById('ae-appl')?.value.trim()||null, appliance_size:document.getElementById('ae-size')?.value.trim()||null, reason_for_change:document.getElementById('ae-reason')?.value.trim()||null, notes:document.getElementById('ae-notes')?.value.trim()||null }); if(error){alert('Error saving event: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); if(patId) await renderPdTabStormaTimeline(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'),patId); } // ── TEACHING MODAL ──────────────────────────────────── function openSimpleTeachingModal(patId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const items=[['seen_stoma','Patient has seen stoma and first flat change'],['assemble_items','Able to assemble items needed'],['remove_old_bag','Able to remove old bag'],['remove_flange','Able to remove flange'],['clean_stoma','Able to clean stoma'],['empty_bag','Able to empty bag'],['apply_bag_with_flange','Able to apply new bag with flange'],['apply_flange','Able to apply flange'],['dispose_waste','Able to dispose of waste']]; mb.innerHTML=`

New Teaching Session

Stoma self-care teaching checklist
${items.map(([key,label])=>``).join('')}
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveTeachingSession(patId){ const keys=['seen_stoma','assemble_items','remove_old_bag','remove_flange','clean_stoma','empty_bag','apply_bag_with_flange','apply_flange','dispose_waste']; const payload={patient_id:patId,session_date:document.getElementById('at-date')?.value,nurse_name:document.getElementById('at-nurse')?.value.trim()||null,notes:document.getElementById('at-notes')?.value.trim()||null,nurse_signature:document.getElementById('at-sig')?.value.trim()||null}; keys.forEach((k,i)=>{payload['item_'+(i+1)+'_'+k]=document.getElementById('at-'+k)?.checked||false;}); const {error}=await SB.from('teaching_sessions').insert(payload); if(error){alert('Error: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); await renderPdTabTeaching(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'),patId); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // URGENT NEW STOMA DAILY REVIEW MODAL (Note 12) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function openUrgentDailyReviewModal(patId, episodeId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const now=new Date().toTimeString().substring(0,5); mb.innerHTML=`

Urgent New Stoma — Daily Review

Post-operative daily stoma assessment checklist
Stoma Assessment
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveUrgentDailyReview(patId, episodeId){ const date=document.getElementById('udr-date')?.value; if(!date){alert('Review date is required.');return;} const {error}=await SB.from('urgent_stoma_daily_review').insert({ patient_id:patId||null, episode_id:episodeId||null, review_date:date, review_time:document.getElementById('udr-time')?.value?new Date(`${date}T${document.getElementById('udr-time').value}`).toISOString():null, post_op_day_number:parseInt(document.getElementById('udr-pod')?.value)||null, stoma_appearance:document.getElementById('udr-appear')?.value||null, skin_condition:document.getElementById('udr-skin')?.value||null, output_consistency_type:document.getElementById('udr-output')?.value||null, notes:document.getElementById('udr-notes')?.value.trim()||null, nurse_signature:document.getElementById('udr-sig')?.value.trim()||null }); if(error){alert('Error saving review: '+error.message);return;} // Also log as an event await SB.from('events').insert({ patient_id:patId||null, episode_id:episodeId||null, event_type:'daily_review', event_date:date, nurse_name:document.getElementById('udr-nurse')?.value.trim()||getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, stoma_appearance:document.getElementById('udr-appear')?.value||null, peristomal_skin:document.getElementById('udr-skin')?.value||null, output_consistency:document.getElementById('udr-output')?.value||null, post_op_day_number:parseInt(document.getElementById('udr-pod')?.value)||null, notes:document.getElementById('udr-notes')?.value.trim()||null, nurse_signature:document.getElementById('udr-sig')?.value.trim()||null }).catch(()=>{}); closeMo(); if(patId) await renderPdTabStormaTimeline(document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'),patId); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PRE-OP SITING MODAL (Note 13 — Elective pathway) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function openPreOpSitingModal(patId, episodeId){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; mb.innerHTML=`

Pre-Op Stoma Siting

Elective pathway — pre-operative siting record
Sites Marked (tick all assessed)
Clinical Findings
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function savePreOpSiting(patId, episodeId){ const date=document.getElementById('pos-date')?.value; if(!date){alert('Siting date is required.');return;} const {error}=await SB.from('pre_op_siting').insert({ patient_id:patId||null, episode_id:episodeId||null, siting_date:date, nurse_name:document.getElementById('pos-nurse')?.value.trim()||null, site_marked_ru:document.getElementById('pos-ru')?.checked||false, site_marked_rl:document.getElementById('pos-rl')?.checked||false, site_marked_lu:document.getElementById('pos-lu')?.checked||false, site_marked_ll:document.getElementById('pos-ll')?.checked||false, skin_folds_noted:document.getElementById('pos-skinfolds')?.checked||false, belt_line_noted:document.getElementById('pos-beltline')?.checked||false, scars_noted:document.getElementById('pos-scars')?.checked||false, agreed_site:document.getElementById('pos-agreed')?.value.trim()||null, patient_preference:document.getElementById('pos-pref')?.value.trim()||null, notes:document.getElementById('pos-notes')?.value.trim()||null, nurse_signature:document.getElementById('pos-sig')?.value.trim()||null }); if(error){alert('Error saving siting record: '+error.message);return;} await SB.from('events').insert({ patient_id:patId||null, episode_id:episodeId||null, event_type:'pre_op_siting', event_date:date, nurse_name:document.getElementById('pos-nurse')?.value.trim()||null, notes:`Pre-op siting completed. Agreed site: ${document.getElementById('pos-agreed')?.value||'—'}`, nurse_signature:document.getElementById('pos-sig')?.value.trim()||null }).catch(()=>{}); closeMo(); alert('Pre-op siting record saved.'); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // OFFICIAL MDH DISCHARGE LETTER — HTML PREVIEW (Note 34) // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderMdhLetterHtml(data, p){ const date=data.letter_date?new Date(data.letter_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}):new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const rawBody=data.letter_body||''; const formattedBody=htmlSafe(rawBody).replace(/\n/g,'
').replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g,'$1'); return ` MDH Stoma Care Discharge Letter
Stoma Care Service
Tel No: 2545 4431
${date}
${htmlSafe((p?.first_name||'')+' '+(p?.surname||''))}    ${htmlSafe(p?.id_card||p?.id_card_number||'')}
Dear Nurses,
${formattedBody}
${htmlSafe(data.nurse_name||'')}
Stoma Care Service
Mater Dei Hospital, Tal-Qroqq, Msida, MSD 2090, Malta
Tel: (+356) 2545 0000  |  Fax: (+356) 2124 0176  |  DDI: (+356) 2545 + Ext. No.
Ministry of Health, The Elderly and Community Care
`; } function printDischargeLetter(letterId){ SB.from('discharge_letters').select('*').eq('id',letterId).single().then(({data,error})=>{ if(error||!data){alert('Could not load letter.');return;} SB.from('patients').select('first_name,surname,id_card').eq('id',data.patient_id).single().then(pr=>{ const p=pr.data||{}; const html=renderMdhLetterHtml(data,p); const w=window.open('','_blank'); w.document.write(html); w.document.close(); w.onload=()=>{w.focus();w.print();}; }); }); } async function previewDischargeLetter(letterId){ const {data:letterData,error}=await SB.from('discharge_letters').select('*').eq('id',letterId).single(); const data=letterData; if(error||!data){alert('Could not load letter.');return;} const {data:pd}=await SB.from('patients').select('first_name,surname,id_card').eq('id',data.patient_id).single(); const p=pd||{}; const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; const html=renderMdhLetterHtml(data,p); mb.innerHTML=`

Discharge Letter Preview

${new Date(data.letter_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT')} · ${htmlSafe(data.nurse_name||'—')} · ${htmlSafe(data.status)}
${data.status==='draft'?``:''}
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function loadPdTabLegacyFull(tab, patId){ const container=document.getElementById('pd-tab-content'); if(!container||!patId)return; container.innerHTML='
Loading...
'; if(tab==='reviews'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('daily_reviews').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('review_date',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} const rows=(data||[]); if(error){container.innerHTML=`
Error loading daily_reviews: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}
`;return;} container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):''}
DateByApplianceSkinAppearanceOutputSelf CareOutcomeNotes
${r.review_date?new Date(r.review_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.reviewed_by||'—')} ${r.appliance_changed?'✅ Changed':'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.peristomal_skin||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.stoma_appearance||'—')} ${htmlSafe([r.stoma_output,r.output_consistency,r.output_volume_ml?String(r.output_volume_ml)+' ml':null].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.self_care_status||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.outcome||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.clinical_notes||'—')}
No reviews yet
`; } if(tab==='teaching'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('teaching_education').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('education_date',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} if(error&&!data.length){container.innerHTML=`
teaching_education not available.
`;return;} const rows=(data||[]); container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):''}
DateByEducation TypeTopicMethodUnderstandingSelf CareCarerOutcomeNotes
${r.education_date?new Date(r.education_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.nurse||r.submitted_by||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.education_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.topic||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.method||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.patient_understanding||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.self_care_status||'—')} ${r.carer_involved?`${htmlSafe(r.carer_name||'Yes')}`:'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.outcome||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.education_notes||'—')}
No teaching records yet
`; } if(tab==='referrals'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('community_referrals').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_active',true).order('referral_date',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} if(error&&!data.length){container.innerHTML=`
community_referrals not available.
`;return;} const rows=(data||[]); const sc={Pending:'background:#fff8e1;color:#e65100;',Sent:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;',Accepted:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;',Completed:'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20;',Declined:'background:#fdecea;color:#b71c1c;'}; container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>{ const typeBadge=referralTypeBadge(r.referral_type); const status=normaliseReferralStatus(r.referral_status); const statusStyle=sc[status]||'background:#f5f5f5;color:#757575;'; return ``; }).join(''):''}
DateTypeSent ByReferred To/FromReason / NotesStatus
${r.referral_date?new Date(r.referral_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${typeBadge} ${htmlSafe(r.referral_sent_by||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.referral_sent_to||'—')} ${htmlSafe(referralReasonText(r)||'—')} ${htmlSafe(status)}
No referrals yet
`; } if(tab==='appts'){ let rows=[]; try{rows=await getAppointmentsForPatient(patId);}catch(e){rows=[];} const sc2={booked:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1',attended:'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20',did_not_attend:'background:#fff8e1;color:#e65100',cancelled:'background:#fdecea;color:#b71c1c'}; const sl2={booked:'Booked',attended:'Seen',did_not_attend:'DNTU',cancelled:'Cancelled'}; container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>{ const s=sc2[r.status]||'background:#f5f5f5;color:#757575'; return ``; }).join(''):''}
DateTimeStatusNotes
${r.appt_date?new Date(r.appt_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.appt_slot||'—')} ${htmlSafe(sl2[r.status]||'Booked')} ${htmlSafe(r.notes||'—')}
No appointments yet
`; } if(tab==='appliances'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('appliances_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_active',true).order('created_at',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} const rows=data||[]; container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):''}
DateApplianceSizeProductAccessoryCurrentOutcomeNotes
${fmtMaybeDate(r.date_started)}${htmlSafe(r.appliance_type||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.appliance_size||'—')}${htmlSafe([r.product_name,r.product_code,r.manufacturer].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')}${htmlSafe([r.accessory_type,r.accessory_name].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')}${r.is_current?'Yes':'No'}${htmlSafe(r.outcome||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.appliance_notes||'—')}
No appliance records yet
`; } if(tab==='discharge'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('discharge_planning').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).eq('is_active',true).order('created_at',{ascending:false});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} const rows=data||[]; container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):''}
StartedWardExpectedActualSelf CareCommunityFollow-UpOutcomeNotes
${fmtMaybeDate(r.planning_started_date)}${htmlSafe(r.ward||'—')}${fmtMaybeDate(r.expected_discharge_date)}${fmtMaybeDate(r.actual_discharge_date)}${htmlSafe(r.self_care_status||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.community_referral_status||'—')}${r.followup_booked?'Booked':'Not booked'}${htmlSafe(r.discharge_outcome||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.discharge_notes||'—')}
No discharge plan yet
`; } if(tab==='followups'){ let data=[],error=null; try{const r=await SB.from('follow_ups').select('*').eq('patient_id',patId).order('follow_up_date',{ascending:true});data=r.data||[];error=r.error;}catch(e){error=e;} const rows=data||[]; container.innerHTML=`
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):''}
DueAppointmentTypeStatusNurseOutcomeNextNotes
${fmtMaybeDate(r.followup_due_date)}${fmtMaybeDate(r.appointment_date)} ${htmlSafe(String(r.appointment_time||'').slice(0,5))}${htmlSafe(r.followup_type||'—')}${followupStatusBadge(r.followup_status)}${htmlSafe(r.assigned_nurse||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.outcome||'—')}${fmtMaybeDate(r.next_followup_date)}${htmlSafe(r.notes||'—')}
No follow-ups yet
`; } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STEP 11 — PHASE 2 STAFFING HELPERS // New source tables: roster_staff, roster_entries, staff_leave, daily_attendance. // The older compatibility tables remain in place during transition so legacy screens keep working. // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function rosterStatusToShiftCode(status){ const s=String(status||'working'); const map={working:'Day',off:'Off',sick_leave:'Sick Leave',maternity_leave:'Maternity Leave',study_leave:'Study Leave',annual_leave:'Leave',overtime:'Overtime',public_holiday:'Public Holiday'}; return map[s]||s; } function shiftCodeToRosterStatus(code){ const c=String(code||'').toLowerCase(); if(['day','d','working'].includes(c))return 'working'; if(['night','n'].includes(c))return 'working'; if(['off','r','rest'].includes(c))return 'off'; if(c.includes('sick'))return 'sick_leave'; if(c.includes('maternity'))return 'maternity_leave'; if(c.includes('study'))return 'study_leave'; if(c.includes('overtime'))return 'overtime'; if(c.includes('public'))return 'public_holiday'; if(c.includes('leave')||c.includes('vacation')||c.includes('long'))return 'annual_leave'; return code||'working'; } function staffLeaveTypeToLegacy(type){ const t=String(type||'').toLowerCase(); if(t.includes('sick'))return 'sick_leave'; if(t.includes('maternity'))return 'maternity_leave'; if(t.includes('study'))return 'study_leave'; if(t.includes('time in lieu')||t.includes('til'))return 'overtime'; if(t.includes('overtime'))return 'overtime'; if(t.includes('leave')||t.includes('long'))return 'annual_leave'; return t.replace(/\s+/g,'_')||'annual_leave'; } function legacyLeaveTypeToStaffLeave(type){ const t=String(type||'').toLowerCase(); if(t==='sick_leave')return 'Sick Leave'; if(t==='maternity_leave')return 'Maternity Leave'; if(t==='study_leave')return 'Study Leave'; if(t==='overtime')return 'Time in Lieu'; if(t==='annual_leave')return 'Leave'; return type||'Leave'; } async function safeUpsertRosterStaffToStaff(rows){ try{ if(!rows||!rows.length)return; await SB.from('staff').upsert(rows.map(r=>({ id:r.id,full_name:r.full_name,first_name:r.first_name||null,surname:r.surname||null,email:r.email||null,role:r.role||'Staff Nurse',employment_type:r.employment_type||'Full-Time',home_ward:r.home_ward||null,roster_group:r.roster_group||null,roster_pattern:r.roster_pattern||null,is_active:r.is_active!==false,notes:r.notes||null,created_at:r.created_at||new Date().toISOString() })),{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('Staff compatibility sync skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function syncPhase2StaffingToCompatibility(){ // One-way refresh from Phase 2 tables into the compatibility tables used by older parts of v44. // This is intentionally non-destructive. try{ const {data:rs}=await SB.from('roster_staff').select('*').eq('is_active',true); await safeUpsertRosterStaffToStaff(rs||[]); }catch(e){console.warn('roster_staff sync skipped:',e?.message||e);} try{ const start=new Date(); start.setMonth(start.getMonth()-2); start.setDate(1); const end=new Date(); end.setMonth(end.getMonth()+3); end.setDate(0); const s1=fmt(start), s2=fmt(end); const {data:re}=await SB.from('roster_entries').select('*').gte('roster_date',s1).lte('roster_date',s2); if(re?.length){ await SB.from('roster').upsert(re.map(r=>({ id:r.id,staff_id:r.staff_id,roster_date:r.roster_date,status:shiftCodeToRosterStatus(r.shift_code),notes:r.notes||null,created_at:r.created_at||new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:r.updated_at||new Date().toISOString() })),{onConflict:'staff_id,roster_date'}); } }catch(e){console.warn('roster_entries sync skipped:',e?.message||e);} try{ const start=new Date(); start.setMonth(start.getMonth()-2); start.setDate(1); const end=new Date(); end.setMonth(end.getMonth()+3); end.setDate(0); const s1=fmt(start), s2=fmt(end); const {data:sl}=await SB.from('staff_leave').select('*').lte('start_date',s2).gte('end_date',s1); if(sl?.length){ await SB.from('leave_records').upsert(sl.map(l=>({ id:l.id,staff_id:l.staff_id,leave_type:staffLeaveTypeToLegacy(l.leave_type),start_date:l.start_date,end_date:l.end_date,notes:l.reason_notes||null,created_at:l.created_at||new Date().toISOString() })),{onConflict:'id'}); } }catch(e){console.warn('staff_leave sync skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function mirrorShiftToPhase2(staffId,date,status,notes){ try{ await SB.from('roster_entries').upsert({ staff_id:staffId, roster_date:date, ward:'Stoma Care Unit', shift_code:rosterStatusToShiftCode(status), is_overtime:status==='overtime', is_til:false, is_leave:['sick_leave','maternity_leave','study_leave','annual_leave'].includes(status), is_long_leave:false, auto_long_leave:false, notes:notes||null, updated_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, updated_at:new Date().toISOString() },{onConflict:'staff_id,roster_date'}); }catch(e){console.warn('roster_entries mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function mirrorFullDayLeaveToPhase2(staffId,date,type,notes){ try{ const phaseType=legacyLeaveTypeToStaffLeave(type); // Avoid duplicating the auto-created roster leave for the same staff/date/type. const {data:existing}=await SB.from('staff_leave').select('id').eq('staff_id',staffId).eq('start_date',date).eq('end_date',date).ilike('reason_notes','Auto roster:%').limit(1); const payload={staff_id:staffId,leave_type:phaseType,start_date:date,end_date:date,start_shift:'Full Day',end_shift:'Full Day',number_of_days:1,status:'Approved',approved_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null,approved_at:new Date().toISOString(),reason_notes:notes||`Auto roster: ${phaseType}`}; if(existing?.length)await SB.from('staff_leave').update(payload).eq('id',existing[0].id); else await SB.from('staff_leave').insert(payload); }catch(e){console.warn('staff_leave mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function mirrorHourlyLeaveToPhase2(staffId,date,type,start,end,hours,notes){ try{ await SB.from('staff_leave').insert({staff_id:staffId,leave_type:legacyLeaveTypeToStaffLeave(type),start_date:date,end_date:date,start_shift:String(start||'').slice(0,5),end_shift:String(end||'').slice(0,5),number_of_days:Number(hours||0)/7,status:'Approved',approved_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null,approved_at:new Date().toISOString(),reason_notes:notes||null}); }catch(e){console.warn('hourly staff_leave mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function saveDailyAttendanceRowsToPhase2(attendanceData){ try{ const d=attendanceData||dailyAttendanceCache; if(!d||!d.rows||!d.rows.length)return; const rows=d.rows.map(r=>({attendance_date:d.date,ward:d.ward||'Stoma Care Unit',staff_name:r.name||'',role:r.role||'',shift_type:r.duty||r.status||'',attendance_status:r.present?'Present':(r.absent?'Absent':'Recorded'),start_time:null,end_time:null,notes:r.note||'',submitted_to_hr:false,submitted_to_clinic:false,submitted_at:new Date().toISOString(),submitted_by:d.submitter||getLoggedInSubmitterName()||''})); await SB.from('daily_attendance').insert(rows); }catch(e){console.warn('daily_attendance save skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function loadHolidays(){ const{data}=await SB.from('public_holidays').select('*'); if(data)data.forEach(h=>{holidays[h.holiday_date]=h.name;}); } const isHol=d=>holidays[d]||null; async function loadStaff(){ // Step 11: roster_staff is now the primary staffing table. try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('roster_staff').select('*').eq('is_active',true); if(!error&&data&&data.length){ staffList=sortStaffRows(data); await safeUpsertRosterStaffToStaff(data); return; } }catch(e){console.warn('roster_staff load skipped:',e?.message||e);} const{data}=await SB.from('staff').select('*').eq('is_active',true); staffList=sortStaffRows(data||[]); } // JUMP TO DATE function jumpToDate(){ const val=document.getElementById('jump-date').value; if(!val)return; selectedJumpDate=val; const d=new Date(val+'T12:00:00'); curMonth=new Date(d.getFullYear(),d.getMonth(),1); snapCurrentDate=val; renderRoster(); loadTodaySnapshot(); loadMonthlyAppointmentSnapshot(); setTimeout(()=>{ const el=document.querySelector('.th-sel'); if(el)el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest',inline:'center'}); },300); } function jumpChangeDay(dir){ const base=selectedJumpDate||TODAY; const d=new Date(base+'T12:00:00'); d.setDate(d.getDate()+dir); selectedJumpDate=fmt(d); document.getElementById('jump-date').value=selectedJumpDate; jumpToDate(); } function clearJumpDate(){ selectedJumpDate=null; document.getElementById('jump-date').value=''; renderRoster(); renderOTList(null); renderTILList(null); } // ROSTER function changeMonth(dir){curMonth=new Date(curMonth);curMonth.setMonth(curMonth.getMonth()+dir);selectedJumpDate=null;document.getElementById('jump-date').value='';renderRoster();loadMonthlyAppointmentSnapshot();} function goToday(){curMonth=new Date();curMonth.setDate(1);selectedJumpDate=null;document.getElementById('jump-date').value='';renderRoster();loadMonthlyAppointmentSnapshot();} async function renderRoster(){ const y=curMonth.getFullYear(),m=curMonth.getMonth(),days=dim(y,m); document.getElementById('mlbl').textContent=curMonth.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const s1=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-01`; const s2=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(days).padStart(2,'0')}`; const{data:rd}=await SB.from('roster').select('*').gte('roster_date',s1).lte('roster_date',s2); rCache={};(rd||[]).forEach(r=>{rCache[`${r.staff_id}_${r.roster_date}`]=r;}); const{data:bd}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').select('*, bank_staff(id,full_name,role)').gte('work_date',s1).lte('work_date',s2); const{data:tilData}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*, staff(id,full_name,role)').eq('leave_type','overtime').or('notes.like.TIL-Off:%,notes.like.TIL-In:%').gte('start_date',s1).lte('start_date',s2); const{data:leaveMonth}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*').lte('start_date',s2).gte('end_date',s1); const hourlyLeaveByCell={}; (leaveMonth||[]).filter(isHourlyLeaveRecord).forEach(l=>{ const start=new Date(l.start_date+'T12:00:00'); const end=new Date((l.end_date||l.start_date)+'T12:00:00'); for(let cur=new Date(start);cur<=end;cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1)){ const ds=fmt(cur); if(dss2)continue; const key=`${l.staff_id}_${ds}`; if(!hourlyLeaveByCell[key])hourlyLeaveByCell[key]=[]; hourlyLeaveByCell[key].push(l); } }); const bankOTMonth=(bd||[]).filter(b=>!isTilNote(b.notes)); const coreOTByCell={}; function addCoreOTCell(staffId,date,row){ if(!staffId||!date)return; const key=`${staffId}_${date}`; if(!coreOTByCell[key])coreOTByCell[key]=row; } (leaveMonth||[]).filter(l=>String(l.leave_type||'').toLowerCase()==='overtime'&&!isTilNote(l.notes)).forEach(l=>{ const start=new Date(l.start_date+'T12:00:00'); const end=new Date((l.end_date||l.start_date)+'T12:00:00'); for(let cur=new Date(start);cur<=end;cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1)){ const ds=fmt(cur); if(dss2)continue; addCoreOTCell(l.staff_id,ds,{...l,_source:'core-leave'}); } }); bankOTMonth.forEach(b=>{ const core=findCoreStaffByNameFlexible(b.bank_staff?.full_name); if(core)addCoreOTCell(core.id,b.work_date,{...b,_source:'bank-assignment',_core_id:core.id}); }); const th=isHol(TODAY); document.getElementById('hban-roster').innerHTML=th?`
🇲🇹 Today is a Malta Public Holiday: ${th}
`:''; const DN=['Su','Mo','Tu','We','Th','Fr','Sa']; let html='Staff MemberRole'; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const dt=new Date(y,m,d),ds=fmt(dt),dow=dt.getDay(); const hol=isHol(ds),isT=ds===TODAY,isSun=dow===0,isSel=selectedJumpDate&&ds===selectedJumpDate; const cls=isSel?'th-sel':isT?'th-today':hol?'th-hol':isSun?'th-sun':''; let holLine=''; if(hol){let short=hol.replace('Feast of St. ','St.').replace('Feast of Our Lady of ','OL ').replace('Feast of the ','').replace('Feast of ','').replace("Workers' Day",'Workers').replace("New Year's Day",'New Year').replace('Independence Day','Independ.').replace('Republic Day','Republic').replace('Freedom Day','Freedom').replace('Good Friday','Gd Friday').replace('Christmas Day','Christmas');if(short.length>11)short=short.substring(0,11);holLine=`
🇲🇹 ${short}
`;} html+=`${holLine}${DN[dow]}
${d}${isSel?'
▼':''}`; } html+=''; html+=`Core Staff`; for(const st of staffList){ html+=`${htmlSafe(fullDisplayName(st.full_name))}${htmlSafe(st.role)}`; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const dt=new Date(y,m,d),ds=fmt(dt),dow=dt.getDay(); const hol=isHol(ds),isT=ds===TODAY,isSun=dow===0,isSel=selectedJumpDate&&ds===selectedJumpDate; const entry=rCache[`${st.id}_${ds}`]; const code=entry?CODE_MAP[entry.status]||'D':CODE_MAP[defaultCode(st,ds)]||'D'; const tdCls=isSel?'td-sel':isT?'td-today':hol?'td-hol':isSun?'td-sun':''; const hourly=(hourlyLeaveByCell[`${st.id}_${ds}`]||[]); const mini=hourly.length?`
${htmlSafe(hourly.map(leaveMiniText).join('+'))}
`:''; const coreOT=coreOTByCell[`${st.id}_${ds}`]; if(coreOT){ const otStart=String(coreOT.shift_start||coreOT.start_time||'07:00').slice(0,5); const otEnd=String(coreOT.shift_end||coreOT.end_time||'').slice(0,5)||'—'; const otTitle=`Core staff overtime · ${fullDisplayName(st.full_name)} · ${ds} · ${otStart}–${otEnd}`; const otClick=coreOT._source==='bank-assignment'&&coreOT.id?`openOTEdit('${coreOT.id}')`:`openShift('${st.id}','${st.full_name}','${ds}')`; html+=`
OT
${mini}`; }else{ html+=`
${code}
${mini}`; } } html+=''; } // OT rows — only true overtime rows. TIL rows are kept in the TIL section. const bdOT=bankOTMonth.filter(b=>!findCoreStaffByNameFlexible(b.bank_staff?.full_name)); if(bdOT.length>0){ html+=`Overtime Staff`; const byS={}; bdOT.forEach(b=>{ const key=String(b.bank_staff_id||b.bank_staff?.id||b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'); if(!byS[key])byS[key]={name:fullDisplayName(b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'),role:cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role),dates:{}}; byS[key].dates[b.work_date]=b; if(b.bank_staff?.role)byS[key].role=b.bank_staff.role; }); for(const group of Object.values(byS)){ const dates=group.dates; html+=`${htmlSafe(group.name)}${htmlSafe(group.role)}`; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const dt=new Date(y,m,d),ds=fmt(dt),dow=dt.getDay(); const hol=isHol(ds),isT=ds===TODAY,isSun=dow===0,isSel=selectedJumpDate&&ds===selectedJumpDate; const e=dates[ds]; const tdCls=isSel?'td-sel':isT?'td-today':hol?'td-hol':isSun?'td-sun':''; html+=`${e?`
OT
`:`
·
`}`; } html+=''; } } // TIL rows — includes core-staff TIL stored in leave_records and bank-staff TIL stored in bank_staff_assignments. const bankTILCalendar=(bd||[]).filter(b=>isTilNote(b.notes)).map(b=>({...b,_source:'bank'})); const coreTILCalendar=(tilData||[]).map(t=>({...t,_source:'core'})); const allTILCalendar=[...coreTILCalendar,...bankTILCalendar]; if(allTILCalendar.length>0){ html+=`TIL Staff`; const byTIL={}; allTILCalendar.forEach(t=>{ const isBank=t._source==='bank'||!!t.bank_staff_id; const key=String(isBank?(t.bank_staff_id||t.bank_staff?.id||t.bank_staff?.full_name):(t.staff_id||t.staff?.id||t.staff?.full_name)||'Unknown'); const name=fullDisplayName(isBank?(t.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'):(t.staff?.full_name||'Unknown')); const role=cleanRoleValue(isBank?t.bank_staff?.role:t.staff?.role); const date=isBank?t.work_date:t.start_date; if(!byTIL[key])byTIL[key]={name,role,dates:{},isBank}; byTIL[key].dates[date]=t; byTIL[key].role=role; }); for(const group of Object.values(byTIL)){ const dates=group.dates; html+=`${htmlSafe(group.name)}${htmlSafe(group.role)}`; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const dt=new Date(y,m,d),ds=fmt(dt),dow=dt.getDay(); const hol=isHol(ds),isT=ds===TODAY,isSun=dow===0,isSel=selectedJumpDate&&ds===selectedJumpDate; const e=dates[ds]; const tdCls=isSel?'td-sel':isT?'td-today':hol?'td-hol':isSun?'td-sun':''; if(e){const isOff=isTilOffNote(e.notes);const code=isOff?'TO':'TI';const editCall=(e._source==='bank'||!!e.bank_staff_id)?`openBankTILEdit('${e.id}')`:`openTILEdit('${e.id}')`;html+=`
${code}
`;} else html+=`
·
`; } html+=''; } } html+=''; document.getElementById('rt').innerHTML=html; // If jump date selected, filter OT/TIL logs to that date; otherwise show full month. // Important: bank staff TIL entries are stored in bank_staff_assignments with TIL notes. // They must appear in the TIL log, not mixed into the overtime log. const bankRows=(bd||[]); const bankOTRows=bankRows.filter(b=>!isTilNote(b.notes)); const bankTILRows=bankRows.filter(b=>isTilNote(b.notes)).map(b=>({...b,_source:'bank'})); const coreTILRows=(tilData||[]).map(t=>({...t,_source:'core'})); if(selectedJumpDate){ renderOTList(bankOTRows.filter(b=>b.work_date===selectedJumpDate),selectedJumpDate); renderTILList([...coreTILRows.filter(t=>t.start_date===selectedJumpDate),...bankTILRows.filter(b=>b.work_date===selectedJumpDate)],selectedJumpDate); }else{ renderOTList(bankOTRows,null); renderTILList([...coreTILRows,...bankTILRows],null); } } function buildGroupedOTLogRows(rows){ const groups={}; (rows||[]).filter(b=>!isTilNote(b.notes)).forEach(b=>{ const name=fullDisplayName(b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'); const role=cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role); const date=b.work_date; const key=makeAssignmentGroupKey('ot',date,name,'ot'); if(!groups[key]){ groups[key]={key,ids:[],bankStaffIds:[],date,name,role,start:String(b.shift_start||'07:00').slice(0,5),end:String(b.shift_end||'').slice(0,5),notes:[],rows:[]}; } groups[key].ids.push(b.id); if(b.bank_staff_id)groups[key].bankStaffIds.push(b.bank_staff_id); if(b.bank_staff?.id)groups[key].bankStaffIds.push(b.bank_staff.id); groups[key].role=betterRole(groups[key].role,role); groups[key].start=minTime(groups[key].start,String(b.shift_start||'07:00').slice(0,5)); groups[key].end=maxTime(groups[key].end,String(b.shift_end||'').slice(0,5)); if(b.notes)groups[key].notes.push(b.notes); groups[key].rows.push(b); }); return Object.values(groups).map(g=>({ ...g, ids:[...new Set(g.ids.filter(Boolean))], bankStaffIds:[...new Set(g.bankStaffIds.filter(Boolean))], notesText:joinUniqueNotes(g.notes) })); } function renderOTList(bd,filterDate){ const label=filterDate?fmtLabel(filterDate):curMonth.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); document.getElementById('ot-list-label').textContent=filterDate?`— ${label}`:label; const tbody=document.getElementById('ot-tbody'); const grouped=buildGroupedOTLogRows(bd||[]); otLogGroups={}; grouped.forEach(g=>{otLogGroups[g.key]=g;}); if(!grouped.length){tbody.innerHTML='No overtime nurses';return;} const sorted=[...grouped].sort((a,b)=>String(a.date||'').localeCompare(String(b.date||'')) || String(a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.name||''))); tbody.innerHTML=sorted.map(g=>{ const start=g.start||'07:00',end=g.end||'—'; let hrs='—'; const sm=timeToMinutes(start),em=timeToMinutes(end); if(sm!==null&&em!==null&&em>sm){const t=em-sm;hrs=`${Math.floor(t/60)}h${t%60>0?' '+t%60+'m':''}`;} const dt=new Date(g.date+'T12:00:00'); const dayLabel=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}); const hol=isHol(g.date); const dupNote=g.ids.length>1?`
Merged ${g.ids.length} duplicate rows`:''; return` ${htmlSafe(g.name)}
Click row to edit name + role${dupNote} ${htmlSafe(g.role)} ${dayLabel}${hol?' 🇲🇹':''} ${start} ${end} ${hrs} `; }).join(''); } function buildGroupedTILLogRows(rows){ const groups={}; (rows||[]).forEach(r=>{ const isBank=r._source==='bank'||!!r.bank_staff_id; const notes=String(r.notes||''); const isOff=isTilOffNote(notes); const type=isOff?'off':'in'; const date=isBank?r.work_date:r.start_date; const name=fullDisplayName(isBank?(r.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'):(r.staff?.full_name||'Unknown')); const role=cleanRoleValue(isBank?r.bank_staff?.role:r.staff?.role); const key=makeAssignmentGroupKey('til',date,name,type); const timeMatch=notes.match(/\[([0-9:]+)[^0-9]([0-9:]+)\]/); const start=isBank?String(r.shift_start||timeMatch?.[1]||'07:00').slice(0,5):(timeMatch?timeMatch[1]:'07:00'); const until=isBank?(String(r.shift_end||timeMatch?.[2]||'').slice(0,5)||''):(timeMatch?timeMatch[2]:''); if(!groups[key]){ groups[key]={key,ids:[],bankIds:[],coreIds:[],staffIds:[],bankStaffIds:[],date,name,role,type,start,end:until,notes:[],rows:[]}; } groups[key].ids.push(r.id); if(isBank){groups[key].bankIds.push(r.id); if(r.bank_staff_id)groups[key].bankStaffIds.push(r.bank_staff_id); if(r.bank_staff?.id)groups[key].bankStaffIds.push(r.bank_staff.id);} else{groups[key].coreIds.push(r.id); if(r.staff_id)groups[key].staffIds.push(r.staff_id); if(r.staff?.id)groups[key].staffIds.push(r.staff.id);} groups[key].role=betterRole(groups[key].role,role); groups[key].start=minTime(groups[key].start,start); groups[key].end=maxTime(groups[key].end,until); if(notes)groups[key].notes.push(notes); groups[key].rows.push(r); }); return Object.values(groups).map(g=>({ ...g, ids:[...new Set(g.ids.filter(Boolean))], bankIds:[...new Set(g.bankIds.filter(Boolean))], coreIds:[...new Set(g.coreIds.filter(Boolean))], staffIds:[...new Set(g.staffIds.filter(Boolean))], bankStaffIds:[...new Set(g.bankStaffIds.filter(Boolean))], notesText:joinUniqueNotes(g.notes) })); } async function renderTILList(data,filterDate){ const label=filterDate?fmtLabel(filterDate):curMonth.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); document.getElementById('til-list-label').textContent=filterDate?`— ${label}`:label; const tbody=document.getElementById('til-tbody'); const grouped=buildGroupedTILLogRows(data||[]); tilLogGroups={}; grouped.forEach(g=>{tilLogGroups[g.key]=g;}); if(!grouped.length){tbody.innerHTML='No TIL records';return;} const sorted=[...grouped].sort((a,b)=>String(a.date||'').localeCompare(String(b.date||'')) || String(a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.name||''))); tbody.innerHTML=sorted.map(g=>{ const dt=new Date(g.date+'T12:00:00'); const dayLabel=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}); const typeLabel=g.type==='off'?'TIL Off':'TIL In'; const typeCls=g.type==='off'?'background:#e8f5f4;color:var(--teal);':'background:#e8eaf6;color:#3949ab;'; const sm=timeToMinutes(g.start),em=timeToMinutes(g.end); const hrs=(sm!==null&&em!==null&&em>sm)?((em-sm)/60).toFixed(1).replace('.0',''):'—'; const dupNote=g.ids.length>1?`
Merged ${g.ids.length} duplicate rows`:''; return` ${htmlSafe(g.name)}
Click row to edit name + role${dupNote} ${htmlSafe(g.role)} ${dayLabel} ${typeLabel} ${g.start||'07:00'} ${g.end||'—'} ${hrs}h `; }).join(''); } async function loadTILForMonth(){ const y=curMonth.getFullYear(),m=curMonth.getMonth(); const s1=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-01`; const s2=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}`; const{data}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*, staff(full_name,role)').eq('leave_type','overtime').or('notes.like.TIL-Off:%,notes.like.TIL-In:%').gte('start_date',s1).lte('start_date',s2).order('start_date',{ascending:false}); return data||[]; } // PATIENT SNAPSHOT function snapChangeDay(dir){const d=new Date(snapCurrentDate+'T12:00:00');d.setDate(d.getDate()+dir);snapCurrentDate=fmt(d);loadTodaySnapshot();} function snapGoToday(){snapCurrentDate=TODAY;loadTodaySnapshot();} async function loadTodaySnapshot(){ const d=new Date(snapCurrentDate+'T12:00:00'); const isToday=snapCurrentDate===TODAY; document.getElementById('snap-date').textContent=d.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'})+(isToday?' (Today)':''); const appts=await getAppointmentsOnDate(snapCurrentDate); const body=document.getElementById('snap-body'); const countEl=document.getElementById('snap-count'); const booked=(appts||[]).filter(a=>a.status!=='cancelled'); if(countEl)countEl.textContent=`${booked.length} patient${booked.length!==1?'s':''}`; if(!appts||!appts.length){body.innerHTML='
No patients booked
';return;} const sc={booked:'ps-booked',attended:'ps-attended',cancelled:'ps-cancelled',did_not_attend:'ps-dna'}; const sl={booked:'Booked',attended:'✓ Seen',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'DNTU'}; body.innerHTML=appts.map(a=>{ const apptId=jsSafe(a.id); const patient=`${a.patients?.first_name||''} ${a.patients?.surname||''}`.trim()||'Unknown patient'; const assignee=a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':''); return `
${String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)}
${htmlSafe(patient)}
${a.patients?.phone_number?`
📞 ${htmlSafe(a.patients.phone_number)}
`:''} ${assignee?`
${htmlSafe(assignee)}
`:''}
${sl[a.status]||''}
`; }).join(''); } async function findOrCreateBankStaff(fullName,role){ const name=String(fullName||'').trim(); const grade=cleanRoleValue(role); if(!name)return null; let {data:existing,error:findError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').select('id,full_name,role').ilike('full_name',name).limit(1); if(findError){throw new Error('Could not search OT/TIL staff: '+findError.message);} if(existing&&existing[0]?.id){ if(grade&&existing[0].role!==grade){await SB.from('bank_staff').update({role:grade}).eq('id',existing[0].id);} return existing[0].id; } const {data:created,error:createError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').insert({full_name:name,role:grade}).select('id').single(); if(createError)throw new Error('Could not create OT/TIL staff: '+createError.message); return created?.id||null; } function minutesBetweenTimes(start,end){ const sm=timeToMinutes(start),em=timeToMinutes(end); if(sm===null||em===null||em<=sm)return 0; return em-sm; } function hoursLabelFromMinutes(mins){ if(!mins||mins<=0)return '0h'; return `${Math.floor(mins/60)}h${mins%60?` ${mins%60}m`:''}`; } function addMinutesToTime(start,mins){ const sm=timeToMinutes(start); if(sm===null)return '08:00'; const end=sm+Number(mins||0); const h=Math.floor(end/60)%24; const m=end%60; return `${String(h).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}`; } function isHourlyLeaveRecord(l){ const t=String(l?.leave_type||''); const n=String(l?.notes||''); const h=Number(l?.total_hours||0); return ['sick_leave','annual_leave','maternity_leave','study_leave'].includes(t) && (n.startsWith('Hourly leave:') || (h>0 && h<8)); } function leaveMiniClass(leaveType){ if(leaveType==='sick_leave')return 'sick'; if(leaveType==='maternity_leave')return 'maternity'; if(leaveType==='study_leave')return 'study'; return 'annual'; } function leaveMiniText(l){ const short=LEAVE_SHORT[l.leave_type]||'L'; const h=Number(l.total_hours||0); const hTxt=h>0?`${h.toFixed(1).replace('.0','')}h`:'hrs'; return `${short} ${hTxt}`; } function setHourlyLeaveHours(v){ const el=document.getElementById('hourly-leave-hours'); if(el)el.value=String(v);
