} async function loadMonthlyAppointmentSnapshot(){ const labelEl=document.getElementById('snap-month-label'); const countEl=document.getElementById('snap-month-count'); const body=document.getElementById('snap-month-body'); if(!labelEl||!countEl||!body)return; const y=curMonth.getFullYear(); const m=curMonth.getMonth(); const start=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-01`; const end=`${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(dim(y,m)).padStart(2,'0')}`; labelEl.textContent=curMonth.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); body.innerHTML='
Loading monthly appointment list...
'; let appts=[]; try{appts=await getAppointmentsBetween(start,end,true);} catch(error){ console.error('Monthly appointment snapshot error:',error); body.innerHTML=`
Could not load monthly appointment snapshot: ${htmlSafe(error.message||String(error))}
`; countEl.textContent='Error'; return; } const active=appts.filter(a=>a.status!=='cancelled'); countEl.textContent=`${active.length} patient${active.length!==1?'s':''}`; if(!appts.length){ body.innerHTML='
No patients booked this month
'; return; } const statusClass={booked:'ps-booked',attended:'ps-attended',cancelled:'ps-cancelled',did_not_attend:'ps-dna'}; const statusLabelMap={booked:'Booked',attended:'Seen',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'DNTU'}; const byDate={}; appts.forEach(a=>{ if(!byDate[a.appt_date])byDate[a.appt_date]=[]; byDate[a.appt_date].push(a); }); body.innerHTML=Object.entries(byDate).map(([date,rows])=>{ const d=new Date(date+'T12:00:00'); const dateLabel=d.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const activeRows=rows.filter(r=>r.status!=='cancelled').length; const list=rows.map(a=>{ const patient=`${a.patients?.first_name||''} ${a.patients?.surname||''}`.trim()||'Unknown patient'; const nurse=a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':'—'); const status=statusLabelMap[a.status]||a.status||'Booked'; return `
${htmlSafe(String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)||'—')}
${htmlSafe(patient)}
${htmlSafe(a.patients?.id_card||'')}
${htmlSafe(nurse)}
${htmlSafe(status)}
`; }).join(''); return `
${htmlSafe(dateLabel)}${activeRows} active / ${rows.length} total
${list}
`; }).join(''); } // ADD OT async function addOT(){ const name=document.getElementById('ot-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('ot-role')?.value||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('ot-date').value; const start=document.getElementById('ot-start').value||'07:00'; const end=document.getElementById('ot-end').value; if(!name||!date||!end){alert('Please fill in nurse name, date and working until time.');return;} if(minutesBetweenTimes(start,end)<=0){alert('Working until time must be after start time.');return;} try{ const bankId=await findOrCreateBankStaff(name,role); if(!bankId){alert('Error adding OT nurse.');return;} const {error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').insert({bank_staff_id:bankId,work_date:date,shift_start:start,shift_end:end,notes:null}); if(error)throw new Error(error.message); document.getElementById('ot-name').value='';document.getElementById('ot-end').value='';document.getElementById('ot-date').value=TODAY; await renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); alert('OT nurse added.'); }catch(e){ alert('Could not add OT nurse: '+(e?.message||String(e))); } } async function openOTEdit(assignmentId){ const{data:b,error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments') .select('*, bank_staff(id,full_name,role)') .eq('id',assignmentId) .single(); if(error||!b){alert('Could not load OT record.');return;} const name=b.bank_staff?.full_name||''; const role=cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role); const start=String(b.shift_start||'07:00').slice(0,5); const end=String(b.shift_end||'').slice(0,5); const notes=b.notes||''; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit Overtime Row

Editing the existing overtime log row — ${htmlSafe(b.work_date||'')}
${roleInputHtml('ot-edit-role',role)}${roleOptionsDatalist()}
`; openMo(); } async function saveOTEdit(assignmentId){ const name=document.getElementById('ot-edit-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('ot-edit-role').value.trim()||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('ot-edit-date').value; const start=document.getElementById('ot-edit-start').value||'07:00'; const end=document.getElementById('ot-edit-end').value; const notes=document.getElementById('ot-edit-notes').value.trim(); if(!name||!date||!end){alert('Please fill in full name, date and working until time.');return;} // IMPORTANT: editing must update the same OT row. // Do NOT search by the new name and do NOT insert a new bank_staff row. // The OT assignment keeps the same bank_staff_assignments.id and the same linked bank_staff.id. const{data:current,error:loadError}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments') .select('id,bank_staff_id') .eq('id',assignmentId) .single(); if(loadError||!current){alert('Could not find the existing OT row to update.');return;} if(!current.bank_staff_id){alert('This OT row has no linked staff record. Please delete it and add it again.');return;} const{error:staffError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').update({ full_name:name, role:role }).eq('id',current.bank_staff_id); if(staffError){alert('Could not update OT nurse name/role: '+staffError.message);return;} const{error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').update({ work_date:date, shift_start:start, shift_end:end, notes:notes||null }).eq('id',assignmentId); if(error){alert('Could not update OT record: '+error.message);return;} closeModal(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'))loadAppts(); } async function deleteOTFromEdit(assignmentId){ closeModal(); await delOT(assignmentId); } function openOTLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=otLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this OT row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} const duplicateText=g.ids.length>1?`
This display row merges ${g.ids.length} duplicate OT rows for the same nurse/date. Saving updates all merged rows so Tracey appears once.
`:''; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit Overtime Row

Monthly roster overtime log row — ${htmlSafe(g.date||'')}
${duplicateText}
${roleInputHtml('ot-group-role',g.role)}${roleOptionsDatalist()}
`; openMo(); } async function saveOTLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=otLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this OT row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} const name=document.getElementById('ot-group-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('ot-group-role').value.trim()||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('ot-group-date').value; const start=document.getElementById('ot-group-start').value||'07:00'; const end=document.getElementById('ot-group-end').value; const notes=document.getElementById('ot-group-notes').value.trim(); if(!name||!date||!end){alert('Please fill in full name, date and working until time.');return;} if(g.bankStaffIds.length){ const{error:staffError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').update({full_name:name,role}).in('id',g.bankStaffIds); if(staffError){alert('Could not update OT nurse name/role: '+staffError.message);return;} } if(g.ids.length){ const{error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').update({work_date:date,shift_start:start,shift_end:end,notes:notes||null}).in('id',g.ids); if(error){alert('Could not update OT row: '+error.message);return;} } closeModal(); await loadStaff(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'))loadAppts(); } async function deleteOTLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=otLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this OT row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} if(!confirm('Delete this OT row?'))return; closeModal(); if(g.ids.length)await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').delete().in('id',g.ids); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); } // ADD TIL async function addTIL(type){ const name=document.getElementById('til-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('til-role')?.value||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('til-date').value; const start=document.getElementById('til-start').value||'07:00'; const until=document.getElementById('til-until').value; if(!name||!date||!until){alert('Please fill in staff name, date and until time.');return;} const totalMins=minutesBetweenTimes(start,until); if(totalMins<=0){alert('Until time must be after start time.');return;} const hrs=(totalMins/60).toFixed(1).replace('.0',''); const typeLabel=type==='off'?'TIL-Off':'TIL-In'; const tilNote=`${typeLabel}: ${hrs}h [${start}–${until}]`; try{ let {data:coreFound,error:coreErr}=await SB.from('staff').select('id,full_name,role').ilike('full_name',name).limit(1); if(coreErr)throw new Error('Could not search core staff: '+coreErr.message); if(coreFound&&coreFound[0]?.id){ const {error}=await SB.from('leave_records').insert({staff_id:coreFound[0].id,leave_type:'overtime',start_date:date,end_date:date,start_time:start,end_time:until,total_hours:totalMins/60,notes:tilNote}); if(error){ const fallback=await SB.from('leave_records').insert({staff_id:coreFound[0].id,leave_type:'overtime',start_date:date,end_date:date,notes:tilNote}); if(fallback.error)throw new Error(fallback.error.message); } }else{ const bankId=await findOrCreateBankStaff(name,role); const {error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').insert({bank_staff_id:bankId,work_date:date,shift_start:start,shift_end:until,notes:tilNote}); if(error)throw new Error(error.message); } document.getElementById('til-name').value='';document.getElementById('til-until').value=''; await renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); alert(type==='off'?'TIL Off added.':'TIL In added.'); }catch(e){ alert('Could not add TIL: '+(e?.message||String(e))); } } async function openTILEdit(recordId){ const{data:r,error}=await SB.from('leave_records') .select('*, staff(id,full_name,role)') .eq('id',recordId) .single(); if(error||!r){alert('Could not load TIL record.');return;} const rawNotes=String(r.notes||''); const isOff=rawNotes.startsWith('TIL-Off'); const timeMatch=rawNotes.match(/\[([0-9:]+)[^0-9]([0-9:]+)\]/); const startT=timeMatch?timeMatch[1]:'07:00'; const untilT=timeMatch?timeMatch[2]:''; const extra=rawNotes.includes('—')?rawNotes.split('—').slice(1).join('—').trim():''; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit TIL Row

Monthly roster TIL log row — ${htmlSafe(r.start_date||'')}
${roleInputHtml('til-edit-role',r.staff?.role||'Staff')}${roleOptionsDatalist()}
`; openMo(); } async function saveTILEdit(recordId,staffId){ const name=document.getElementById('til-edit-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('til-edit-role').value.trim()||'Staff'; const date=document.getElementById('til-edit-date').value; const type=document.getElementById('til-edit-type').value; const start=document.getElementById('til-edit-start').value||'07:00'; const until=document.getElementById('til-edit-until').value; const extra=document.getElementById('til-edit-extra').value.trim(); if(!name||!date||!until){alert('Please fill in full name, date and until time.');return;} if(staffId){ await SB.from('staff').update({full_name:name,role}).eq('id',staffId); } const[sh,sm]=start.split(':').map(Number);const[eh,em]=until.split(':').map(Number); const mins=(eh*60+(em||0))-(sh*60+(sm||0)); const hrs=mins>0?(mins/60).toFixed(1).replace('.0',''):'0'; const typeLabel=type==='off'?'TIL-Off':'TIL-In'; const tilNote=`${typeLabel}: ${hrs}h [${start}–${until}]${extra?' — '+extra:''}`; const{error}=await SB.from('leave_records').update({ start_date:date, end_date:date, leave_type:'overtime', notes:tilNote }).eq('id',recordId); if(error){alert('Could not update TIL record: '+error.message);return;} closeModal(); await loadStaff(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'))loadAppts(); } async function deleteTILFromEdit(recordId){ closeModal(); await delTIL(recordId); } async function openBankTILEdit(assignmentId){ const{data:b,error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments') .select('*, bank_staff(id,full_name,role)') .eq('id',assignmentId) .single(); if(error||!b){alert('Could not load bank/OT TIL record.');return;} const rawNotes=String(b.notes||''); const isOff=isTilOffNote(rawNotes); const timeMatch=rawNotes.match(/\[([0-9:]+)[^0-9]([0-9:]+)\]/); const startT=String(b.shift_start||timeMatch?.[1]||'07:00').slice(0,5); const untilT=String(b.shift_end||timeMatch?.[2]||'').slice(0,5); const extra=rawNotes.includes('—')?rawNotes.split('—').slice(1).join('—').trim():''; const name=b.bank_staff?.full_name||''; const role=cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role); document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit TIL Row

Editing the existing TIL log row — ${htmlSafe(b.work_date||'')}
${roleInputHtml('bank-til-edit-role',role)}${roleOptionsDatalist()}
`; openMo(); } async function saveBankTILEdit(assignmentId){ const name=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-role').value.trim()||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-date').value; const type=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-type').value; const start=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-start').value||'07:00'; const until=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-until').value; const extra=document.getElementById('bank-til-edit-extra').value.trim(); if(!name||!date||!until){alert('Please fill in full name, date and until time.');return;} const{data:current,error:loadError}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments') .select('id,bank_staff_id') .eq('id',assignmentId) .single(); if(loadError||!current){alert('Could not find the existing TIL row to update.');return;} if(!current.bank_staff_id){alert('This TIL row has no linked staff record. Please delete it and add it again.');return;} const{error:staffError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').update({full_name:name,role}).eq('id',current.bank_staff_id); if(staffError){alert('Could not update TIL staff name/role: '+staffError.message);return;} const[sh,sm]=start.split(':').map(Number);const[eh,em]=until.split(':').map(Number); const mins=(eh*60+(em||0))-(sh*60+(sm||0)); const hrs=mins>0?(mins/60).toFixed(1).replace('.0',''):'0'; const typeLabel=type==='off'?'TIL-Off':'TIL-In'; const tilNote=`${typeLabel}: ${hrs}h [${start}–${until}]${extra?' — '+extra:''}`; const{error}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').update({ work_date:date, shift_start:start, shift_end:until, notes:tilNote }).eq('id',assignmentId); if(error){alert('Could not update TIL record: '+error.message);return;} closeModal(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'))loadAppts(); } async function deleteBankTILFromEdit(assignmentId){ closeModal(); await delOT(assignmentId); } function openTILLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=tilLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this TIL row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} const duplicateText=g.ids.length>1?`
This display row merges ${g.ids.length} duplicate TIL rows for the same staff/date/type. Saving updates all merged rows.
`:''; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit TIL Row

Monthly roster TIL log row — ${htmlSafe(g.date||'')}
${duplicateText}
${roleInputHtml('til-group-role',g.role)}${roleOptionsDatalist()}
`; openMo(); } async function saveTILLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=tilLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this TIL row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} const name=document.getElementById('til-group-name').value.trim(); const role=document.getElementById('til-group-role').value.trim()||'Staff Nurse'; const date=document.getElementById('til-group-date').value; const type=document.getElementById('til-group-type').value; const start=document.getElementById('til-group-start').value||'07:00'; const until=document.getElementById('til-group-until').value; const extra=document.getElementById('til-group-extra').value.trim(); if(!name||!date||!until){alert('Please fill in full name, date and until time.');return;} const[sh,sm]=start.split(':').map(Number);const[eh,em]=until.split(':').map(Number); const mins=(eh*60+(em||0))-(sh*60+(sm||0)); const hrs=mins>0?(mins/60).toFixed(1).replace('.0',''):'0'; const typeLabel=type==='off'?'TIL-Off':'TIL-In'; const tilNote=`${typeLabel}: ${hrs}h [${start}–${until}]${extra?' — '+extra:''}`; if(g.staffIds.length){ const{error:staffError}=await SB.from('staff').update({full_name:name,role}).in('id',g.staffIds); if(staffError){alert('Could not update TIL core staff name/role: '+staffError.message);return;} } if(g.bankStaffIds.length){ const{error:bankStaffError}=await SB.from('bank_staff').update({full_name:name,role}).in('id',g.bankStaffIds); if(bankStaffError){alert('Could not update TIL staff name/role: '+bankStaffError.message);return;} } if(g.coreIds.length){ const{error:coreError}=await SB.from('leave_records').update({start_date:date,end_date:date,leave_type:'overtime',notes:tilNote}).in('id',g.coreIds); if(coreError){alert('Could not update TIL leave row: '+coreError.message);return;} } if(g.bankIds.length){ const{error:bankError}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').update({work_date:date,shift_start:start,shift_end:until,notes:tilNote}).in('id',g.bankIds); if(bankError){alert('Could not update TIL bank row: '+bankError.message);return;} } closeModal(); await loadStaff(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'))loadAppts(); } async function deleteTILLogGroup(groupKey){ const g=tilLogGroups[groupKey]; if(!g){alert('Could not find this TIL row. Refresh the roster and try again.');return;} if(!confirm('Delete this TIL row?'))return; closeModal(); if(g.coreIds.length)await SB.from('leave_records').delete().in('id',g.coreIds); if(g.bankIds.length)await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').delete().in('id',g.bankIds); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); } // SHIFT MODAL function openShift(staffId,staffName,date){ const hol=isHol(date),entry=rCache[`${staffId}_${date}`]; selCode=entry?entry.status:defaultCode(staffList.find(s=>s.id===staffId),date); const shiftCodes=SHIFT_MODAL_CODES; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Update Shift / Add Hourly Leave

${htmlSafe(staffName)} — ${date}${hol?`  🇲🇹 ${htmlSafe(hol)}`:''}
Full-day change
${shiftCodes.map(c=>`
${c.l}
${c.s}
`).join('')}
Add hourly leave
Use this for 1 hour leave, 2 hours leave, short vacation leave, sick leave hours, maternity hours, or study leave hours. This does not change the whole shift.
`; openMo(); } function pickCode(v,el){selCode=v;document.querySelectorAll('.sp-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('selected'));el.classList.add('selected');} async function saveShift(staffId,date){ const notes=document.getElementById('snotes').value.trim(); await SB.from('roster').upsert({staff_id:staffId,roster_date:date,status:selCode,notes},{onConflict:'staff_id,roster_date'}); await mirrorShiftToPhase2(staffId,date,selCode,notes); // Keep Staff Audit aligned with roster changes. // Only delete records auto-created by the roster, never manually entered records. await SB.from('leave_records') .delete() .eq('staff_id',staffId) .eq('start_date',date) .eq('end_date',date) .like('notes','Auto roster:%'); const leaveTypes=['sick_leave','maternity_leave','study_leave','annual_leave']; if(leaveTypes.includes(selCode)){ const label=LEAVE_LABELS[selCode]||selCode; const autoNote=`Auto roster: ${label}${notes?' — '+notes:''}`; await SB.from('leave_records').insert({ staff_id:staffId, leave_type:selCode, start_date:date, end_date:date, notes:autoNote }); await mirrorFullDayLeaveToPhase2(staffId,date,selCode,autoNote); } closeModal();renderRoster();loadStaffAudit();if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); } async function saveHourlyLeave(staffId,date){ const type=document.getElementById('hourly-leave-type')?.value||'annual_leave'; const start=document.getElementById('hourly-leave-start')?.value||'07:00'; const hours=Number(document.getElementById('hourly-leave-hours')?.value||1); const rawNotes=document.getElementById('hourly-leave-notes')?.value.trim()||''; if(!staffId||!date||!start||!hours||hours<=0){alert('Please choose leave type, start time and hours.');return;} const end=addMinutesToTime(start,hours*60); const label=LEAVE_LABELS[type]||'Leave'; const hourWord=hours===1?'hour':'hours'; const notes=`Hourly leave: ${label} — ${hours} ${hourWord} leave (${start}–${end})${rawNotes?' — '+rawNotes:''}`; const payload={ staff_id:staffId, leave_type:type, start_date:date, end_date:date, start_time:start, end_time:end, total_hours:hours, notes }; try{ const {error}=await SB.from('leave_records').insert(payload); if(error){ const fallback=await SB.from('leave_records').insert({staff_id:staffId,leave_type:type,start_date:date,end_date:date,notes}); if(fallback.error)throw new Error(fallback.error.message); } await mirrorHourlyLeaveToPhase2(staffId,date,type,start,end,hours,notes); alert(`${hours} ${hourWord} ${label.toLowerCase()} saved on the calendar.`); closeModal(); renderRoster(); loadStaffAudit(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); }catch(e){ alert('Could not save hourly leave: '+(e?.message||String(e))+'. Run the v24 SQL if you have not done so.'); } } // APPOINTMENTS — IMPORTED FROM STOMA ROSTER v30AG, ADAPTED FOR DASHBOARD v51 function initAppts(){ const d=document.getElementById('appt-date'); if(d&&!d.value)d.value=TODAY; syncApptMonthYearFilters(); loadAppts(); } function syncApptMonthYearFilters(){ const dateEl=document.getElementById('appt-date'); const monthEl=document.getElementById('appt-month-filter'); const yearEl=document.getElementById('appt-year-filter'); const dateStr=dateEl?.value||TODAY; if(monthEl)monthEl.value=String(dateStr).slice(5,7); if(yearEl)yearEl.value=String(dateStr).slice(0,4); } function applyApptMonthYearFilter(){ const dateEl=document.getElementById('appt-date'); const monthEl=document.getElementById('appt-month-filter'); const yearEl=document.getElementById('appt-year-filter'); if(!dateEl||!monthEl||!yearEl)return; const year=Number(yearEl.value)||new Date().getFullYear(); const month=Number(monthEl.value)||1; const current=new Date((dateEl.value||TODAY)+'T12:00:00'); const maxDay=new Date(year,month,0).getDate(); const day=String(Math.min(current.getDate()||1,maxDay)).padStart(2,'0'); dateEl.value=`${year}-${String(month).padStart(2,'0')}-${day}`; loadAppts(); } function apptChangeDay(dir){ const el=document.getElementById('appt-date'); if(!el)return; const d=new Date((el.value||TODAY)+'T12:00:00'); d.setDate(d.getDate()+dir); el.value=fmt(d); syncApptMonthYearFilters(); loadAppts(); } function normStaffNameForAppts(name){return String(name||'').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();} function findCoreStaffByName(name){ const n=normStaffNameForAppts(name); if(!n)return null; return (staffList||[]).find(st=>normStaffNameForAppts(st.full_name)===n)||null; } function normaliseCoreOTMatchName(name){ return normStaffNameForAppts(String(name||'') .replace(/\bcore\s*ot\b/gi,' ') .replace(/\bovertime\b/gi,' ') .replace(/\bot\s*nurse\b/gi,' ') .replace(/\bot\b/gi,' ') .replace(/\bbank\s*staff\b/gi,' ') ); } function findCoreStaffByNameFlexible(name){ const exact=findCoreStaffByName(name); if(exact)return exact; const n=normaliseCoreOTMatchName(name); if(!n)return null; return (staffList||[]).find(st=>{ const s=normaliseCoreOTMatchName(st.full_name); return s===n || (n.includes(s)&&s.length>=5) || (s.includes(n)&&n.length>=5); })||null; } function isTILNote(notes){ const n=String(notes||''); return n.startsWith('TIL-Off')||n.startsWith('TIL-In'); } function appointmentStatusText(status){return {booked:'Booked',attended:'Seen / Attended',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'DNTU'}[status]||status||'—';} function followupMonthName(m){ const names={1:'January',2:'February',3:'March',4:'April',5:'May',6:'June',7:'July',8:'August',9:'September',10:'October',11:'November',12:'December'}; return names[Number(m)]||'No Due Month'; } function appointmentFollowupStatusBadge(status){ const st=String(status||'').trim(); if(!st||st==='active'||st==='Active')return ''; const label=st.replace(/_/g,' ').replace(/\b\w/g,c=>c.toUpperCase()); return `${htmlSafe(label)}`; } function patientKey(source,id){return `${source||'project'}:${id||''}`;} function parsePatientKey(value){ const raw=String(value||''); if(raw.includes(':')){const [source,...rest]=raw.split(':');return {source:source||'project',id:rest.join(':')};} return {source:'project',id:raw}; } function normaliseProjectPatientForAppointment(p){ if(!p)return null; return { id:p.id, first_name:p.first_name||'', surname:p.surname||'', id_card:p.id_card_number||p.hospital_number||'', phone_number:p.mobile_number||p.home_number||'', followup_owner:p.allocated_nurse||p.followup_owner||'', followup_due_month:p.followup_due_month||'', followup_year:p.followup_year||'', followup_status:p.followup_status||'', _source:'project' }; } function normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(p){ if(!p)return null; return { id:p.id, first_name:p.first_name||'', surname:p.surname||'', id_card:p.id_card||p.id_card_number||'', phone_number:p.phone_number||p.mobile_number||p.home_number||'', followup_owner:p.followup_owner||'', followup_due_month:p.followup_due_month||'', followup_year:p.followup_year||'', followup_status:p.followup_status||'', _source:'legacy' }; } async function getProjectPatientForAppointment(id){ if(!id)return null; try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number,hospital_number,mobile_number,home_number,allocated_nurse,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').eq('id',id).maybeSingle(); if(error)return null; return normaliseProjectPatientForAppointment(data); }catch(e){return null;} } async function getLegacyPatientForAppointment(id){ if(!id)return null; try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').eq('id',id).maybeSingle(); if(error)return null; return normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(data); }catch(e){return null;} } async function enrichLegacyAppointmentRows(rows){ const base=(rows||[]).map(r=>({...r,_source:'legacy'})); const patientIds=[...new Set(base.map(a=>a.patient_id).filter(Boolean).map(String))]; const staffIds=[...new Set(base.map(a=>a.assigned_to).filter(Boolean).map(String))]; const bankIds=[...new Set(base.map(a=>a.bank_staff_id).filter(Boolean).map(String))]; const pmap={},smap={},bmap={}; if(patientIds.length){ try{ const{data}=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').in('id',patientIds); (data||[]).forEach(p=>pmap[String(p.id)]=normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(p)); }catch(e){} const missing=patientIds.filter(id=>!pmap[id]); if(missing.length){ try{ const{data}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number,hospital_number,mobile_number,home_number,allocated_nurse,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').in('id',missing); (data||[]).forEach(p=>pmap[String(p.id)]=normaliseProjectPatientForAppointment(p)); }catch(e){} } } if(staffIds.length){try{const{data}=await SB.from('staff').select('id,full_name,role').in('id',staffIds);(data||[]).forEach(s=>smap[String(s.id)]=s);}catch(e){}} if(bankIds.length){try{const{data}=await SB.from('bank_staff').select('id,full_name,role').in('id',bankIds);(data||[]).forEach(b=>bmap[String(b.id)]=b);}catch(e){}} return base.map(a=>({...a,patients:a.patient_id?pmap[String(a.patient_id)]||null:null,staff:a.assigned_to?smap[String(a.assigned_to)]||null:null,bank_staff:a.bank_staff_id?bmap[String(a.bank_staff_id)]||null:null})); } async function getDashboardAppointmentsOnDate(date){ let projectRows=[]; try{projectRows=(await getAppointmentsOnDate(date)).map(a=>({...a,_source:'project'}));}catch(e){console.warn('Project appointment load skipped:',e?.message||e);} let legacyRows=[]; try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').eq('appt_date',date).order('appt_slot'); if(!error)legacyRows=await enrichLegacyAppointmentRows(data||[]); }catch(e){/* old roster table may not exist in newer installs */} const merged=new Map(); projectRows.forEach(a=>merged.set(String(a.id),a)); legacyRows.forEach(a=>{if(!merged.has(String(a.id)))merged.set(String(a.id),a);}); return [...merged.values()].sort((a,b)=>String(a.appt_slot||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_slot||''))); } async function getDashboardAppointmentById(id){ try{ const raw=await getAppointmentById(id); const enriched=(await enrichAppointments([raw]))[0]||raw; return {...enriched,_source:'project'}; }catch(e){} try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').eq('id',id).single(); if(error)throw error; const rows=await enrichLegacyAppointmentRows([data]); return rows[0]||{...data,_source:'legacy'}; }catch(e){throw e;} } async function insertDashboardAppointment(payload,source='project'){ if(source==='legacy'){ const{data,error}=await SB.from('appointments').insert(payload).select('*').single(); if(error)throw error; return data; } try{return await insertProjectAppointment(payload);}catch(e){ const msg=String(e?.message||'').toLowerCase(); if(msg.includes('outpatient_appointments')||msg.includes('relation')||msg.includes('does not exist')){ const{data,error}=await SB.from('appointments').insert(payload).select('*').single(); if(error)throw error; return data; } throw e; } } async function updateDashboardAppointment(id,payload,source='project'){ if(source==='legacy'){ const{error}=await SB.from('appointments').update(payload).eq('id',id); if(error)throw error; return; } try{return await updateProjectAppointment(id,payload);}catch(e){ const{error}=await SB.from('appointments').update(payload).eq('id',id); if(error)throw e; } } async function setDashboardAppointmentStatus(id,status){ const appt=await getDashboardAppointmentById(id); if(appt?._source==='legacy'){ const{error}=await SB.from('appointments').update({status}).eq('id',id); if(error)throw error; }else{ await setProjectAppointmentStatus(id,status); } } async function deleteDashboardAppointment(id){ const appt=await getDashboardAppointmentById(id); if(appt?._source==='legacy'){ const{error}=await SB.from('appointments').delete().eq('id',id); if(error)throw error; }else{ await deleteProjectAppointment(id); } } function appointmentMatchesNurseColumn(a,n){ if(!a||!n)return false; if(n.type==='common') return !a.assigned_to && !a.bank_staff_id; if(n.type==='core-ot') return String(a.assigned_to||'')===String(n.id||'') || (n.bankId && String(a.bank_staff_id||'')===String(n.bankId)); if(n.type==='ot'||n.type==='ot-booked') return String(a.bank_staff_id||'')===String(n.id||'') || String(a.assigned_to||'')===String(n.id||''); return String(a.assigned_to||'')===String(n.id||''); } function appointmentsForSlotAndColumn(appts,slot,n){ return (appts||[]).filter(a=>String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)===slot && appointmentMatchesNurseColumn(a,n)); } function visiblePatientContactHTML(patient){ const id=htmlSafe(patient?.id_card||'No ID'); const phone=htmlSafe(patient?.phone_number||'No phone'); return `
ID${id} Tel☎ ${phone}
`; } function cancelledSlotHistoryHTML(cancelledRows){ const rows=cancelledRows||[]; if(!rows.length)return ''; const shown=rows.slice(0,5).map(a=>{ const nm=`${a.patients?.first_name||''} ${a.patients?.surname||''}`.trim()||'Patient'; const id=a.patients?.id_card?htmlSafe(a.patients.id_card):'No ID'; const phone=a.patients?.phone_number?htmlSafe(a.patients.phone_number):'No phone'; return `
CANCELLED ${htmlSafe(nm)}
ID ${id} · ☎ ${phone}
`; }).join(''); const more=rows.length>5?`
+ ${rows.length-5} more cancelled record${rows.length-5!==1?'s':''} kept
`:''; return `
Cancelled history kept — slot can still be rebooked
${shown}${more}
`; } async function loadAppts(){ const date=document.getElementById('appt-date')?.value; if(!date)return; syncApptMonthYearFilters(); const{data:rd}=await SB.from('roster').select('*').eq('roster_date',date); const{data:otToday}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').select('*, bank_staff(id,full_name)').eq('work_date',date); const{data:tilIn}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*, staff(id,full_name)').eq('leave_type','overtime').like('notes','TIL-In:%').eq('start_date',date); const{data:coreOTTodayRaw}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*, staff(id,full_name)').eq('leave_type','overtime').eq('start_date',date); const coreOTToday=(coreOTTodayRaw||[]).filter(r=>!isTILNote(r.notes)); const{data:tilOff}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('staff_id').eq('leave_type','overtime').like('notes','TIL-Off:%').eq('start_date',date); const offIds=new Set((tilOff||[]).map(t=>String(t.staff_id))); const OFF_ST=['off','sick_leave','maternity_leave','study_leave','annual_leave','public_holiday']; const appts=await getDashboardAppointmentsOnDate(date); const nurses=[]; const nursePriority={common:0,core:1,til:2,ot:3,'ot-booked':3,'core-ot':4,absent:1}; const addNurse=(n)=>{ if(!n)return; if(n.type==='common'){ if(!nurses.some(x=>x.type==='common'))nurses.push(n); return; } const existing=nurses.find(x=>x.type!=='common' && ( String(x.id||'')===String(n.id||'') || (x.bankId && n.bankId && String(x.bankId)===String(n.bankId)) || (x.bankId && String(x.bankId)===String(n.id||'')) || (n.bankId && String(n.bankId)===String(x.id||'')) )); if(!existing){nurses.push(n);return;} if((nursePriority[n.type]||0)>(nursePriority[existing.type]||0)){ existing.type=n.type; } if(n.bankId)existing.bankId=n.bankId; if(n.name)existing.name=n.name; }; for(const st of staffList||[]){ if(offIds.has(String(st.id)))continue; const e=(rd||[]).find(r=>String(r.staff_id)===String(st.id)); if(e){ if(!OFF_ST.includes(e.status))addNurse({id:st.id,name:st.full_name,type:'core'}); }else if(defaultCode(st,date)==='working'){ addNurse({id:st.id,name:st.full_name,type:'core'}); } } for(const t of(tilIn||[])){ if(t.staff?.full_name)addNurse({id:t.staff_id,name:t.staff.full_name,type:'til'}); } for(const o of(coreOTToday||[])){ if(o.staff?.full_name)addNurse({id:o.staff_id,name:o.staff.full_name,type:'core-ot'}); } for(const b of(otToday||[])){ if(b.bank_staff?.full_name){ const core=findCoreStaffByNameFlexible(b.bank_staff.full_name); if(core)addNurse({id:core.id,bankId:b.bank_staff.id,name:core.full_name,type:'core-ot'}); else addNurse({id:b.bank_staff.id,name:b.bank_staff.full_name,type:'ot'}); } } for(const a of(appts||[]).filter(x=>x.status!=='cancelled')){ if(a.assigned_to && !nurses.some(n=>String(n.id)===String(a.assigned_to))){ const coreStaff=(staffList||[]).find(s=>String(s.id)===String(a.assigned_to)); addNurse({id:a.assigned_to,name:coreStaff?.full_name||a.staff?.full_name||'Booked Nurse',type:'absent'}); } if(a.bank_staff_id && !nurses.some(n=>String(n.id||'')===String(a.bank_staff_id) || String(n.bankId||'')===String(a.bank_staff_id))){ addNurse({id:a.bank_staff_id,name:a.bank_staff?.full_name||'Booked OT/Bank Staff',type:'ot-booked'}); } } nurses.push({id:'common',name:'Common',type:'common'}); const workingCount=nurses.filter(n=>!['common','absent','ot-booked'].includes(n.type)).length; const extraCount=nurses.filter(n=>['absent','ot-booked'].includes(n.type)).length; const badge=document.getElementById('sbadge'); if(badge){ badge.textContent=`${workingCount} nurse${workingCount!==1?'s':''} working${extraCount?` · ${extraCount} booked column${extraCount!==1?'s':''} shown`:''}`; badge.className='sbadge '+(workingCount>=2?'sb-ok':workingCount===1?'sb-warn':'sb-none'); } const booked=(appts||[]).filter(a=>a.status!=='cancelled').length; const summary=document.getElementById('appt-slot-summary'); if(summary)summary.textContent=`${booked} patients booked`; const con=document.getElementById('slots-container'); if(!con)return; let html=''; html+=''; nurses.forEach(n=>{ let nbadge=''; if(n.type==='ot') nbadge='Overtime'; else if(n.type==='core-ot') nbadge='Overtime'; else if(n.type==='til') nbadge='TIL'; else if(n.type==='common') nbadge='General'; else if(n.type==='absent'||n.type==='ot-booked') nbadge='Booked / Not Working'; html+=``; }); html+=''; SLOTS.forEach(slot=>{ html+=``; nurses.forEach(n=>{ const slotAppts=appointmentsForSlotAndColumn(appts,slot,n); const appt=slotAppts.find(a=>a.status!=='cancelled'); const cancelledHere=slotAppts.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled'); const cellBg=n.type==='common'?'#fafafa':(n.type==='absent'||n.type==='ot-booked')?'#fff5f5':'#fff'; if(appt){ const bg={booked:'#f0faf9',attended:'#d4edda',cancelled:'#fff5f5',did_not_attend:'#fff3cd'}[appt.status]||'#f0faf9'; const nm=`${appt.patients?.first_name||''} ${appt.patients?.surname||''}`.trim(); html+=``; }else if(n.type==='absent'||n.type==='ot-booked'){ html+=``; }else{ html+=``; } }); html+=''; }); html+='
${htmlSafe(n.name)}${nbadge}
${slot}
${htmlSafe(nm||'Patient')}
${visiblePatientContactHTML(appt.patients)} ${(n.type==='absent'||n.type==='ot-booked')?'
⚠ Nurse not rostered today
':''}
${appointmentStatusText(appt.status)}
${appointmentFollowupStatusBadge(appt.patients?.followup_status)} ${cancelledSlotHistoryHTML(cancelledHere)}
${appt.status!=='attended'?``:''} ${appt.status!=='did_not_attend'?``:''} ${appt.status!=='cancelled'?``:''}
${slot}
Not rostered
 ${cancelledSlotHistoryHTML(cancelledHere)}
'; con.innerHTML=html; } async function refreshAppointmentViews(){ const apptSectionActive=document.getElementById('section-appointments')?.classList.contains('active') || document.getElementById('page-appointments')?.classList.contains('active'); if(apptSectionActive || document.getElementById('slots-container')) loadAppts(); if(typeof loadTodaySnapshot==='function')loadTodaySnapshot(); if(document.getElementById('section-clinic-audit')?.classList.contains('active')||document.getElementById('page-clinic-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadClinicAudit(); if(document.getElementById('section-reports')?.classList.contains('active')||document.getElementById('page-reports')?.classList.contains('active'))loadReports(); if(document.getElementById('section-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active')||document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); if(document.getElementById('section-home')?.classList.contains('active')&&typeof loadHomeDashboard==='function')loadHomeDashboard(); } async function setAS(id,status){ try{ await setDashboardAppointmentStatus(id,status); await refreshAppointmentViews(); }catch(e){ alert('Appointment status did not update: '+(e?.message||String(e))); } } async function delApp(id){ if(!confirm('Delete this appointment?'))return; try{ await deleteDashboardAppointment(id); await refreshAppointmentViews(); }catch(e){ alert('Appointment was not deleted: '+(e?.message||String(e))); } } async function editAppointment(id){ let enriched; try{enriched=await getDashboardAppointmentById(id);}catch(error){alert('Could not load this appointment for editing.');return;} const{data:bankRows}=await SB.from('bank_staff').select('id,full_name,role').order('full_name'); const currentNurse=enriched.bank_staff_id?`bank:${enriched.bank_staff_id}`:(enriched.assigned_to?`core:${enriched.assigned_to}`:'common'); const coreOptions=(staffList||[]).map(s=>``).join(''); const bankOptions=(bankRows||[]).map(b=>``).join(''); const slotOptions=SLOTS.map(s=>``).join(''); document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Edit Appointment

Correct patient, date, time, nurse/column, or outcome.
`; openMo(); } async function saveEditedAppointment(apptId,patientId,source='project'){ const fn=document.getElementById('e-fn').value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('e-sn').value.trim(); const idcard=normaliseIdCard(document.getElementById('e-idcard').value); const phone=document.getElementById('e-phone').value.trim(); const date=document.getElementById('e-date').value; const slot=document.getElementById('e-slot').value; const nurse=document.getElementById('e-nurse').value; const status=document.getElementById('e-status').value; if(!fn||!sn||!idcard||!date||!slot){alert('Please fill in first name, surname, ID card, date and time.');return;} let finalPatientId=patientId; if(source==='legacy'){ if(finalPatientId){ const{error:pErr}=await SB.from('patients').update({first_name:fn,surname:sn,id_card:idcard,phone_number:phone||null}).eq('id',finalPatientId); if(pErr){alert('Patient update error: '+pErr.message);return;} } }else{ try{finalPatientId=await findOrCreateAppointmentPatient(fn,sn,idcard,phone);}catch(e){alert('Patient update error: '+(e?.message||String(e)));return;} } const apptUpdate={patient_id:finalPatientId,appt_date:date,appt_slot:slot,assigned_to:null,bank_staff_id:null,status}; if(nurse.startsWith('core:')) apptUpdate.assigned_to=nurse.replace('core:',''); if(nurse.startsWith('bank:')) apptUpdate.bank_staff_id=nurse.replace('bank:',''); try{await updateDashboardAppointment(apptId,apptUpdate,source);}catch(e){alert('Appointment update error: '+(e?.message||String(e)));return;} closeModal(); refreshAppointmentViews(); } function openSnapshotAppointmentEdit(apptId){return editAppointment(apptId);} function saveSnapshotAppointmentEdit(apptId,patientId){return saveEditedAppointment(apptId,patientId,'project');} async function searchPatientsForRebook(){ const input=document.getElementById('patient-rebook-search'); const box=document.getElementById('patient-rebook-results'); const q=(input?.value||'').trim().toLowerCase(); if(!box)return; if(q.length<2){box.innerHTML='';return;} box.innerHTML='
Searching patients...
'; const matches=[]; try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number,hospital_number,mobile_number,home_number,allocated_nurse,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').order('surname',{ascending:true}).limit(900); if(!error)(data||[]).map(normaliseProjectPatientForAppointment).filter(Boolean).forEach(p=>matches.push(p)); }catch(e){} try{ const{data,error}=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').order('surname',{ascending:true}).limit(900); if(!error)(data||[]).map(normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment).filter(Boolean).forEach(p=>matches.push(p)); }catch(e){} const filtered=matches.filter(p=>[ p.first_name,p.surname,p.id_card,p.phone_number,`${p.first_name||''} ${p.surname||''}` ].join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,20); if(!filtered.length){box.innerHTML='
No matching patients found.
';return;} const projectIds=filtered.filter(p=>p._source==='project').map(p=>p.id); const legacyIds=filtered.filter(p=>p._source==='legacy').map(p=>p.id); let appts=[]; if(projectIds.length){ try{ const{data}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').in('patient_id',projectIds).order('appt_date',{ascending:false}).order('appt_slot',{ascending:false}); appts=appts.concat((await enrichAppointments(data||[])).map(a=>({...a,_source:'project'}))); }catch(e){} } if(legacyIds.length){ try{ const{data}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').in('patient_id',legacyIds).order('appt_date',{ascending:false}).order('appt_slot',{ascending:false}); appts=appts.concat(await enrichLegacyAppointmentRows(data||[])); }catch(e){} } box.innerHTML=filtered.map(p=>{ const nm=`${p.first_name||''} ${p.surname||''}`.trim()||'Patient'; const latest=appts.find(a=>String(a.patient_id)===String(p.id) && (a._source||'project')===p._source); const latestText=latest?`${latest.appt_date} ${String(latest.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)} · ${appointmentStatusText(latest.status)}`:'No appointment history'; const owner=p.followup_owner?` · Owner: ${htmlSafe(p.followup_owner)}`:''; const due=p.followup_due_month?` · Due: ${followupMonthName(p.followup_due_month)} ${htmlSafe(p.followup_year||'')}`:''; const sourceLabel=p._source==='legacy'?'Roster history':'Dashboard registry'; return `
${htmlSafe(nm)}
ID: ${htmlSafe(p.id_card||'—')} · Phone: ${htmlSafe(p.phone_number||'—')}${owner}${due} · ${sourceLabel}
Latest: ${htmlSafe(latestText)}
`; }).join(''); } function clearPatientRebookSearch(){ const input=document.getElementById('patient-rebook-search'); const box=document.getElementById('patient-rebook-results'); if(input)input.value=''; if(box)box.innerHTML=''; } async function openPatientRebookModal(patientKeyValue){ const parsed=parsePatientKey(patientKeyValue); const pat=parsed.source==='legacy'?await getLegacyPatientForAppointment(parsed.id):await getProjectPatientForAppointment(parsed.id); if(!pat){alert('Could not open this patient for rebooking.');return;} const nurseOptions=await buildNurseAllocationOptions('common','common'); const slotOptions=SLOTS.map(s=>``).join(''); const nm=`${pat.first_name||''} ${pat.surname||''}`.trim()||'Patient'; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Rebook Patient

${htmlSafe(nm)} · ${htmlSafe(pat.id_card||'No ID')} · ${htmlSafe(pat.phone_number||'No phone')}
This creates a new booked appointment and keeps the full patient history.
`; openMo(); } async function savePatientRebook(patientKeyValue){ const parsed=parsePatientKey(patientKeyValue); const date=document.getElementById('rb-date')?.value; const slot=document.getElementById('rb-slot')?.value; const nurse=document.getElementById('rb-nurse')?.value||'common'; if(!date||!slot){alert('Please select appointment date and time.');return;} const payload={patient_id:parsed.id,appt_date:date,appt_slot:slot,assigned_to:null,bank_staff_id:null,status:'booked'}; if(nurse.startsWith('core:'))payload.assigned_to=nurse.replace('core:',''); if(nurse.startsWith('bank:'))payload.bank_staff_id=nurse.replace('bank:',''); try{await insertDashboardAppointment(payload,parsed.source==='legacy'?'legacy':'project');} catch(e){ const msg=String(e?.message||''); if(msg.toLowerCase().includes('duplicate')||msg.toLowerCase().includes('unique')){ alert('Rebook blocked by a database slot rule. The cancelled records are kept, but Supabase still has a unique slot constraint. Run the cancelled-slot SQL fix if this happens.'); }else{ alert('Could not rebook appointment: '+msg); } return; } closeModal(); alert('✅ Patient rebooked successfully.'); refreshAppointmentViews(); searchPatientsForRebook(); } async function openFollowupHistory(patientKeyValue){ const parsed=parsePatientKey(patientKeyValue); const pat=parsed.source==='legacy'?await getLegacyPatientForAppointment(parsed.id):await getProjectPatientForAppointment(parsed.id); let appts=[]; if(parsed.source==='legacy'){ try{const{data}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').eq('patient_id',parsed.id).order('appt_date',{ascending:false}).order('appt_slot',{ascending:false});appts=await enrichLegacyAppointmentRows(data||[]);}catch(e){} }else{ try{appts=(await getAppointmentsForPatient(parsed.id)).map(a=>({...a,_source:'project'}));}catch(e){} } const nm=`${pat?.first_name||''} ${pat?.surname||''}`.trim()||'Patient'; const rows=appts.length?appts.map(a=>` ${htmlSafe(a.appt_date||'')}${htmlSafe(String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5))} ${htmlSafe(a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':'—'))} ${appointmentStatusText(a.status)} `).join(''):'No appointment history found'; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Follow-up History

${htmlSafe(nm)} · ${htmlSafe(pat?.id_card||'No ID')} · ${htmlSafe(pat?.phone_number||'No phone')}
${rows}
DateTimeSeen ByOutcome
`; openMo(); } function normaliseIdCard(v){return String(v||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,'');} async function lookupPatientByIdForBooking(idInputId,firstInputId,surnameInputId,phoneInputId,noteId){ const idEl=document.getElementById(idInputId); const note=document.getElementById(noteId); if(!idEl)return null; const id=normaliseIdCard(idEl.value); idEl.value=id; if(!id){ if(note){note.className='registry-lookup-note';note.textContent='Enter the ID card first. Existing patients will auto-fill and keep their history.';} idEl.dataset.patientId=''; return null; } if(note){note.className='registry-lookup-note';note.textContent='Checking saved patient registry...';} let found=null; try{ let res=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number,hospital_number,mobile_number,home_number').eq('id_card_number',id).maybeSingle(); if(!res.data)res=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number,hospital_number,mobile_number,home_number').eq('hospital_number',id).maybeSingle(); if(res.data)found=normaliseProjectPatientForAppointment(res.data); }catch(e){} if(!found){ try{ const{data}=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number').ilike('id_card',id).maybeSingle(); if(data)found=normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(data); }catch(e){} } if(found?.id){ const f=document.getElementById(firstInputId),s=document.getElementById(surnameInputId),p=document.getElementById(phoneInputId); if(f)f.value=found.first_name||''; if(s)s.value=found.surname||''; if(p)p.value=found.phone_number||''; idEl.dataset.patientId=found.id; if(note){note.className='registry-lookup-note found';note.textContent=`Saved patient found: ${(found.first_name||'')} ${(found.surname||'')}. This booking will be added to the dashboard appointment history.`;} return found; } idEl.dataset.patientId=''; if(note){note.className='registry-lookup-note new';note.textContent='No saved patient found for this ID card. A new patient record will be saved when you book.';} return null; } function isMissingPatientsMainError(error){ const msg=String(error?.message||error||'').toLowerCase(); return msg.includes('patients_main') && (msg.includes('could not find') || msg.includes('schema cache') || msg.includes('does not exist') || msg.includes('relation')); } async function saveOrUpdateLegacyPatientByIdCard(idCard,firstName,surname,phone){ const id=normaliseIdCard(idCard); if(!id||!firstName||!surname)return {patient:null,error:{message:'Missing patient details.'}}; try{ const existing=await SB.from('patients') .select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status') .ilike('id_card',id) .maybeSingle(); if(existing.error)return {patient:null,error:existing.error}; if(existing.data?.id){ const updatePayload={first_name:firstName,surname:surname,phone_number:phone||existing.data.phone_number||null,id_card:id}; const updated=await SB.from('patients').update(updatePayload).eq('id',existing.data.id).select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').single(); if(updated.error)return {patient:normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(existing.data),error:updated.error}; return {patient:normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(updated.data||existing.data),error:null}; } const inserted=await SB.from('patients').insert({first_name:firstName,surname:surname,id_card:id,phone_number:phone||null}).select('id,first_name,surname,id_card,phone_number,followup_owner,followup_due_month,followup_year,followup_status').single(); if(inserted.error)return {patient:null,error:inserted.error}; return {patient:normaliseLegacyPatientForAppointment(inserted.data),error:null}; }catch(error){return {patient:null,error};} } async function saveOrUpdatePatientByIdCard(idCard,firstName,surname,phone){ const id=normaliseIdCard(idCard); if(!id||!firstName||!surname)return {patient:null,error:{message:'Missing patient details.'}}; try{ const patientId=await findOrCreateAppointmentPatient(firstName,surname,id,phone); const patient=await getProjectPatientForAppointment(patientId); if(patient?.id)return {patient,error:null}; return {patient:{id:patientId,first_name:firstName,surname,id_card:id,phone_number:phone||'',_source:'project'},error:null}; }catch(error){ if(isMissingPatientsMainError(error)){ return await saveOrUpdateLegacyPatientByIdCard(id,firstName,surname,phone); } return {patient:null,error}; } } async function buildNurseAllocationOptions(selectedType,selectedId){ const{data:bankRows}=await SB.from('bank_staff').select('id,full_name,role').order('full_name'); let selected='common'; if(selectedType==='ot'||selectedType==='ot-booked') selected=`bank:${selectedId}`; else if(selectedType==='common') selected='common'; else if(selectedId&&selectedId!=='undefined') selected=`core:${selectedId}`; const commonOpt=``; const coreOptions=(staffList||[]).map(s=>``).join(''); const bankOptions=(bankRows||[]).map(b=>``).join(''); return `${commonOpt}${coreOptions}${bankOptions}`; } async function bookSlot(slot,date,nid,nname,ntype){ const targetLabel=ntype==='common'?'Common column':`${nname}${ntype==='ot'?' (OT)':ntype==='til'?' (TIL In)':''}`; const nurseOptions=await buildNurseAllocationOptions(ntype,nid); document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=`

Book Patient

${htmlSafe(date)} - ${htmlSafe(slot)} · default column: ${htmlSafe(targetLabel)}
Choose the nurse/column manually before saving.
Enter the ID card first. Existing patients will auto-fill and keep their history.
The selected nurse/column will be used for this appointment. It will not change the patient follow-up owner unless you update that separately.
`; openMo(); } async function doBook(slot,date){ const fn=document.getElementById('p-fn').value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('p-sn').value.trim(); const id=normaliseIdCard(document.getElementById('p-id').value); const ph=document.getElementById('p-ph').value.trim(); if(!fn||!sn||!id){alert('Please enter the ID card first, then confirm first name and surname.');return;} const saved=await saveOrUpdatePatientByIdCard(id,fn,sn,ph); if(saved.error||!saved.patient?.id){alert('Error saving patient registry record: '+(saved.error?.message||''));return;} const pat=saved.patient; const manualNurse=document.getElementById('p-nurse')?.value||'common'; const payload={patient_id:pat.id,appt_date:date,appt_slot:String(slot).slice(0,5),assigned_to:null,bank_staff_id:null,status:'booked'}; if(manualNurse.startsWith('core:')) payload.assigned_to=manualNurse.replace('core:',''); if(manualNurse.startsWith('bank:')) payload.bank_staff_id=manualNurse.replace('bank:',''); const bookingSource=pat._source==='legacy'?'legacy':'project'; try{await insertDashboardAppointment(payload,bookingSource);} catch(error){ const msg=String(error?.message||''); if(msg.toLowerCase().includes('duplicate')||msg.toLowerCase().includes('unique')){ alert('Booking blocked by a database slot rule. The cancelled records are kept, but Supabase still has a unique slot constraint. Run the cancelled-slot SQL fix if this happens.'); }else{ alert('Booking error: '+msg); } return; } closeModal(); refreshAppointmentViews(); } // COD async function populateCODDropdowns(){ const{data:sd}=await SB.from('staff').select('*').eq('is_active',true); const opts=(sd||[]).map(s=>``).join(''); ['cod-n-staff','cod-h-staff','cod-s-staff'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.innerHTML=`${opts}`;}); const{data:hd}=await SB.from('public_holidays').select('*').order('holiday_date'); const holOpts=(hd||[]).map(h=>``).join(''); ['cod-h-off','cod-h-work'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.innerHTML=`${holOpts}`;}); const sundays=getSundays(60); const sunOpts=sundays.map(ds=>{const dt=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00');return``;}).join(''); ['cod-s-off','cod-s-work'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.innerHTML=`${sunOpts}`;}); } async function saveCOD(type){ let staffId,dayOff,dayWork,notes; if(type==='normal'){staffId=document.getElementById('cod-n-staff').value;dayOff=document.getElementById('cod-n-off').value;dayWork=document.getElementById('cod-n-work').value;notes=document.getElementById('cod-n-notes').value;} else if(type==='holiday'){staffId=document.getElementById('cod-h-staff').value;dayOff=document.getElementById('cod-h-off').value;dayWork=document.getElementById('cod-h-work').value;notes=document.getElementById('cod-h-notes').value;} else{staffId=document.getElementById('cod-s-staff').value;dayOff=document.getElementById('cod-s-off').value;dayWork=document.getElementById('cod-s-work').value;notes=document.getElementById('cod-s-notes').value;} if(!staffId||!dayOff||!dayWork){alert('Please fill in all required fields.');return;} if(dayOff===dayWork){alert('The two dates must be different.');return;} const typeLabel=type==='holiday'?'Holiday Swap':type==='sunday'?'Sunday Swap':'Normal Swap'; const noteTag=`COD-${type}: ${notes||typeLabel} [${dayOff}↔${dayWork}]`; await SB.from('roster').upsert({staff_id:staffId,roster_date:dayOff,status:'off',notes:noteTag+' [Day Off]'},{onConflict:'staff_id,roster_date'}); await mirrorShiftToPhase2(staffId,dayOff,'off',noteTag+' [Day Off]'); await SB.from('roster').upsert({staff_id:staffId,roster_date:dayWork,status:'working',notes:noteTag+' [Work Day]'},{onConflict:'staff_id,roster_date'}); await mirrorShiftToPhase2(staffId,dayWork,'working',noteTag+' [Work Day]'); if(type==='normal'){document.getElementById('cod-n-off').value='';document.getElementById('cod-n-work').value='';document.getElementById('cod-n-notes').value='';} else if(type==='holiday'){document.getElementById('cod-h-off').value='';document.getElementById('cod-h-work').value='';document.getElementById('cod-h-notes').value='';} else{document.getElementById('cod-s-off').value='';document.getElementById('cod-s-work').value='';document.getElementById('cod-s-notes').value='';} alert('✅ Change of duty recorded!'); loadCOD();renderRoster();if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); } async function loadCOD(){ const{data}=await SB.from('roster').select('*, staff(full_name,role)').like('notes','COD-%').order('created_at',{ascending:false}); renderCODTable('cod-tbody-normal',(data||[]).filter(r=>r.notes?.startsWith('COD-normal')),'No normal day swaps'); renderCODTable('cod-tbody-holiday',(data||[]).filter(r=>r.notes?.startsWith('COD-holiday')),'No holiday swaps'); renderCODTable('cod-tbody-sunday',(data||[]).filter(r=>r.notes?.startsWith('COD-sunday')),'No Sunday swaps'); } function renderCODTable(tbodyId,records,emptyMsg){ const tbody=document.getElementById(tbodyId); if(!records||!records.length){tbody.innerHTML=`${emptyMsg}`;return;} const pairs={}; records.forEach(r=>{const key=r.notes?.replace(' [Day Off]','').replace(' [Work Day]','');if(!pairs[key])pairs[key]={staff:r.staff,dayOff:null,dayWork:null,notes:r.notes,created:r.created_at};if(r.status==='off')pairs[key].dayOff=r.roster_date;if(r.status==='working')pairs[key].dayWork=r.roster_date;}); tbody.innerHTML=Object.values(pairs).map(p=>`${p.staff?.full_name}${p.dayOff||'—'}${p.dayWork||'—'}${p.notes?.split(':')[1]?.split('[')[0]?.trim()||'—'}${p.created?.split('T')[0]||'—'}`).join(''); } // STAFF AUDIT function toggleStaffAuditList(){ const list=document.getElementById('staff-detail-list'); const btn=document.getElementById('staff-list-toggle'); if(!list||!btn)return; const collapsed=list.classList.toggle('collapsed'); btn.textContent=collapsed?'Show detailed lists':'Hide detailed lists'; } function auditRecordDays(start,end,periodStart,periodEnd){ const out=[]; if(!start)return out; const s=new Date((startperiodEnd?periodEnd:(end||start))+'T12:00:00'); if(Number.isNaN(s.getTime())||Number.isNaN(e.getTime())||e{ const info=staffAuditTypeInfo(r); const name=r.staff?.full_name||'Unknown'; const time=auditTimeRangeFromRecord(r); const hours=r.total_hours?`${Number(r.total_hours).toString().replace(/\.0$/,'')}h`:''; auditRecordDays(r.start_date,r.end_date,startFilter,endFilter).forEach(ds=>{ entries.push({date:ds,name,typeKey:info.key,typeLabel:info.label,time,hours,notes:r.notes||'',sort:`${ds}-${time||''}-${name}`}); }); }); (bankRows||[]).forEach(b=>{ const note=String(b.notes||''); const info=note.startsWith('TIL-Off')||note.startsWith('TIL-In')?staffAuditTypeInfo({notes:note}):{key:'overtime',label:'Overtime'}; const name=b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown'; const time=auditTimeRangeFromRecord(b); entries.push({date:b.work_date,name,typeKey:info.key,typeLabel:info.label,time,hours:'',notes:note,sort:`${b.work_date}-${time||''}-${name}`}); }); entries.sort((a,b)=>String(a.sort).localeCompare(String(b.sort))); count.textContent=`${entries.length} record${entries.length!==1?'s':''}`; const byDate={}; entries.forEach(e=>{if(!byDate[e.date])byDate[e.date]=[];byDate[e.date].push(e);}); const days=dim(y,m); const weekdays=['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun']; let html='
'; weekdays.forEach(w=>{html+=`
${w}
`;}); const firstDay=new Date(y,m,1).getDay(); const mondayOffset=(firstDay+6)%7; for(let i=0;i
'; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const ds=`${year}-${month}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`; const dt=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00'); const rows=byDate[ds]||[]; const dayName=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'short'}); html+=`
${d} ${htmlSafe(dayName)}
${rows.length}
`; if(!rows.length){html+='
—
';} else{ html+='
'; rows.forEach(e=>{ const extra=[e.time,e.hours].filter(Boolean).join(' · '); const full=`${e.name} | ${e.typeLabel}${extra?' | '+extra:''}${e.notes?' | '+e.notes:''}`; html+=`
${htmlSafe(e.typeLabel)}${htmlSafe(e.name)}
${extra?`
${htmlSafe(extra)}
`:''}
`; }); html+='
'; } html+='
'; } html+=''; body.innerHTML=html; } async function loadStaffAudit(){ let month=document.getElementById('audit-month')?.value; let year=document.getElementById('audit-year')?.value; const now=new Date(); if(!month)month=String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); if(!year)year=String(now.getFullYear()); if(document.getElementById('audit-month')&&!document.getElementById('audit-month').value)document.getElementById('audit-month').value=month; if(document.getElementById('audit-year')&&!document.getElementById('audit-year').value)document.getElementById('audit-year').value=year; let startFilter=null,endFilter=null; if(year&&month){startFilter=`${year}-${month}-01`;endFilter=monthEndDate(year,month);} else if(year){startFilter=`${year}-01-01`;endFilter=`${year}-12-31`;} // Read leave_records raw first, then enrich staff separately. // This avoids embedded relationship reads hiding records. let leaveQuery=SB.from('leave_records').select('*').order('start_date',{ascending:false}); if(startFilter&&endFilter){leaveQuery=leaveQuery.lte('start_date',endFilter).gte('end_date',startFilter);} const{data:leaveRaw,error:leaveError}=await leaveQuery; // OT nurses added from the roster bar are stored in bank_staff_assignments, not leave_records. let bankQuery=SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').select('*').order('work_date',{ascending:false}); if(startFilter&&endFilter){bankQuery=bankQuery.gte('work_date',startFilter).lte('work_date',endFilter);} const{data:bankRaw,error:bankError}=await bankQuery; if(leaveError){console.error('Staff audit leave_records error:',leaveError);} if(bankError){console.error('Staff audit bank_staff_assignments error:',bankError);} const leaveRows=leaveRaw||[]; const bankRows=bankRaw||[]; const staffIds=[...new Set(leaveRows.map(r=>r.staff_id).filter(Boolean))]; const bankIds=[...new Set(bankRows.map(r=>r.bank_staff_id).filter(Boolean))]; const staffMap={}; staffList.forEach(s=>{staffMap[String(s.id)]=s;}); if(staffIds.length){ const{data:staffData}=await SB.from('staff').select('id,full_name,role').in('id',staffIds); (staffData||[]).forEach(s=>{staffMap[String(s.id)]=s;}); } const bankMap={}; if(bankIds.length){ const{data:bankData}=await SB.from('bank_staff').select('id,full_name,role').in('id',bankIds); (bankData||[]).forEach(b=>{bankMap[String(b.id)]=b;}); } const all=leaveRows.map(l=>({...l,staff:staffMap[String(l.staff_id)]||null})); const bankAll=bankRows.map(b=>({...b,bank_staff:bankMap[String(b.bank_staff_id)]||null})); const isTilNote=notes=>String(notes||'').startsWith('TIL-Off')||String(notes||'').startsWith('TIL-In'); const time5=v=>v?String(v).slice(0,5):''; const calcHours=(start,end)=>{ if(!start||!end)return '—'; const[sh,sm]=String(start).split(':').map(Number); const[eh,em]=String(end).split(':').map(Number); if(Number.isNaN(sh)||Number.isNaN(eh))return '—'; const mins=(eh*60+(sm||0))-(sh*60+(sm||0)); const fixedMins=(eh*60+(em||0))-(sh*60+(sm||0)); if(fixedMins<=0)return '—'; return `${Math.floor(fixedMins/60)}h${fixedMins%60?` ${fixedMins%60}m`:''}`; }; const daysBetween=(s,e)=>{ if(!s||!e)return 1; const sd=new Date(s+'T12:00:00'),ed=new Date(e+'T12:00:00'); if(Number.isNaN(sd.getTime())||Number.isNaN(ed.getTime()))return 1; return Math.max(1,Math.round((ed-sd)/86400000)+1); }; const sick=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='sick_leave'); const annual=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='annual_leave'); const mat=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='maternity_leave'); const study=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='study_leave'); const coreOT=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='overtime'&&!isTilNote(l.notes)); const bankOT=bankAll.filter(b=>!isTilNote(b.notes)); const coreTIL=all.filter(l=>l.leave_type==='overtime'&&isTilNote(l.notes)); const bankTIL=bankAll.filter(b=>isTilNote(b.notes)); const otRows=[ ...coreOT.map(l=>({ name:l.staff?.full_name||'Unknown', role:l.staff?.role||'Staff', from:l.start_date, to:l.end_date, days:l.total_days||daysBetween(l.start_date,l.end_date), notes:l.notes||'—', sortDate:l.start_date })), ...bankOT.map(b=>({ name:b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown', role:cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role), from:b.work_date, to:b.work_date, days:1, notes:`${time5(b.shift_start)||'07:00'}–${time5(b.shift_end)||'—'} (${calcHours(b.shift_start,b.shift_end)})${b.notes?` — ${b.notes}`:''}`, sortDate:b.work_date })) ].sort((a,b)=>String(b.sortDate||'').localeCompare(String(a.sortDate||''))); const tilRows=[ ...coreTIL.map(l=>({ name:l.staff?.full_name||'Unknown', role:l.staff?.role||'Staff', date:l.start_date, notes:l.notes||'', sortDate:l.start_date })), ...bankTIL.map(b=>({ name:b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown', role:cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role), date:b.work_date, notes:b.notes||'', sortDate:b.work_date })) ].sort((a,b)=>String(b.sortDate||'').localeCompare(String(a.sortDate||''))); renderStaffMonthBook(all, bankAll, month, year, startFilter, endFilter); document.getElementById('audit-stats').innerHTML=`
Sick Leave
${sick.length}
records
Vacation Leave
${annual.length}
records
Maternity
${mat.length}
records
Study Leave
${study.length}
records
Overtime
${otRows.length}
records
TIL
${tilRows.length}
records
`; const renderLeaveSimple=(tbodyId,records)=>{ const tb=document.getElementById(tbodyId); if(!records.length){tb.innerHTML='No records';return;} tb.innerHTML=records.map(l=>`${htmlSafe(l.staff?.full_name||'Unknown')}
${htmlSafe(l.staff?.role||'Staff')}${l.start_date}${l.end_date}${l.total_days||daysBetween(l.start_date,l.end_date)} days${htmlSafe(l.notes||'—')}`).join(''); }; const leaveAll=[...annual,...mat].sort((a,b)=>String(b.start_date||'').localeCompare(String(a.start_date||''))); const leaveTb=document.getElementById('leave-tbody'); if(!leaveAll.length){leaveTb.innerHTML='No records';} else{leaveTb.innerHTML=leaveAll.map(l=>{const cls=l.leave_type==='annual_leave'?'b-al':'b-mat';const lbl=l.leave_type==='annual_leave'?'Vacation':'Maternity';const hours=Number(l.total_hours||0);const days=Number(l.total_days||daysBetween(l.start_date,l.end_date)||0);const amount=hours>0?`${hours.toFixed(1).replace('.0','')} hours`:`${days} days`;return`${htmlSafe(l.staff?.full_name||'Unknown')}
${htmlSafe(l.staff?.role||'Staff')}${lbl}${l.start_date}${l.end_date}${amount}${htmlSafe(l.notes||'—')}`;}).join('');} renderLeaveSimple('sick-tbody',sick.sort((a,b)=>String(b.start_date||'').localeCompare(String(a.start_date||'')))); renderLeaveSimple('study-tbody',study.sort((a,b)=>String(b.start_date||'').localeCompare(String(a.start_date||'')))); const otTb=document.getElementById('overtime-tbody'); if(!otRows.length){otTb.innerHTML='No overtime records';} else{otTb.innerHTML=otRows.map(r=>`${htmlSafe(r.name)}
${htmlSafe(r.role)}${r.from}${r.to}${r.days} day${Number(r.days)!==1?'s':''}${htmlSafe(r.notes)}`).join('');} const tilTb=document.getElementById('til-audit-tbody'); if(!tilRows.length){tilTb.innerHTML='No TIL records';} else{tilTb.innerHTML=tilRows.map(r=>{ const isOff=String(r.notes||'').startsWith('TIL-Off'); const typeLabel=isOff?'TIL Off':'TIL In'; const typeCls=isOff?'background:#e8f5f4;color:var(--teal);':'background:#e8eaf6;color:#3949ab;'; const hoursMatch=String(r.notes||'').match(/([0-9.]+)h/);const hrs=hoursMatch?hoursMatch[1]:'—'; const timeMatch=String(r.notes||'').match(/\[([0-9:]+)[^0-9]([0-9:]+)\]/); const startT2=timeMatch?timeMatch[1]:'07:00',untilT2=timeMatch?timeMatch[2]:'—'; return`${htmlSafe(r.name)}
${htmlSafe(r.role)}${r.date}${typeLabel}${startT2}${untilT2}${hrs}h`; }).join('');} } // CLINIC AUDIT function toggleSort(){caSort=caSort==='desc'?'asc':'desc';document.getElementById('sort-btn').textContent=caSort==='desc'?'↓ Newest First':'↑ Oldest First';loadClinicAudit();} function clearCAFilter(){const s=document.getElementById('ca-search');if(s)s.value='';document.getElementById('ca-month').value='';document.getElementById('ca-year').value='';loadClinicAudit();} function getClinicAuditFilters(){ const month=document.getElementById('ca-month')?.value || ''; let year=document.getElementById('ca-year')?.value || ''; // If a month is selected but year is blank, use the current year so the month filter still works. if(month && !year) year=String(new Date().getFullYear()); const search=(document.getElementById('ca-search')?.value||'').trim(); return {month,year,search}; } async function getClinicAuditRowsForCurrentFilter(){ const {month,year,search}=getClinicAuditFilters(); const asc=caSort==='asc'; let data=[]; try{ if(year&&month){ data=await getAppointmentsBetween(`${year}-${month}-01`,monthEndDate(year,month),true); }else if(year){ data=await getAppointmentsBetween(`${year}-01-01`,`${year}-12-31`,true); }else{ const {data:rawData,error}=await SB.from('appointments').select('*').order('appt_date',{ascending:asc}).order('appt_slot',{ascending:asc}); if(error)throw error; data=await enrichAppointments(rawData||[]); } }catch(e){console.error('Clinic audit appointment load error:',e);data=[];} data=data.sort((a,b)=>{ const v=String(a.appt_date||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_date||'')) || String(a.appt_slot||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_slot||'')); return asc?v:-v; }); const s=String(search||'').toLowerCase(); if(s){ data=data.filter(a=>{ const hay=[a.patients?.first_name,a.patients?.surname,a.patients?.id_card,a.patients?.phone_number,a.appt_date,String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5),statusLabel(a.status)].join(' ').toLowerCase(); return hay.includes(s); }); } return {data:data||[], month, year, search}; } function compactPatientName(a){ // v30: show the full patient name and surname in the monthly clinic book. // No initials / abbreviations, because this view is used by staff for a clear bird's-eye clinic view. return patientName(a); } function statusShort(status){return {booked:'Booked',attended:'Attended',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'Did not turn up'}[status]||'Booked';} function toggleClinicList(){ const card=document.getElementById('clinic-list-card'); const btn=document.getElementById('clinic-list-toggle'); if(!card||!btn)return; const collapsed=card.classList.toggle('collapsed'); btn.textContent=collapsed?'Show full list':'Hide full list'; } function renderClinicMonthBook(data,month,year){ const title=document.getElementById('clinic-month-book-title'); const count=document.getElementById('clinic-month-book-count'); const body=document.getElementById('clinic-month-book-body'); if(!title||!count||!body)return; const rows=(data||[]).slice().sort((a,b)=> String(a.appt_date||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_date||'')) || String(a.appt_slot||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_slot||'')) ); if(!month){ const yearLabel=year?year:'All Years'; title.textContent=`Clinic Book — All Months (${yearLabel})`; count.textContent=`${rows.length} appointment${rows.length!==1?'s':''}`; if(!rows.length){ body.innerHTML='
No appointments found for the selected filter.
'; return; } const byMonth={}; rows.forEach(a=>{ const key=String(a.appt_date||'').slice(0,7) || 'Unknown'; if(!byMonth[key])byMonth[key]=[]; byMonth[key].push(a); }); const keys=Object.keys(byMonth).sort(); let html='
'; keys.forEach(key=>{ const parts=key.split('-'); const y=Number(parts[0]); const m=Number(parts[1])-1; const label=(parts.length===2&&!Number.isNaN(y)&&!Number.isNaN(m)) ? new Date(y,m,1).toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}) : key; const monthRows=byMonth[key].slice().sort((a,b)=> String(a.appt_date||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_date||'')) || String(a.appt_slot||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_slot||'')) ); const byDate={}; monthRows.forEach(a=>{if(!byDate[a.appt_date])byDate[a.appt_date]=[];byDate[a.appt_date].push(a);}); html+=`
${htmlSafe(label)}${monthRows.length} appointment${monthRows.length!==1?'s':''}
`; Object.keys(byDate).sort().forEach(ds=>{ const dt=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00'); const dayLabel=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short'}); const dayRows=byDate[ds]; html+=`
${htmlSafe(dayLabel)}
`; dayRows.forEach(a=>{ const st=a.status==='cancelled'?'cancelled':a.status==='did_not_attend'?'dntu':a.status==='attended'?'attended':'booked'; html+=`
${htmlSafe(String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5))}${htmlSafe(patientName(a))}${htmlSafe(statusShort(a.status))}
`; }); html+='
'; }); html+='
'; }); html+='
'; body.innerHTML=html; return; } const now=new Date(); if(!year)year=String(now.getFullYear()); const y=Number(year),m=Number(month)-1; const monthLabel=new Date(y,m,1).toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); title.textContent=`Compact Monthly Clinic Book — ${monthLabel}`; const days=dim(y,m); const start=`${year}-${month}-01`; const end=monthEndDate(year,month); const monthRows=rows.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date||'')>=start&&String(a.appt_date||'')<=end); count.textContent=`${monthRows.length} appointment${monthRows.length!==1?'s':''}`; const byDate={}; monthRows.forEach(a=>{if(!byDate[a.appt_date])byDate[a.appt_date]=[];byDate[a.appt_date].push(a);}); const statusToken=s=>s==='cancelled'?'cancelled':s==='did_not_attend'?'dntu':s==='attended'?'attended':'booked'; const weekdays=['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun']; let html='
'; weekdays.forEach(w=>{html+=`
${w}
`;}); const firstDay=new Date(y,m,1).getDay(); const mondayOffset=(firstDay+6)%7; for(let i=0;i
'; for(let d=1;d<=days;d++){ const ds=`${year}-${month}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`; const dt=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00'); const dayRows=byDate[ds]||[]; const dayName=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'short'}); const longDate=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'long'}); html+=`
${d} ${htmlSafe(dayName)}
${dayRows.length}
`; if(!dayRows.length){ html+='
—
'; }else{ html+='
'; dayRows.forEach(a=>{ const st=statusToken(a.status); const nm=compactPatientName(a); const nurse=a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':'—'); const full=`${String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)} — ${patientName(a)} | ID: ${a.patients?.id_card||'—'} | Phone: ${a.patients?.phone_number||'—'} | Nurse/Column: ${nurse} | ${statusLabel(a.status)}`; html+=`
${htmlSafe(String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5))}
${htmlSafe(nm)}
${htmlSafe(statusShort(a.status))}
`; }); html+='
'; } html+='
'; } html+=''; body.innerHTML=html; } async function loadClinicAudit(){ const current=await getClinicAuditRowsForCurrentFilter(); const data=current.data||[]; const month=current.month||''; const year=current.year||''; const search=current.search||''; clinicAuditCache=data; clinicAuditPrintContext={month,year,search}; const tot=data?.length||0,att=data?.filter(a=>a.status==='attended').length||0,can=data?.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled').length||0,dna=data?.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend').length||0; document.getElementById('clinic-stats').innerHTML=`
Total Booked
${tot}
filtered
Attended
${att}
✓ seen
Cancelled
${can}
cancelled
Did Not Turn Up
${dna}
DNTU
`; renderClinicMonthBook(data, month, year); const tbody=document.getElementById('clinic-tbody'); if(!data||!data.length){tbody.innerHTML='No appointments found';return;} const sm={booked:'sb-booked',attended:'sb-attended',cancelled:'sb-cancelled',did_not_attend:'sb-dna'}; const sl={booked:'Booked',attended:'Attended',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'DNTU'}; tbody.innerHTML=data.map(a=>` ${a.appt_date}${a.appt_slot?.slice(0,5)} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.first_name||'')} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.surname||'')} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.id_card||'')} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.phone_number||'—')} ${htmlSafe(a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':'—'))} ${sl[a.status]||''} `).join(''); } async function setOutcome(id,status){await setProjectAppointmentStatus(id,status);loadClinicAudit();loadTodaySnapshot();if(document.getElementById('page-reports')?.classList.contains('active'))loadReports();} async function delFromAudit(id){if(!confirm('Delete this appointment?'))return;await deleteProjectAppointment(id);loadClinicAudit();loadTodaySnapshot();if(document.getElementById('page-reports')?.classList.contains('active'))loadReports();} // REPORTS & CHARTS - no staff leave metrics and no per-nurse booking metrics function pct(num,den){return den?Math.round((num/den)*100):0;} function chartDataCount(items,keyFn,labels){ const counts={};labels.forEach(l=>counts[l]=0); items.forEach(item=>{const k=keyFn(item);if(counts[k]!==undefined)counts[k]++;}); return labels.map(l=>counts[l]||0); } function destroyChart(id){if(reportCharts[id]){reportCharts[id].destroy();delete reportCharts[id];}} function makeChart(id,type,labels,data,label,extra={}){ const ctx=document.getElementById(id); if(!ctx||typeof Chart==='undefined')return; destroyChart(id); reportCharts[id]=new Chart(ctx,{type, data:{labels,datasets:[{label,data,borderWidth:2,tension:.35,fill:false}]}, options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:type==='doughnut'||type==='pie'}},scales:type==='doughnut'||type==='pie'?{}:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{precision:0}}},...extra}});
