} function makeMultiChart(id,type,labels,datasets,extra={}){ const ctx=document.getElementById(id); if(!ctx||typeof Chart==='undefined')return; destroyChart(id); reportCharts[id]=new Chart(ctx,{ type, data:{labels,datasets}, options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:true}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{precision:0}}},...extra} }); } function statusLabel(status){return {booked:'Booked',attended:'Attended',cancelled:'Cancelled',did_not_attend:'DNTU'}[status]||status||'—';} function patientName(a){return `${a.patients?.first_name||''} ${a.patients?.surname||''}`.trim()||'—';} function dateAddStr(dateStr,days){const d=new Date(dateStr+'T12:00:00');d.setDate(d.getDate()+days);return fmt(d);} async function loadReports(){ const year=document.getElementById('rep-year')?.value||String(new Date().getFullYear()); const month=document.getElementById('rep-month')?.value||''; const start=month?`${year}-${month}-01`:`${year}-01-01`; const end=month?monthEndDate(year,month):`${year}-12-31`; const appts=await getAppointmentsBetween(start,end,true); const total=appts.length; const attended=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='attended').length; const cancelled=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled').length; const dna=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend').length; const booked=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='booked').length; const activeTotal=appts.filter(a=>a.status!=='cancelled').length; const slotCounts={};SLOTS.forEach(s=>slotCounts[s]=0);appts.forEach(a=>{const s=String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5);if(slotCounts[s]!==undefined)slotCounts[s]++;}); const busiestSlot=Object.entries(slotCounts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0]||['—',0]; const kpiEl=document.getElementById('report-kpis'); if(kpiEl){ kpiEl.innerHTML=`
Total Appointments
${total}
selected period
Attended Rate
${pct(attended,total)}%
${attended} attended
DNTU Rate
${pct(dna,total)}%
${dna} did not turn up
Cancellation Rate
${pct(cancelled,total)}%
${cancelled} cancelled
Active Bookings
${activeTotal}
excluding cancelled
Busiest Slot
${busiestSlot[0]}
${busiestSlot[1]} booking${busiestSlot[1]!==1?'s':''}
`; } const monthLabels=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; const monthNums=['01','02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','11','12']; const monthTotals=monthNums.map(m=>appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date).slice(5,7)===m).length); const monthBooked=monthNums.map(m=>appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date).slice(5,7)===m && a.status==='booked').length); const monthAttended=monthNums.map(m=>appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date).slice(5,7)===m && a.status==='attended').length); const monthDntu=monthNums.map(m=>appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date).slice(5,7)===m && a.status==='did_not_attend').length); const monthCancelled=monthNums.map(m=>appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_date).slice(5,7)===m && a.status==='cancelled').length); makeChart('chart-monthly-trend','line',monthLabels,monthTotals,'Appointments'); makeMultiChart('chart-exception-trend','bar',monthLabels,[ {label:'DNTU',data:monthDntu,borderWidth:2}, {label:'Cancelled',data:monthCancelled,borderWidth:2} ]); makeMultiChart('chart-monthly-status','bar',monthLabels,[ {label:'Booked',data:monthBooked,borderWidth:2}, {label:'Attended',data:monthAttended,borderWidth:2}, {label:'DNTU',data:monthDntu,borderWidth:2}, {label:'Cancelled',data:monthCancelled,borderWidth:2} ],{scales:{x:{stacked:true},y:{stacked:true,beginAtZero:true,ticks:{precision:0}}}}); makeChart('chart-status-distribution','doughnut',['Booked','Attended','Cancelled','DNTU'],[booked,attended,cancelled,dna],'Outcomes',{cutout:'55%'}); const dayLabels=['Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday','Sunday']; const dayData=chartDataCount(appts,a=>{ const d=new Date(a.appt_date+'T12:00:00'); return ['Sunday','Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday'][d.getDay()]; },dayLabels); makeChart('chart-day-demand','bar',dayLabels,dayData,'Appointments'); makeChart('chart-slot-demand','bar',SLOTS,SLOTS.map(s=>slotCounts[s]||0),'Bookings'); const weekLabels=['Week 1','Week 2','Week 3','Week 4','Week 5']; const weekCounts={};weekLabels.forEach(w=>weekCounts[w]=0); appts.forEach(a=>{ const day=Number(String(a.appt_date||'').slice(8,10)); const wk='Week '+Math.min(5,Math.max(1,Math.ceil(day/7))); if(weekCounts[wk]!==undefined)weekCounts[wk]++; }); makeChart('chart-week-load','bar',weekLabels,weekLabels.map(w=>weekCounts[w]||0),'Appointments'); const dntuSlotCounts={};SLOTS.forEach(s=>dntuSlotCounts[s]=0); appts.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend').forEach(a=>{ const s=String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5); if(dntuSlotCounts[s]!==undefined)dntuSlotCounts[s]++; }); makeChart('chart-dntu-slot','bar',SLOTS,SLOTS.map(s=>dntuSlotCounts[s]||0),'DNTU'); const today=TODAY; const upLabels=[];const upData=[]; for(let i=0;i<14;i++){ const ds=dateAddStr(today,i); const d=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00'); upLabels.push(d.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{day:'numeric',month:'short'})); upData.push(0); } const upStart=today,upEnd=dateAddStr(today,13); const upcoming=await getAppointmentsBetween(upStart,upEnd,false); (upcoming||[]).forEach(a=>{ const diff=Math.round((new Date(a.appt_date+'T12:00:00')-new Date(today+'T12:00:00'))/86400000); if(diff>=0&&diff<14)upData[diff]++; }); makeChart('chart-upcoming-load','bar',upLabels,upData,'Booked Appointments'); const statusClass=a=>a.status==='attended'?'sb-attended':a.status==='did_not_attend'?'sb-dna':a.status==='cancelled'?'sb-cancelled':'sb-booked'; const upTb=document.getElementById('rep-upcoming-tbody'); if(upTb){ const upRows=(upcoming||[]).slice(0,25); upTb.innerHTML=upRows.length?upRows.map(a=>`${a.appt_date}${String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)}${htmlSafe(patientName(a))}${htmlSafe(a.patients?.id_card||'')}${statusLabel(a.status)}`).join(''):'No upcoming appointments in the next 14 days'; } const exTb=document.getElementById('rep-exceptions-tbody'); if(exTb){ const exceptionRows=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend'||a.status==='cancelled').slice(-25).reverse(); exTb.innerHTML=exceptionRows.length?exceptionRows.map(a=>`${a.appt_date}${String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)}${htmlSafe(patientName(a))}${htmlSafe(a.patients?.id_card||'')}${statusLabel(a.status)}`).join(''):'No DNTU or cancelled appointments in this period'; } const slotsTb=document.getElementById('rep-slots-tbody'); if(slotsTb){ const slotRows=SLOTS.map(s=>{ const rows=appts.filter(a=>String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5)===s); return {slot:s,total:rows.length,attended:rows.filter(a=>a.status==='attended').length,dna:rows.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend').length,cancelled:rows.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled').length}; }).filter(r=>r.total>0).sort((a,b)=>b.total-a.total); slotsTb.innerHTML=slotRows.length?slotRows.map(r=>`${r.slot}${r.total}${r.attended}${r.dna}${r.cancelled}`).join(''):'No slot data for this period'; } const busyTb=document.getElementById('rep-busy-days-tbody'); if(busyTb){ const byDate={}; appts.forEach(a=>{ if(!byDate[a.appt_date])byDate[a.appt_date]={date:a.appt_date,total:0,attended:0,dna:0,cancelled:0}; byDate[a.appt_date].total++; if(a.status==='attended')byDate[a.appt_date].attended++; if(a.status==='did_not_attend')byDate[a.appt_date].dna++; if(a.status==='cancelled')byDate[a.appt_date].cancelled++; }); const busyRows=Object.values(byDate).sort((a,b)=>b.total-a.total||a.date.localeCompare(b.date)).slice(0,15); busyTb.innerHTML=busyRows.length?busyRows.map(r=>`${r.date}${r.total}${r.attended}${r.dna}${r.cancelled}`).join(''):'No clinic day data for this period'; } } // DAILY ATTENDANCE — official daily attendance sheet from roster data function gradeFromRole(role){ const r=String(role||'').toLowerCase(); if(r.includes('charge'))return 'CN'; if(r.includes('senior'))return 'SSN'; if(r.includes('practice'))return 'PN'; if(r.includes('staff nurse'))return 'SN'; if(r.includes('nursing aide'))return 'NA'; if(r.includes('carer'))return 'Carer'; if(r.includes('nurse'))return 'N'; return String(role||'').trim()||'—'; } function inferSubmitterGrade(name){ const raw=String(name||'').trim(); const emailKey=normalizeEmail(raw); if(emailKey&&LOGIN_PROFILES[emailKey])return LOGIN_PROFILES[emailKey].short_grade; if(currentLoginProfile&&(normalizeNameKey(currentLoginProfile.full_name)===normalizeNameKey(raw)||emailKey===normalizeEmail(currentLoginProfile.email)))return getLoggedInSubmitterGrade(); const key=normalizeNameKey(fullDisplayName(raw)); const st=(staffList||[]).find(s=>normalizeNameKey(fullDisplayName(s.full_name))===key || normalizeNameKey(s.full_name)===key); return st?gradeFromRole(st.role):(currentLoginProfile?.short_grade||'PN'); } function dutyFromStatus(status){ if(status==='working'||status==='overtime')return 'B'; return 'O'; } function isTilOffNote(notes){return String(notes||'').startsWith('TIL-Off');} function isTilInNote(notes){return String(notes||'').startsWith('TIL-In');} function isCodNote(notes){return String(notes||'').startsWith('COD-');} function mark(v){return v?'✓':'';} function attCell(v,type){ if(typeof v==='string'&&v.trim()){ return `${htmlSafe(v).replace(/\n/g,'
')}`; } return mark(!!v); } function emptyAttendanceRows(colspan,msg){return `${htmlSafe(msg)}`;} function attendanceSection(title,cls,rows){ const body=rows&&rows.length?rows.map((r,i)=>` ${i+1} ${htmlSafe(r.name)} ${htmlSafe(r.grade)} ${htmlSafe(r.duty)} ${mark(r.p)} ${attCell(r.slText||r.sl,'sl')} ${attCell(r.vlText||r.vl,'vl')} ${attCell(r.absText||r.abs,'abs')} ${mark(r.cod)} ${attCell(r.otText||r.ot,'ot')} ${attCell(r.toilText||r.toil,'toil')} `).join(''):emptyAttendanceRows(11, title==='Day Duty'?'No staff found for this date':'No records'); return `
${htmlSafe(title)}
${body}
No.Name & SurnameGradeDutyPSLVLABSCODO.TTOIL
`; } function buildAttendanceRow({name,role,status,notes,source,flags}){ const row={ name:name||'Unknown', grade:gradeFromRole(role), duty:dutyFromStatus(status), p:false,sl:false,vl:false,abs:false,cod:false,ot:false,toil:false, otText:'',toilText:'',slText:'',vlText:'',absText:'', note:'' }; const n=String(notes||''); if(status==='working')row.p=true; if(status==='overtime'){row.p=true;row.ot=true;} if(status==='sick_leave'){row.sl=true;row.p=false;row.duty='O';} if(status==='annual_leave'){row.vl=true;row.p=false;row.duty='O';} if(status==='maternity_leave'||status==='study_leave'){row.abs=true;row.p=false;row.duty='O';} if(isCodNote(n))row.cod=true; if(isTilOffNote(n)){row.duty='O';row.toil=true;row.p=false;} if(isTilInNote(n)){row.duty='B';row.toil=true;row.p=true;} if(source==='bank_ot'){row.duty='B';row.p=true;row.ot=true;} // Daily Attendance must not hide OT/TIL just because a leave row also exists. // These flags are aggregated from ALL same-day roster + leave rows for that staff member. const f=flags||{}; if(f.sl)row.sl=true; if(f.vl)row.vl=true; if(f.abs)row.abs=true; if(f.cod)row.cod=true; if(f.ot)row.ot=true; if(f.toil)row.toil=true; const otRanges=uniqueTextList(f.otRanges||[]); const tilInRanges=uniqueTextList(f.tilInRanges||[]); const tilOffRanges=uniqueTextList(f.tilOffRanges||[]); const slTexts=uniqueTextList(f.slTexts||[]); const vlTexts=uniqueTextList(f.vlTexts||[]); const absTexts=uniqueTextList(f.absTexts||[]); if(slTexts.length)row.slText=attendanceMarkerText('',slTexts); if(vlTexts.length)row.vlText=attendanceMarkerText('',vlTexts); if(absTexts.length)row.absText=attendanceMarkerText('',absTexts); if(row.ot||otRanges.length)row.otText=attendanceMarkerText('',otRanges); const toilLines=[]; if(tilInRanges.length)toilLines.push(attendanceMarkerText('IN',tilInRanges)); if(tilOffRanges.length)toilLines.push(attendanceMarkerText('OUT',tilOffRanges)); if((row.toil||tilInRanges.length||tilOffRanges.length)&&toilLines.length)row.toilText=toilLines.join('\n'); const hasLeaveFlag=!!(row.sl||row.vl||row.abs); const isWorkedExtra=!!(f.ot||f.tilIn||source==='bank_ot'||status==='overtime'); const isTakenOff=!!(f.tilOff||isTilOffNote(n)); const hasHourlyLeave=!!f.hourlyLeave; const hasFullLeave=!!f.fullLeave; if(isTakenOff && !isWorkedExtra){row.duty='O';row.p=false;} if(hasLeaveFlag && !hasHourlyLeave && !isWorkedExtra && !f.tilIn){row.duty='O';row.p=false;} if(hasHourlyLeave && !hasFullLeave && !isTakenOff){row.duty='B';row.p=true;} if(isWorkedExtra || f.tilIn){row.duty='B';row.p=true;} if(n)row.note=n; return row; } function dateLabelLong(dateStr){return new Date(dateStr+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'});} function leavePriorityValue(leaveType){ const t=String(leaveType||''); if(t==='sick_leave')return 1; if(t==='annual_leave')return 2; if(t==='maternity_leave')return 3; if(t==='study_leave')return 4; if(t==='overtime')return 5; return 9; } function extractTimeRangeFromTilNote(notes){ const m=String(notes||'').match(/\[([0-9:]+)[^0-9]([0-9:]+)\]/); return {start:m?m[1]:'07:00',end:m?m[2]:'—'}; } function formatRangeFromTimes(start,end){ const s=String(start||'').slice(0,5)||'07:00'; const e=String(end||'').slice(0,5)||'—'; return `${s}–${e}`; } function uniqueTextList(values){ return [...new Set((values||[]).map(v=>String(v||'').trim()).filter(Boolean))]; } function attendanceMarkerText(label,ranges){ const list=uniqueTextList(ranges); if(!list.length)return label||''; return list.map(r=>label?`${label} ${r}`:r).join('\n'); } function formatHourlyLeaveForAttendance(leave){ const hours=Number(leave?.total_hours||0); const hTxt=hours>0?`${hours.toFixed(1).replace('.0','')}h`:''; const range=(leave?.start_time||leave?.end_time)?` ${String(leave.start_time||'').slice(0,5)||'--'}–${String(leave.end_time||'').slice(0,5)||'--'}`:''; return `${hTxt}${range}`.trim()||'Hourly'; } async function getDailyAttendanceData(dateStr){ const{data:rd}=await SB.from('roster').select('*').eq('roster_date',dateStr); const{data:leaveRows}=await SB.from('leave_records').select('*, staff(id,full_name,role)').lte('start_date',dateStr).gte('end_date',dateStr); const{data:bankRows}=await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').select('*, bank_staff(id,full_name,role)').eq('work_date',dateStr).order('shift_start'); const rosterRows=rd||[]; const leaves=leaveRows||[]; const bank=bankRows||[]; const byStaffRoster={}; rosterRows.forEach(r=>{byStaffRoster[String(r.staff_id)]=r;}); const byStaffLeaves={}; leaves.forEach(l=>{if(l.staff_id){const k=String(l.staff_id); if(!byStaffLeaves[k])byStaffLeaves[k]=[]; byStaffLeaves[k].push(l);}}); const day=[]; const notes=[]; for(const st of staffList){ const staffId=String(st.id); const roster=byStaffRoster[staffId]; const staffLeaves=(byStaffLeaves[staffId]||[]).sort((a,b)=>leavePriorityValue(a.leave_type)-leavePriorityValue(b.leave_type)); let status=roster?.status||defaultCode(st,dateStr)||'working'; const noteParts=[]; if(roster?.notes)noteParts.push(roster.notes); const flags={sl:false,vl:false,abs:false,cod:false,ot:false,toil:false,tilIn:false,tilOff:false,hourlyLeave:false,fullLeave:false,otRanges:[],tilInRanges:[],tilOffRanges:[],slTexts:[],vlTexts:[],absTexts:[]}; if(status==='overtime')flags.ot=true; if(isCodNote(roster?.notes))flags.cod=true; let hasRealLeave=false; let realLeaveStatus=null; for(const leave of staffLeaves){ const ln=String(leave.notes||''); if(ln)noteParts.push(ln); if(isCodNote(ln))flags.cod=true; const hourlyLeave=isHourlyLeaveRecord(leave); const hourlyText=hourlyLeave?formatHourlyLeaveForAttendance(leave):''; if(leave.leave_type==='sick_leave'){ flags.sl=true; if(hourlyLeave){flags.hourlyLeave=true;flags.slTexts.push(hourlyText);} else{flags.fullLeave=true;hasRealLeave=true; if(!realLeaveStatus)realLeaveStatus='sick_leave';} }else if(leave.leave_type==='annual_leave'){ flags.vl=true; if(hourlyLeave){flags.hourlyLeave=true;flags.vlTexts.push(hourlyText);} else{flags.fullLeave=true;hasRealLeave=true; if(!realLeaveStatus)realLeaveStatus='annual_leave';} }else if(leave.leave_type==='maternity_leave'||leave.leave_type==='study_leave'){ flags.abs=true; if(hourlyLeave){flags.hourlyLeave=true;flags.absTexts.push(`${LEAVE_SHORT[leave.leave_type]||'Leave'} ${hourlyText}`.trim());} else{flags.fullLeave=true;hasRealLeave=true; if(!realLeaveStatus)realLeaveStatus=leave.leave_type;} }else if(leave.leave_type==='overtime'){ if(isTilOffNote(ln)){ const tr=extractTimeRangeFromTilNote(ln); flags.toil=true;flags.tilOff=true;flags.tilOffRanges.push(`${tr.start}–${tr.end}`); }else if(isTilInNote(ln)){ const tr=extractTimeRangeFromTilNote(ln); flags.toil=true;flags.tilIn=true;flags.tilInRanges.push(`${tr.start}–${tr.end}`); }else{flags.ot=true;} } } // Real leave should still be visible, but must not hide OT/TIL In/Out on the same date. if(hasRealLeave && !flags.ot && !flags.tilIn && !flags.tilOff){ status=realLeaveStatus||status; }else if(flags.tilOff && !flags.ot && !flags.tilIn){ status='off'; }else if(flags.ot){ status='overtime'; }else if(flags.tilIn){ status='working'; } const displayName=fullDisplayName(st.full_name); const note=joinUniqueNotes(noteParts); const row=buildAttendanceRow({name:displayName,role:st.role,status,notes:note,source:'core',flags}); day.push(row); if(row.note)notes.push(`${displayName}: ${row.note}`); // OT / TIL details are displayed inside the O.T and TOIL table cells, not as separate notes. } const bankAttendanceGroups={}; for(const b of bank){ const note=String(b.notes||''); const isTil=isTilOffNote(note)||isTilInNote(note); const type=isTil?(isTilOffNote(note)?'til-off':'til-in'):'ot'; const name=fullDisplayName(b.bank_staff?.full_name||'Unknown OT / Bank Staff'); const key=makeAssignmentGroupKey('attendance-bank',dateStr,name,type); if(!bankAttendanceGroups[key]){ bankAttendanceGroups[key]={name,role:cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role),type,isTil,start:String(b.shift_start||'07:00').slice(0,5),end:String(b.shift_end||'').slice(0,5),notes:[]}; } bankAttendanceGroups[key].role=betterRole(bankAttendanceGroups[key].role,cleanRoleValue(b.bank_staff?.role)); bankAttendanceGroups[key].start=minTime(bankAttendanceGroups[key].start,String(b.shift_start||'07:00').slice(0,5)); bankAttendanceGroups[key].end=maxTime(bankAttendanceGroups[key].end,String(b.shift_end||'').slice(0,5)); if(note)bankAttendanceGroups[key].notes.push(note); } for(const g of Object.values(bankAttendanceGroups)){ const note=joinUniqueNotes(g.notes); const row=buildAttendanceRow({ name:g.name, role:g.role, status:g.isTil?(g.type==='til-off'?'off':'working'):'overtime', notes:note, source:g.isTil?'bank_til':'bank_ot', flags:{ toil:g.isTil, tilIn:g.type==='til-in', tilOff:g.type==='til-off', ot:!g.isTil, otRanges:!g.isTil?[`${g.start||'07:00'}–${g.end||'—'}`]:[], tilInRanges:g.type==='til-in'?[`${g.start||'07:00'}–${g.end||'—'}`]:[], tilOffRanges:g.type==='til-off'?[`${g.start||'07:00'}–${g.end||'—'}`]:[] } }); day.push(row); // Bank/OT/TIL details are visible in the O.T / TOIL table cells. Keep the audit notes section for manual notes only. if(note)notes.push(`${row.name}: ${note}`); } // Final de-duplication: keep one attendance row per person/type and combine OT/TIL markers. const finalMap={}; for(const r of day){ const key=normalizeNameKey(r.name); if(!finalMap[key]){finalMap[key]={...r};continue;} const cur=finalMap[key]; cur.grade=cur.grade==='—'?r.grade:cur.grade; cur.duty=(cur.duty==='B'||r.duty==='B')?'B':'O'; ['p','sl','vl','abs','cod','ot','toil'].forEach(k=>{cur[k]=!!(cur[k]||r[k]);}); cur.slText=uniqueTextList([cur.slText,r.slText].join('\n').split(/\n+/)).join('\n'); cur.vlText=uniqueTextList([cur.vlText,r.vlText].join('\n').split(/\n+/)).join('\n'); cur.absText=uniqueTextList([cur.absText,r.absText].join('\n').split(/\n+/)).join('\n'); cur.otText=uniqueTextList([cur.otText,r.otText].join('\n').split(/\n+/)).join('\n'); cur.toilText=uniqueTextList([cur.toilText,r.toilText].join('\n').split(/\n+/)).join('\n'); cur.note=joinUniqueNotes([cur.note,r.note]); } const finalDay=Object.values(finalMap).sort((a,b)=>staffOrderValue(a.name)-staffOrderValue(b.name)||String(a.name).localeCompare(String(b.name))); const counts={total:finalDay.length,p:0,sl:0,vl:0,abs:0,cod:0,ot:0,toil:0}; finalDay.forEach(r=>{['p','sl','vl','abs','cod','ot','toil'].forEach(k=>{if(r[k])counts[k]++;});}); return {date:dateStr,day:finalDay,night:[],watch:[],notes:[...new Set(notes.filter(Boolean))],counts}; } async function loadDailyAttendance(){ const dateEl=document.getElementById('daily-date'); if(!dateEl)return; const dateStr=dateEl.value||TODAY; dateEl.value=dateStr; const ward=(document.getElementById('daily-ward')?.value||'Stoma Care Unit').trim()||'Stoma Care Unit'; updateSignedInUI(); const submitter=getLoggedInSubmitterName()||(document.getElementById('daily-submitter')?.value||'').trim(); const sheet=document.getElementById('daily-attendance-sheet'); if(!sheet)return; sheet.innerHTML='
Loading daily attendance...
'; const data=await getDailyAttendanceData(dateStr); dailyAttendanceCache={...data,ward,submitter}; const c=data.counts; const hol=isHol(dateStr); sheet.innerHTML=`
Ward Name: ${htmlSafe(ward)}: ${dateStr.split('-').reverse().join('/')}
${hol?`
Malta Public Holiday: ${htmlSafe(hol)}
`:''}
Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-MT')}
Report date: ${htmlSafe(dateLabelLong(dateStr))}
Submitted by: ${htmlSafe(submitter||'—')}
${c.total}
Total Rows
${c.p}
Present
${c.sl}
Sick Leave
${c.vl}
Vacation Leave
${c.abs}
Absent
${c.cod}
COD
${c.ot}
Overtime
${c.toil}
TOIL
${attendanceSection('Day Duty','',data.day)} ${attendanceSection('Night Duty','night',data.night)} ${attendanceSection('Constant Watch (if any)','watch',data.watch)}
System notes / audit trail
${data.notes.length?data.notes.map(n=>`
• ${htmlSafe(n)}
`).join(''):'No COD, OT, TIL, or leave notes for this date.'}
`; } function dailyChangeDay(dir){ const el=document.getElementById('daily-date'); if(!el)return; const base=el.value||TODAY; const d=new Date(base+'T12:00:00'); d.setDate(d.getDate()+dir); el.value=fmt(d); loadDailyAttendance(); } function dailyGoToday(){const el=document.getElementById('daily-date'); if(el){el.value=TODAY;loadDailyAttendance();}} function dailyAttendanceRowsForExport(){ const d=dailyAttendanceCache; if(!d)return []; const rows=[['Ward Name',d.ward],['Date',d.date],[],['Section','Name & Surname','Grade','Duty','P','SL','VL','ABS','COD','O.T','TOIL']]; const push=(section,arr)=>{if(!arr.length)rows.push([section,'No records','','','','','','','','','']);arr.forEach(r=>rows.push([section,r.name,r.grade,r.duty,r.p?'X':'',r.slText||(r.sl?'X':''),r.vlText||(r.vl?'X':''),r.absText||(r.abs?'X':''),r.cod?'X':'',r.otText||(r.ot?'X':''),r.toilText||(r.toil?'X':'')]));}; push('Day Duty',d.day); push('Night Duty',d.night); push('Constant Watch',d.watch); rows.push([]); rows.push(['Submitted By',d.submitter||'']); if(d.notes?.length){rows.push([]);rows.push(['Notes']);d.notes.forEach(n=>rows.push([n]));} return rows; } function exportDailyAttendanceCSV(){ if(!dailyAttendanceCache){loadDailyAttendance().then(exportDailyAttendanceCSV);return;} const rows=dailyAttendanceRowsForExport(); const csv=rows.map(r=>r.map(v=>`"${String(v??'').replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n'); const blob=new Blob(['\ufeff'+csv],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'}); const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=url; a.download=`Stoma_Care_Daily_Attendance_${dailyAttendanceCache.date}.csv`; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); } async function downloadDailyAttendanceReport(){ updateSignedInUI(); if(!dailyAttendanceCache)await loadDailyAttendance(); const d=dailyAttendanceCache; if(!d){alert('Daily Attendance is not ready yet. Please refresh and try again.');return;} const sheet=document.getElementById('daily-attendance-sheet'); if(!sheet){alert('Daily Attendance sheet was not found.');return;} if(typeof html2canvas==='undefined'||!window.jspdf?.jsPDF){ alert('PDF tools are still loading. Please wait a few seconds and try again.'); return; } const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b=>b.textContent.trim()==='Download Image PDF'); const oldText=btn?btn.textContent:''; if(btn){btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='Creating PDF...';} try{ const exportHolder=document.createElement('div'); exportHolder.className='pdf-export-holder'; const exportSheet=document.createElement('div'); exportSheet.className='attendance-sheet pdf-export-sheet'; exportSheet.innerHTML=sheet.innerHTML; exportHolder.appendChild(exportSheet); document.body.appendChild(exportHolder); await new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,80)); const canvas=await html2canvas(exportSheet,{scale:2.5,useCORS:true,backgroundColor:'#ffffff',logging:false,scrollX:0,scrollY:0}); exportHolder.remove(); const imgData=canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); const {jsPDF}=window.jspdf; const pdf=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'a4'}); const pageW=pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth(); const pageH=pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight(); const margin=6; const maxW=pageW-(margin*2); const maxH=pageH-(margin*2); // v28: Always fit the Daily Attendance image onto ONE A4 landscape page. // This avoids the report splitting across pages and makes the downloaded PDF easier to send manually. const scale=Math.min(maxW/canvas.width,maxH/canvas.height); const imgW=canvas.width*scale; const imgH=canvas.height*scale; const x=(pageW-imgW)/2; const y=(pageH-imgH)/2; pdf.addImage(imgData,'PNG',x,y,imgW,imgH,'','FAST'); const safeDate=String(d.date||TODAY).replace(/[^0-9-]/g,''); pdf.save(`Stoma_Care_Daily_Attendance_${safeDate}.pdf`); await saveDailyAttendanceRowsToPhase2(d); await logAuditTrailAction('daily_attendance_download','daily_attendance',safeDate,{description:'Daily Attendance image PDF downloaded for manual sending',report_date:safeDate,ward:d.ward,submitter:d.submitter||''}); }catch(e){ console.error('PDF download failed:',e); alert('Could not create the image PDF: '+(e?.message||String(e))); }finally{ if(btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent=oldText||'Download Image PDF';} } } function emailCell(value){return String(value||'').replace(/\n/g,' / ').trim();} function appendDailyAttendanceEmailSection(lines,title,rows){ lines.push(title.toUpperCase()); lines.push('Name & Surname | Grade | Duty | P | SL | VL | ABS | COD | O.T | TOIL'); if(!rows||!rows.length){ lines.push('—'); lines.push(''); return; } rows.forEach(r=>{ lines.push(`${r.name} | ${r.grade} | ${r.duty} | ${r.p?'✓':''} | ${emailCell(r.slText||(r.sl?'✓':''))} | ${emailCell(r.vlText||(r.vl?'✓':''))} | ${emailCell(r.absText||(r.abs?'✓':''))} | ${r.cod?'✓':''} | ${emailCell(r.otText||(r.ot?'✓':''))} | ${emailCell(r.toilText||(r.toil?'✓':''))}`); }); lines.push(''); } function buildDailyAttendanceEmailText(){ const d=dailyAttendanceCache; if(!d)return ''; const lines=[]; lines.push(`Ward Name: ${d.ward}`); lines.push(`Date: ${d.date.split('-').reverse().join('/')}`); lines.push(''); appendDailyAttendanceEmailSection(lines,'Day Duty',d.day); appendDailyAttendanceEmailSection(lines,'Night Duty',d.night); appendDailyAttendanceEmailSection(lines,'Constant Watch',d.watch); lines.push('Summary'); lines.push(`P: ${d.counts.p} | SL: ${d.counts.sl} | VL: ${d.counts.vl} | ABS: ${d.counts.abs} | COD: ${d.counts.cod} | O.T: ${d.counts.ot} | TOIL: ${d.counts.toil}`); if(d.notes?.length){ lines.push(''); lines.push('System notes / audit trail'); d.notes.forEach(n=>lines.push('- '+n)); } lines.push(''); lines.push('Submitted by:'); lines.push(d.submitter||'—'); lines.push('Grade:'); lines.push(inferSubmitterGrade(d.submitter)); return lines.join('\n'); } async function copyDailyAttendanceText(){ if(!dailyAttendanceCache)await loadDailyAttendance(); const body=buildDailyAttendanceEmailText(); try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(body);alert('Daily attendance email text copied.');}catch(e){alert(body);} } function buildDailyAttendanceEmailHtml(){ const d=dailyAttendanceCache; if(!d)return ''; const tick=v=>v?'✓':''; const cell=v=>htmlSafe(String(v||'')).replace(/\n/g,'
'); const section=(title,rows)=>{ let html=`

${htmlSafe(title)}

`; html+=``; if(!rows||!rows.length){html+=``;} else rows.forEach(r=>{ html+=``; }); return html+'
Name & SurnameGradeDutyPSLVLABSCODO.TTOIL
—
${cell(r.name)}${cell(r.grade)}${cell(r.duty)}${tick(r.p)}${cell(r.slText||(r.sl?'✓':''))}${cell(r.vlText||(r.vl?'✓':''))}${cell(r.absText||(r.abs?'✓':''))}${tick(r.cod)}${cell(r.otText||(r.ot?'✓':''))}${cell(r.toilText||(r.toil?'✓':''))}
'; }; return `

MDH Stoma Care Daily Attendance

Ward Name: ${cell(d.ward)}
Date: ${cell(d.date.split('-').reverse().join('/'))}

${section('Day Duty',d.day)}${section('Night Duty',d.night)}${section('Constant Watch',d.watch)}

Summary

P: ${d.counts.p} | SL: ${d.counts.sl} | VL: ${d.counts.vl} | ABS: ${d.counts.abs} | COD: ${d.counts.cod} | O.T: ${d.counts.ot} | TOIL: ${d.counts.toil}

Submitted by:
${cell(d.submitter||'—')}
Grade:
${cell(inferSubmitterGrade(d.submitter))}

`; } async function emailDailyAttendanceReport(){ updateSignedInUI(); await loadDailyAttendance(); const d=dailyAttendanceCache; const body=buildDailyAttendanceEmailText(); const html=buildDailyAttendanceEmailHtml(); const subject=`Stoma Care Daily Attendance — ${d.date}`; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b=>b.textContent.trim()==='Send Daily Attendance'); const oldText=btn?btn.textContent:'Send Daily Attendance'; if(btn){btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='Sending...';} try{ const {data:sessionData}=await SB.auth.getSession(); const token=sessionData?.session?.access_token||''; const res=await fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/send-daily-attendance`,{ method:'POST', headers:{ 'Content-Type':'application/json', 'apikey':SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, ...(token?{'Authorization':`Bearer ${token}`}:{}) }, body:JSON.stringify({ report_date:d.date, ward:d.ward, submitter:d.submitter||'', submitter_grade:inferSubmitterGrade(d.submitter), subject, text:body, html, counts:d.counts, day:d.day, night:d.night, watch:d.watch, notes:d.notes||[] }) }); const text=await res.text(); let data={}; try{data=text?JSON.parse(text):{};}catch(parseError){data={raw:text};} if(!res.ok){throw new Error(data?.error||data?.message||data?.raw||`Edge Function returned HTTP ${res.status}`);} await saveDailyAttendanceRowsToPhase2(d); await logAuditTrailAction('daily_attendance_send','daily_attendance_submissions',data?.submission_id||d.date,{report_date:d.date,ward:d.ward,subject,provider_message_id:data?.provider_message_id||null,submission_id:data?.submission_id||null,recipients:data?.recipients||[]}); alert(`Daily Attendance sent successfully.${data?.submission_id?'\nReference: '+data.submission_id:''}`); }catch(e){ console.error('Daily Attendance send failed:',e); try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(body);}catch(copyError){} alert('Daily Attendance was not sent. Exact error: '+(e?.message||String(e))); }finally{ if(btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent=oldText;} } } // MODALS async function openModal(type,...args){ let html=''; if(type==='appt'){ const[slot,date,nurseId,nurseName]=args; html=`

Book Patient

${date} — ${slot}${nurseName?` · ${nurseName}`:''}
`; }else if(type==='leave'){ const{data:sd}=await SB.from('staff').select('*').eq('is_active',true); const opts=(sd||[]).map(s=>``).join(''); html=`

Add Leave / Hours Record

Use the time fields for full day, half day, short leave, OT, or TIL-style hours.
`; } document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=html; openMo(); } async function saveAppt(slot,date,nurseId){ const fn=document.getElementById('p-fn').value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('p-sn').value.trim(); const idno=normaliseIdCard(document.getElementById('p-id').value.trim()); const phone=document.getElementById('p-phone')?.value.trim()||''; if(!fn||!sn||!idno){alert('Please fill in all patient details.');return;} const saved=await saveOrUpdatePatientByIdCard(idno,fn,sn,phone); if(saved.error||!saved.patient?.id){alert('Error saving patient: '+(saved.error?.message||''));return;} const source=saved.patient._source==='legacy'?'legacy':'project'; try{await insertDashboardAppointment({ patient_id:saved.patient.id,appt_date:date,appt_slot:slot, assigned_to:nurseId&&nurseId!=='undefined'&&nurseId!==''?nurseId:null, status:'booked' },source);} catch(error){alert('Booking error: '+(error.message||String(error)));return;} closeModal();loadAppts();loadTodaySnapshot(); } async function saveLeave(){ const sid=document.getElementById('l-staff').value; const type=document.getElementById('l-type').value; const start=document.getElementById('l-start').value; const end=document.getElementById('l-end').value; const startTime=document.getElementById('l-start-time')?.value||'07:00'; const endTime=document.getElementById('l-end-time')?.value||'15:00'; const rawNotes=document.getElementById('l-notes').value.trim(); if(!sid||!start||!end||!startTime||!endTime){alert('Please fill in staff, dates and hours.');return;} const sd=new Date(start+'T12:00:00'),ed=new Date(end+'T12:00:00'); if(ed1?` daily · ${totalDays} days`:''})`; const notes=rawNotes?`${hoursNote} — ${rawNotes}`:hoursNote; const payload={staff_id:sid,leave_type:type,start_date:start,end_date:end,start_time:startTime,end_time:endTime,total_hours:totalHours,notes}; try{ const {error}=await SB.from('leave_records').insert(payload); if(error){ const fallback=await SB.from('leave_records').insert({staff_id:sid,leave_type:type,start_date:start,end_date:end,notes}); if(fallback.error)throw new Error(fallback.error.message); } closeModal(); loadStaffAudit(); renderRoster(); if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance(); alert('Leave / hours record saved.'); }catch(e){ alert('Could not save leave record: '+(e?.message||String(e))+'. Run the v21 SQL fix if you have not done so.'); } } async function delOT(id){if(!confirm('Delete OT?'))return;await SB.from('bank_staff_assignments').delete().eq('id',id);renderRoster();if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit();if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance();} async function delTIL(id){if(!confirm('Delete TIL?'))return;await SB.from('leave_records').delete().eq('id',id);renderRoster();if(document.getElementById('page-staff-audit')?.classList.contains('active'))loadStaffAudit();if(document.getElementById('page-daily-attendance')?.classList.contains('active'))loadDailyAttendance();} function openMo(){document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open');} function closeMo(){document.getElementById('mo').classList.remove('open');} function closeModal(){document.getElementById('mo').classList.remove('open');} function moOut(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('mo'))closeModal();} function clinicPrintPeriodLabel(){ const ctx=clinicAuditPrintContext||{}; if(ctx.month&&ctx.year){ const d=new Date(Number(ctx.year),Number(ctx.month)-1,1); return d.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long',year:'numeric'}); } if(ctx.year)return `All Months ${ctx.year}`; return 'All Months / All Years'; } function clinicStatusPrintClass(status){ if(status==='attended')return 'p-attended'; if(status==='cancelled')return 'p-cancelled'; if(status==='did_not_attend')return 'p-dntu'; return 'p-booked'; } function buildClinicPrintHtml(rows){ const period=clinicPrintPeriodLabel(); const sorted=(rows||[]).slice().sort((a,b)=> String(a.appt_date||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_date||'')) || String(a.appt_slot||'').localeCompare(String(b.appt_slot||'')) ); const attended=sorted.filter(a=>a.status==='attended').length; const cancelled=sorted.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled').length; const dntu=sorted.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend').length; const booked=sorted.filter(a=>a.status==='booked').length; const generated=new Date().toLocaleString('en-MT',{dateStyle:'short',timeStyle:'short'}); const search=clinicAuditPrintContext?.search?` · Search: ${htmlSafe(clinicAuditPrintContext.search)}`:''; const byDate={}; sorted.forEach(a=>{if(!byDate[a.appt_date])byDate[a.appt_date]=[];byDate[a.appt_date].push(a);}); let body=''; if(!sorted.length){ body='
No appointments found for this filter.
'; }else{ Object.keys(byDate).sort().forEach(ds=>{ const dt=new Date(ds+'T12:00:00'); const dayLabel=dt.toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}); const dayRows=byDate[ds]; body+=`
${htmlSafe(dayLabel)}${dayRows.length} appointment${dayRows.length!==1?'s':''}
`; dayRows.forEach(a=>{ const nurse=a.staff?.full_name||a.bank_staff?.full_name||(!a.assigned_to&&!a.bank_staff_id?'Common':'—'); const status=statusLabel(a.status); body+=``; }); body+='
TimePatient nameID CardPhoneNurse / ColumnStatus
${htmlSafe(String(a.appt_slot||'').slice(0,5))} ${htmlSafe(patientName(a))} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.id_card||'—')} ${htmlSafe(a.patients?.phone_number||'—')} ${htmlSafe(nurse)} ${htmlSafe(status)}
'; }); } return `Clinic Appointment Book — ${htmlSafe(period)}

MDH Stoma Care Clinic — Appointment Book

Period: ${htmlSafe(period)}${search}
Generated: ${htmlSafe(generated)}
Use browser print or Save as PDF
${sorted.length}
Total
${booked}
Booked
${attended}
Attended
${cancelled}
Cancelled
${dntu}
Did Not Turn Up
${body} `; } async function printClinicAuditBook(){ const btn=document.querySelector('button[onclick="printClinicAuditBook()"]'); const oldText=btn?btn.textContent:''; if(btn){btn.textContent='Preparing print...';btn.disabled=true;} try{ const current=await getClinicAuditRowsForCurrentFilter(); clinicAuditCache=current.data||[]; clinicAuditPrintContext={month:current.month||'',year:current.year||'',search:current.search||''}; const html=buildClinicPrintHtml(clinicAuditCache); const win=window.open('','_blank','width=1200,height=850'); if(!win){alert('Please allow pop-ups for this site so the clean print view can open.');return;} win.document.open(); win.document.write(html); win.document.close(); setTimeout(()=>{win.focus();win.print();},450); }catch(e){ alert('Could not prepare the Clinic Book print: '+(e?.message||String(e))); }finally{ if(btn){btn.textContent=oldText||'🖨 Print Clinic Book';btn.disabled=false;} } } checkSession(); // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PATIENT DASHBOARD — JAVASCRIPT // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const PATHWAY_STAGES=[ 'Referral / New Patient', 'Elective: Pre-Op Siting', 'Elective: Pre-Op Education', 'Elective: Awaiting Surgery', 'Emergency: Admitted', 'Bagging Advice for Fistula and Wounds: Assessment', 'Surgery / Stoma Formed', 'Post-Op Day 1', 'Daily Reviews', 'Patient Teaching', 'Discharge Planning', 'Discharged', 'Outpatient Follow-Up', 'Long-Term Monitoring', 'Reversal / Refashioning', 'Closed' ]; const STOMA_TYPES=['Colostomy','Ileostomy','Urostomy','Mucous Fistula','Double-Barrel Stoma','Loop Stoma','End Stoma','Other']; const EPISODE_TYPES=['Elective','Emergency','Review Only','Follow-Up Only','Reversal','Refashion','Closure']; function refreshPatientPathwayFilterOptions(){ document.querySelectorAll('select[id="pt-pathway-filter"]').forEach(sel=>{ const current=sel.value||''; sel.innerHTML=''+PATHWAY_STAGES.map(s=>``).join(''); if([...sel.options].some(o=>o.value===current))sel.value=current; }); } function projectEpisodeStatusFromStage(stage){ const s=String(stage||'').toLowerCase(); if(s.includes('closed'))return 'Closed'; if(s.includes('discharged'))return 'Discharged'; if(s.includes('pre-op'))return 'Pre-Operative'; if(s.includes('post-op')||s.includes('daily')||s.includes('surgery'))return 'Post-Operative'; if(s.includes('follow'))return 'Follow-Up'; if(s.includes('discharge planning'))return 'Discharge Planning'; return 'Active'; } function patientTypeFromProject(p,e){ const status=String(p?.patient_status||'').toLowerCase(); if(status.includes('inpatient'))return 'inpatient'; if(status.includes('outpatient'))return 'outpatient'; if(p?.current_ward||e?.admission_ward)return 'inpatient'; return 'outpatient'; } function normalizeProjectPatient(p,e={},s={}){ const pathway=e?.pathway_stage||'Referral / New Patient'; const patientType=patientTypeFromProject(p,e); return { id:p.id, patient_number:p.patient_number, hospital_number:p.hospital_number, first_name:p.first_name, surname:p.surname, id_card:p.id_card_number, id_card_number:p.id_card_number, passport_number:p.passport_number, phone_number:p.mobile_number||p.home_number, date_of_birth:p.date_of_birth, patient_status:p.patient_status, patient_type:patientType, patient_type_label:patientType==='inpatient'?'Inpatient':'Outpatient', ward:p.current_ward||e?.admission_ward, diagnosis:p.medical_history||e?.operation_performed, is_active:p.is_active!==false&&!p.is_deleted, created_at:p.created_at, created_by:p.created_by, episode_id:e?.id||null, episode_number:e?.episode_number, episode_type:e?.episode_type, episode_status:e?.episode_status, episode_outcome:e?.episode_outcome, pathway_status:pathway, allocated_nurse:e?.assigned_nurse||e?.primary_nurse||'Common', primary_nurse:e?.primary_nurse, assigned_nurse:e?.assigned_nurse, discharge_date:e?.discharge_date, follow_up_required:e?.follow_up_required, reversal_applicable:e?.reversal_applicable, reversal_date:e?.reversal_date, admission_date:e?.admission_date, consultant:e?.consultant, surgeon:e?.surgeon, surgery_date:s?.surgery_date||e?.surgery_date, stoma_id:s?.id||null, stoma_number:s?.stoma_number, stoma_type:s?.stoma_type||e?.actual_stoma_type||e?.intended_stoma_type, stoma_site:s?.stoma_site||e?.stoma_site, bag_brand:s?.bag_brand, flange_size:s?.flange_size, output_colour:s?.output_colour, // Extended fields for v66 profile tabs contact_number:p.mobile_number||p.home_number||p.contact_number, sex:p.sex||p.gender, locality:p.locality, past_medical_history:p.past_medical_history||p.medical_history, social_history:p.social_history, drug_history:p.drug_history, complications:p.complications, additional_notes:p.additional_notes||p.notes, op_performed_findings:p.op_performed_findings||e?.operation_performed||p.operation_performed, stoma_type_summary:p.stoma_type_summary||s?.stoma_type||e?.actual_stoma_type, pathway_type:p.pathway_type, dntu_streak:p.dntu_streak||0, discharged_date:e?.discharge_date||p.discharged_date, proposed_reversal_date:p.proposed_reversal_date, reversal_date:e?.reversal_date||p.reversal_date, rip_date:p.rip_date, last_outcome_date:p.last_outcome_date, hospital_number:p.hospital_number||p.patient_number, id_card:p.id_card_number||p.id_card, assigned_nurse:e?.assigned_nurse||e?.primary_nurse||p.assigned_nurse||'Common', consultant:e?.consultant||p.consultant }; } async function getProjectPatients(){ const {data:patients,error}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('*').eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); if(error)throw error; const ids=(patients||[]).map(p=>p.id); let episodes=[],stomas=[]; if(ids.length){ const er=await SB.from('episodes_main').select('*').in('patient_id',ids).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); if(!er.error)episodes=er.data||[]; const sr=await SB.from('stomas_main').select('*').in('patient_id',ids).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}); if(!sr.error)stomas=sr.data||[]; } const epByPatient={}, stomaByPatient={}; episodes.forEach(e=>{if(!epByPatient[e.patient_id])epByPatient[e.patient_id]=e;}); stomas.forEach(st=>{if(!stomaByPatient[st.patient_id])stomaByPatient[st.patient_id]=st;}); return (patients||[]).map(p=>normalizeProjectPatient(p,epByPatient[p.id],stomaByPatient[p.id])); } async function getProjectPatientById(id){ const {data:p,error}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('*').eq('id',id).maybeSingle(); if(error||!p)return null; const {data:e}=await SB.from('episodes_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',id).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(1).maybeSingle(); const {data:st}=await SB.from('stomas_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',id).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(1).maybeSingle(); return normalizeProjectPatient(p,e||{},st||{}); } async function syncLegacyPatientMirrorById(id){ try{ const p=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(!p)return; await SB.from('patients').upsert({ id:p.id, first_name:p.first_name, surname:p.surname, id_card:p.id_card||p.hospital_number||p.patient_number, phone_number:p.phone_number, date_of_birth:p.date_of_birth, patient_type:p.patient_type, stoma_type:p.stoma_type, stoma_site:p.stoma_site, surgery_date:p.surgery_date, admission_date:p.admission_date, ward:p.ward, consultant:p.consultant, diagnosis:p.diagnosis, pathway_status:p.pathway_status, bag_brand:p.bag_brand, flange_size:p.flange_size, output_colour:p.output_colour, is_active:p.is_active, created_by:p.created_by },{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('Legacy patient mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} } // ── PATIENT REGISTER ────────────────────────────────── function patientStatusText(p){ return String(p?.patient_status||p?.episode_status||p?.pathway_status||'').toLowerCase(); } function isReversalOrClosedPatient(p){ const s=[p.patient_status,p.episode_type,p.episode_status,p.pathway_status,p.episode_outcome].map(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase()).join(' '); return s.includes('reversal')||s.includes('reversed')||s.includes('refashion')||s.includes('closure')||s.includes('closed'); } function isDeceasedPatient(p){return patientStatusText(p).includes('deceased')||patientStatusText(p).includes('died');} function isRelocatedPatient(p){const s=patientStatusText(p);return s.includes('relocated')||s.includes('overseas')||s.includes('moved abroad');} function isDischargedToGozoPatient(p){ const s=[p.patient_status,p.episode_type,p.episode_status,p.pathway_status,p.episode_outcome,p.ward,p.discharge_date].map(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase()).join(' '); return s.includes('gozo') || s.includes('discharged to gozo') || s.includes('discharge to gozo'); } function isHandoverPatient(p){ const s=[p.patient_status,p.episode_status,p.pathway_status,p.ward].map(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase()).join(' '); return p.is_active && !isDeceasedPatient(p) && !isRelocatedPatient(p) && !isReversalOrClosedPatient(p) && (p.patient_type==='inpatient' || !!p.ward || s.includes('handover') || s.includes('discharge planning')); } function isAwaitingFirstFollowupPatient(p){ const s=[p.patient_status,p.episode_status,p.pathway_status].map(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase()).join(' '); return (s.includes('discharged')||s.includes('follow-up')||s.includes('follow up')) && !isReversalOrClosedPatient(p) && !isDeceasedPatient(p) && !isRelocatedPatient(p); } async function getDntuPatientIds(){ const ids=new Set(); try{ const {data}=await SB.from('appointments').select('patient_id,status').not('patient_id','is',null).in('status',['did_not_attend']); (data||[]).forEach(r=>{if(r.patient_id)ids.add(String(r.patient_id));}); }catch(e){console.warn('DNTU outpatient_appointments check skipped:',e?.message||e);} try{ const {data}=await SB.from('appointments').select('patient_id,status').not('patient_id','is',null).in('status',['did_not_attend','DNTU','dna']); (data||[]).forEach(r=>{if(r.patient_id)ids.add(String(r.patient_id));}); }catch(e){console.warn('DNTU compatibility check skipped:',e?.message||e);} return ids; } function patientMatchesCommandView(p,view,dntuIds){ if(!view)return true; if(view==='active')return p.is_active && !isDeceasedPatient(p) && !isRelocatedPatient(p) && !isReversalOrClosedPatient(p); if(view==='inpatient')return p.patient_type==='inpatient' || String(p.patient_status||'').toLowerCase().includes('inpatient') || !!p.ward; if(view==='outpatient')return p.patient_type==='outpatient' && p.is_active && !isDeceasedPatient(p) && !isRelocatedPatient(p); if(view==='awaiting_first_followup')return isAwaitingFirstFollowupPatient(p); if(view==='dntu')return dntuIds&&dntuIds.has(String(p.id)); if(view==='reversal')return isReversalOrClosedPatient(p); if(view==='deceased')return isDeceasedPatient(p); if(view==='relocated')return isRelocatedPatient(p); if(view==='gozo')return isDischargedToGozoPatient(p); if(view==='handover')return isHandoverPatient(p); if(view==='outcomes')return !p.is_active || isDeceasedPatient(p) || isRelocatedPatient(p) || isReversalOrClosedPatient(p) || isDischargedToGozoPatient(p); return true; } function updatePatientViewLabel(){ const view=document.getElementById('pt-command-filter')?.value||''; const nurse=document.getElementById('pt-nurse-filter')?.value||''; const labels={active:'Active Patients',inpatient:'Inpatients',outpatient:'Outpatients',handover:'Handover',awaiting_first_followup:'Awaiting first post-discharge follow-up',dntu:'DNTU patients',reversal:'Reversed',deceased:'Deceased',relocated:'Relocated Overseas',gozo:'Discharged to Gozo',outcomes:'Patient Outcomes'}; let txt=labels[view]||'Showing all patients'; if(nurse)txt+=` · ${nurse}`; const el=document.getElementById('patient-active-view-label'); if(el)el.textContent=txt; document.querySelectorAll('.patient-board-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',(b.dataset.view||'')===view)); document.querySelectorAll('.allocation-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',(b.dataset.nurse||'')===nurse)); } function setPatientCommandFilter(view){ const el=document.getElementById('pt-command-filter'); if(el)el.value=view||''; syncPatientSubtabActive(view||'master'); updatePatientViewLabel(); loadPatients(); } function setPatientNurseFilter(nurse){ const el=document.getElementById('pt-nurse-filter'); if(el)el.value=nurse||''; updatePatientViewLabel(); loadPatients(); } function resetPatientCommandFilters(){ ['pt-command-filter','pt-nurse-filter','pt-search','pt-type-filter','pt-pathway-filter','pt-status-filter'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); syncPatientSubtabActive('master'); updatePatientViewLabel(); loadPatients(); } function loadPatientCommandCountsFromRows(rows,dntuIds){ const set=(id,v)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=v;}; rows=rows||[]; set('pc-count-active',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'active',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-inpatient',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'inpatient',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-outpatient',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'outpatient',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-awaiting-first',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'awaiting_first_followup',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-dntu',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'dntu',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-reversal',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'reversal',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-deceased',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'deceased',dntuIds)).length); set('pc-count-relocated',rows.filter(p=>patientMatchesCommandView(p,'relocated',dntuIds)).length); } async function loadPatientCommandCounts(){ try{const rows=await getProjectPatients();const dntu=await getDntuPatientIds();loadPatientCommandCountsFromRows(rows,dntu);}catch(e){console.warn('Patient board counts skipped:',e?.message||e);} } function openAddPatientCaseMenu(){ const h=`

Add New Patient / New Case

Choose the clinical pathway first. The system will create the patient, episode, and stoma record behind the scenes.
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } function openAddPatientModalWithPathway(pathwayType){ openAddPatientModal(); setTimeout(()=>{ const ep=document.getElementById('mp-episode-type'); const path=document.getElementById('mp-pathway'); if(ep)ep.value=pathwayType==='Emergency'?'Emergency':'Elective'; if(path)path.value=pathwayType==='Emergency'?'Emergency Pathway Started':'Elective Pathway Started'; },30); } async function loadPatients(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('patients-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; refreshPatientPathwayFilterOptions(); updatePatientViewLabel(); tbody.innerHTML='Loading patients from Project Bible tables...'; const search=(document.getElementById('pt-search')?.value||'').trim().toLowerCase(); const typeF=document.getElementById('pt-type-filter')?.value||''; const statusF=document.getElementById('pt-status-filter')?.value||''; const pathwayF=document.getElementById('pt-pathway-filter')?.value||''; const commandF=document.getElementById('pt-command-filter')?.value||''; const nurseF=document.getElementById('pt-nurse-filter')?.value||''; let rows=[]; let dntuIds=new Set(); try{rows=await getProjectPatients();dntuIds=await getDntuPatientIds();} catch(error){tbody.innerHTML=`Error loading patients_main: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} loadPatientCommandCountsFromRows(rows,dntuIds); if(commandF)rows=rows.filter(r=>patientMatchesCommandView(r,commandF,dntuIds)); if(nurseF){ const want=String(nurseF||'').toLowerCase(); if(want==='common')rows=rows.filter(r=>!r.allocated_nurse||String(r.allocated_nurse).toLowerCase()==='common'); else rows=rows.filter(r=>{ const got=String(r.allocated_nurse||'').toLowerCase(); if(want.includes('jason'))return got.includes('jason'); if(want.includes('jacqueline')||want.includes('jacklyn'))return got.includes('jacqueline')||got.includes('jacklyn'); if(want.includes('lorraine'))return got.includes('lorraine'); return got===want; }); } if(typeF)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.patient_type===typeF); if(pathwayF)rows=rows.filter(r=>r.pathway_status===pathwayF); if(statusF==='active')rows=rows.filter(r=>r.is_active); if(statusF==='inactive')rows=rows.filter(r=>!r.is_active||isDeceasedPatient(r)||isRelocatedPatient(r)||isReversalOrClosedPatient(r)); if(search)rows=rows.filter(r=>[r.first_name,r.surname,r.id_card,r.hospital_number,r.patient_number,r.ward,r.stoma_type,r.patient_status,r.allocated_nurse].some(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase().includes(search))); if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No patients found for this view';return;} tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(p=>{ const name=`${p.first_name||''} ${p.surname||''}`.trim(); const badge=pathwayBadge(p.pathway_status); const typeBadge=p.patient_type==='inpatient'?'Inpatient':'Outpatient'; const warning=isDeceasedPatient(p)?'
Deceased':isRelocatedPatient(p)?'
Relocated overseas':dntuIds.has(String(p.id))?'
DNTU follow-up':''; return ` ${htmlSafe(name)}
${htmlSafe(p.patient_number||'')}${warning} ${htmlSafe(p.id_card||p.hospital_number||'—')} ${typeBadge} ${htmlSafe(p.stoma_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(p.ward||'—')} ${p.surgery_date?new Date(p.surgery_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(p.allocated_nurse||'Common')} ${badge} `; }).join(''); } function renderMyPatientsGrid(){ // My Patients grid removed from home menu in v66 — home uses home-btn system // This function is kept for compatibility but does nothing } function pathwayBadge(status){ const palette=[ 'background:#f5f3ff;color:#4c1d95;', 'background:#ede9fe;color:#5b21b6;', 'background:#f3e8ff;color:#6b21a8;', 'background:#fae8ff;color:#86198f;', 'background:#ede9fe;color:#3730a3;', 'background:#f1f5f9;color:#334155;' ]; const idx=Math.max(0,PATHWAY_STAGES.indexOf(status)); const style=palette[idx%palette.length]||palette[0]; return `${htmlSafe(status||'—')}`; } function openAddPatientModal(){ const mo=document.getElementById('mo');const mb=document.getElementById('mb'); if(!mo||!mb)return; mb.innerHTML=`

Add New Patient

MDH Stoma Care — New patient registration
Patient Details
Stoma & Care
`; mo.classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewPatientV66(){ const fn=document.getElementById('mp-fn')?.value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('mp-sn')?.value.trim(); const hosp=document.getElementById('mp-hosp')?.value.trim(); if(!fn||!sn||!hosp){alert('First name, surname and hospital number are required.');return;} const stomaType=document.getElementById('mp-stoma')?.value||null; const surgDate=document.getElementById('mp-surg')?.value||null; const pathwayType=document.getElementById('mp-pathway')?.value||'elective'; const patientPayload={ hospital_number:hosp, id_card:document.getElementById('mp-id')?.value.trim()||null, first_name:fn, surname:sn, contact_number:document.getElementById('mp-ph')?.value.trim()||null, dob:document.getElementById('mp-dob')?.value||null, sex:document.getElementById('mp-sex')?.value||null, locality:document.getElementById('mp-locality')?.value.trim()||null, op_performed_findings:document.getElementById('mp-opfindings')?.value.trim()||null, stoma_type_summary:stomaType, assigned_nurse:document.getElementById('mp-nurse')?.value||null, consultant:document.getElementById('mp-cons')?.value.trim()||null, ward:document.getElementById('mp-ward')?.value.trim()||null, surgery_date:surgDate, patient_status:document.getElementById('mp-status')?.value||'inpatient', pathway_type:pathwayType }; const {data:p,error:pErr}=await SB.from('patients').insert(patientPayload).select('id').single(); if(pErr){ // fallback to patients_main if patients table not yet migrated const {data:pm,error:pmErr}=await SB.from('patients_main').insert({ hospital_number:hosp,id_card_number:patientPayload.id_card, first_name:fn,surname:sn,mobile_number:patientPayload.contact_number, date_of_birth:patientPayload.dob,patient_status:patientPayload.patient_status, current_ward:patientPayload.ward,is_active:true,created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName() }).select('id').single(); if(pmErr){alert('Error saving patient: '+pmErr.message);return;} closeMo();loadPatients();return; } // Create opening episode const epType=pathwayType==='elective'?'elective_admission':pathwayType==='emergency'?'emergency_admission':'bagging_advice_inpatient'; await SB.from('episodes').insert({patient_id:p.id,episode_type:epType,episode_id_label:'EP-'+new Date().getFullYear()+'-001',opened_date:surgDate||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],consultant:patientPayload.consultant,ward:patientPayload.ward,status:'open',created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()}); // Create stoma if type selected if(stomaType){ await SB.from('stomas').insert({patient_id:p.id,stoma_label:'Stoma 1',stoma_type:stomaType,formed_date:surgDate,status:'active'}); } closeMo(); loadPatients(); if(typeof logAuditTrailAction==='function') await logAuditTrailAction('insert','patients',p.id,{description:`Patient added: ${fn} ${sn}`}); } function openAddPatientModalLegacy(){ openAddPatientModal(); } async function saveNewPatient(){ const fn=document.getElementById('mp-fn')?.value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('mp-sn')?.value.trim(); const hospital=document.getElementById('mp-hosp')?.value.trim(); if(!fn||!sn||!hospital){alert('First name, surname and hospital number are required.');return;} const patientType=document.getElementById('mp-type')?.value||'inpatient'; const pathway=document.getElementById('mp-pathway')?.value||'Referral / New Patient'; const stomaType=document.getElementById('mp-stoma')?.value||null; const stomaSite=document.getElementById('mp-site')?.value.trim()||null; const surgeryDate=document.getElementById('mp-surg')?.value||null; const patientPayload={ hospital_number:hospital, id_card_number:document.getElementById('mp-id')?.value.trim()||null, first_name:fn, surname:sn, mobile_number:document.getElementById('mp-ph')?.value.trim()||null, date_of_birth:document.getElementById('mp-dob')?.value||null, patient_status:patientType==='inpatient'?'Inpatient':'Outpatient', current_ward:document.getElementById('mp-ward')?.value.trim()||null, medical_history:document.getElementById('mp-diag')?.value.trim()||null, is_active:true, created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName() }; const {data:p,error:pErr}=await SB.from('patients_main').insert(patientPayload).select('id').single(); if(pErr){alert('Error saving patient: '+pErr.message);return;} const episodePayload={ patient_id:p.id, episode_type:document.getElementById('mp-episode-type')?.value||'Elective', episode_status:projectEpisodeStatusFromStage(pathway), pathway_stage:pathway, admission_date:document.getElementById('mp-adm')?.value||null, admission_ward:patientPayload.current_ward, consultant:document.getElementById('mp-cons')?.value.trim()||null, surgery_date:surgeryDate, operation_performed:patientPayload.medical_history, intended_stoma_type:stomaType, actual_stoma_type:stomaType, stoma_site:stomaSite, assigned_nurse:getLoggedInSubmitterName(), created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName() }; const {data:e,error:eErr}=await SB.from('episodes_main').insert(episodePayload).select('id').single(); if(eErr){alert('Patient saved, but episode could not be created: '+eErr.message);} if(e?.id&&(stomaType||stomaSite||surgeryDate)){ const {error:sErr}=await SB.from('stomas_main').insert({ patient_id:p.id, episode_id:e.id, stoma_type:stomaType, stoma_site:stomaSite, surgery_date:surgeryDate, date_formed:surgeryDate, stoma_status:'New', created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName() }); if(sErr)console.warn('Stoma record skipped:',sErr.message); } await syncLegacyPatientMirrorById(p.id); closeMo(); loadPatients(); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','patients_main',p.id,{description:`Patient added: ${fn} ${sn}`}); } async function openEditPatientModal(id){ const p=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(!p){alert('Could not load patient.');return;} const h=`

Edit Patient

${htmlSafe(p.first_name||'')} ${htmlSafe(p.surname||'')} · ${htmlSafe(p.id_card||p.hospital_number||'')}
Patient Details
Stoma & Care
Clinical History
Key Dates
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveEditPatientV66(id){ const existing=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(!existing){alert('Could not load patient.');return;} const fn=document.getElementById('ep-fn')?.value.trim(); const sn=document.getElementById('ep-sn')?.value.trim(); const hosp=document.getElementById('ep-hosp')?.value.trim(); if(!fn||!sn||!hosp){alert('First name, surname and hospital number are required.');return;} const pathway=document.getElementById('ep-pathway')?.value||existing.pathway_status||'Referral / New Patient'; const pathwayType=document.getElementById('ep-pathway-type')?.value||existing.pathway_type||'elective'; const surgDate=document.getElementById('ep-surg')?.value||null; const discDate=document.getElementById('ep-disc')?.value||null; const revDate=document.getElementById('ep-rev')?.value||null; const ripDate=document.getElementById('ep-rip')?.value||null; const assignedNurse=document.getElementById('ep-nurse')?.value||null; // 1. Update patients_main (legacy operational table) const mainPayload={ first_name:fn, surname:sn, hospital_number:hosp, id_card_number:document.getElementById('ep-id')?.value.trim()||null, mobile_number:document.getElementById('ep-ph')?.value.trim()||null, date_of_birth:document.getElementById('ep-dob')?.value||null, sex:document.getElementById('ep-sex')?.value||null, locality:document.getElementById('ep-locality')?.value.trim()||null, current_ward:document.getElementById('ep-ward')?.value.trim()||null, medical_history:document.getElementById('ep-opfindings')?.value.trim()||null, past_medical_history:document.getElementById('ep-pmh')?.value.trim()||null, social_history:document.getElementById('ep-sh')?.value.trim()||null, drug_history:document.getElementById('ep-dh')?.value.trim()||null, complications:document.getElementById('ep-compl')?.value.trim()||null, op_performed_findings:document.getElementById('ep-opfindings')?.value.trim()||null, stoma_type_summary:document.getElementById('ep-stoma')?.value||null, assigned_nurse:assignedNurse, pathway_type:pathwayType, surgery_date:surgDate, discharged_date:discDate, proposed_reversal_date:document.getElementById('ep-revprop')?.value||null, reversal_date:revDate, rip_date:ripDate, patient_status:document.getElementById('ep-status')?.value||'active', is_active:document.getElementById('ep-active')?.value==='true', modified_at:new Date().toISOString() }; const{error:pErr}=await SB.from('patients_main').update(mainPayload).eq('id',id); if(pErr){alert('Error updating patient: '+pErr.message);return;} // 2. Update patients table (new v65 table) if it exists try{ await SB.from('patients').upsert({ id, hospital_number:hosp, id_card:document.getElementById('ep-id')?.value.trim()||null, first_name:fn, surname:sn, contact_number:document.getElementById('ep-ph')?.value.trim()||null, dob:document.getElementById('ep-dob')?.value||null, sex:document.getElementById('ep-sex')?.value||null, locality:document.getElementById('ep-locality')?.value.trim()||null, op_performed_findings:document.getElementById('ep-opfindings')?.value.trim()||null, stoma_type_summary:document.getElementById('ep-stoma')?.value||null, assigned_nurse:assignedNurse, consultant:document.getElementById('ep-cons')?.value.trim()||null, ward:document.getElementById('ep-ward')?.value.trim()||null, past_medical_history:document.getElementById('ep-pmh')?.value.trim()||null, social_history:document.getElementById('ep-sh')?.value.trim()||null, drug_history:document.getElementById('ep-dh')?.value.trim()||null, complications:document.getElementById('ep-compl')?.value.trim()||null, pathway_type:pathwayType, patient_status:document.getElementById('ep-status')?.value||'active', surgery_date:surgDate, discharged_date:discDate, proposed_reversal_date:document.getElementById('ep-revprop')?.value||null, reversal_date:revDate, rip_date:ripDate, updated_at:new Date().toISOString() },{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('patients table upsert skipped:',e?.message||e);} // 3. Update episodes_main const episodePayload={ episode_type:pathwayType==='elective'?'Elective':pathwayType==='emergency'?'Emergency':'Bagging Advice for Fistula and Wounds', episode_status:projectEpisodeStatusFromStage(pathway), pathway_stage:pathway, admission_ward:mainPayload.current_ward, consultant:document.getElementById('ep-cons')?.value.trim()||null, surgery_date:surgDate, discharge_date:discDate, operation_performed:mainPayload.op_performed_findings, intended_stoma_type:document.getElementById('ep-stoma')?.value||null, actual_stoma_type:document.getElementById('ep-stoma')?.value||null, assigned_nurse:assignedNurse, modified_at:new Date().toISOString() }; const episodeId=existing.episode_id; if(episodeId){ const{error:eErr}=await SB.from('episodes_main').update(episodePayload).eq('id',episodeId); if(eErr)console.warn('Episode update:',eErr.message); }else{ const{error:eErr}=await SB.from('episodes_main').insert({patient_id:id,...episodePayload,created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()}); if(eErr)console.warn('Episode insert:',eErr.message); } // 4. Update stomas_main const stomaType=document.getElementById('ep-stoma')?.value||null; if(stomaType){ const stomaPayload={patient_id:id,stoma_type:stomaType,surgery_date:surgDate,date_formed:surgDate,stoma_status:'Active'}; if(existing.stoma_id){ await SB.from('stomas_main').update(stomaPayload).eq('id',existing.stoma_id).catch(e=>console.warn('Stoma update:',e?.message)); }else{ await SB.from('stomas_main').insert({...stomaPayload,episode_id:episodeId}).catch(e=>console.warn('Stoma insert:',e?.message)); } } await syncLegacyPatientMirrorById(id).catch(()=>{}); closeMo(); loadPatients(); if(currentPatientId===id){ const updated=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(updated){renderPatientSummary(updated);renderPathwayTimeline(updated);loadPdTab('patient-info',id);} } await logAuditTrailAction('update','patients_main',id,{description:`Patient updated: ${fn} ${sn}`}); } // Keep legacy function name as alias for any old references async function saveEditPatient(id){return saveEditPatientV66(id);} async function saveProjectPatientPathway(id,newStatus,oldStatus,notes){ const p=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(!p)return false; if(p.episode_id){ const {error}=await SB.from('episodes_main').update({pathway_stage:newStatus,episode_status:projectEpisodeStatusFromStage(newStatus),modified_at:new Date().toISOString()}).eq('id',p.episode_id); if(error){alert('Could not update pathway: '+error.message);return false;} }else{ const {error}=await SB.from('episodes_main').insert({patient_id:id,episode_type:'Review Only',episode_status:projectEpisodeStatusFromStage(newStatus),pathway_stage:newStatus,assigned_nurse:getLoggedInSubmitterName(),created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()}); if(error){alert('Could not create pathway episode: '+error.message);return false;} } try{await SB.from('pathway_history').insert({patient_id:id,changed_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName(),old_status:oldStatus||p.pathway_status,new_status:newStatus,notes});}catch(e){console.warn('Pathway history skipped:',e?.message||e);} await syncLegacyPatientMirrorById(id); return true; } async function openPatientPathwayModal(id,currentStatus){ const h=`

Update Pathway Stage

Select the new pathway stage for this patient
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function savePathwayChange(id,oldStatus){ const newStatus=document.getElementById('pathway-select')?.value; const notes=document.getElementById('pathway-notes')?.value.trim()||null; const ok=await saveProjectPatientPathway(id,newStatus,oldStatus,notes); if(!ok)return; closeMo(); loadPatients(); if(currentPatientId===id){const p=await getProjectPatientById(id); if(p){renderPatientSummary(p);renderPathwayTimeline(p);}} await logAuditTrailAction('update','episodes_main',id,{description:`Pathway changed: ${oldStatus} → ${newStatus}`}); } // ── CLINICAL REVIEWS ────────────────────────────────── async function populatePatientDropdowns(){ let data=[]; try{data=(await getProjectPatients()).filter(p=>p.is_active);} catch(e){ const fallback=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname').eq('is_active',true).order('surname'); data=fallback.data||[]; } const opts=data.sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))).map(p=>``).join(''); ['rev-patient-filter','teach-patient-filter','ref-patient-filter'].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el&&el.options.length<=1)el.innerHTML=''+opts; }); } async function loadReviews(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('reviews-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading...'; const patF=document.getElementById('rev-patient-filter')?.value||''; const fromF=document.getElementById('rev-from')?.value||''; const toF=document.getElementById('rev-to')?.value||''; let data=[],error=null; try{ let q=SB.from('daily_reviews').select('*').eq('is_deleted',false).order('review_date',{ascending:false}).limit(200); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); if(fromF)q=q.gte('review_date',fromF); if(toF)q=q.lte('review_date',toF); const r=await q;data=r.data||[];error=r.error; }catch(e){error=e;} if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`daily_reviews table not available. Use Stoma Timeline in patient profile for reviews.`;return;} const rows=data||[]; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No reviews found';return;} const patientIds=[...new Set(rows.map(r=>r.patient_id).filter(Boolean))]; const patMap={}; if(patientIds.length){ const{data:pts}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,patient_number,hospital_number').in('id',patientIds); (pts||[]).forEach(p=>{patMap[p.id]=p;}); } tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const pt=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown patient'; const output=[r.stoma_output,r.output_consistency,r.output_volume_ml?String(r.output_volume_ml)+' ml':null].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—'; const appliance=r.appliance_changed?'Changed':(r.appliance_type||'—'); const skin=r.skin_problem_present&&r.peristomal_skin?`${r.peristomal_skin} ⚠`:(r.peristomal_skin||'—'); const outcome=r.outcome||r.review_type||'—'; return ` ${r.review_date?new Date(r.review_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'}${r.review_time?`
${String(r.review_time).slice(0,5)}`:''} ${htmlSafe(pt)}
${htmlSafe(p?.patient_number||p?.hospital_number||'')} ${htmlSafe(r.reviewed_by||'—')} ${htmlSafe(appliance)} ${htmlSafe(skin)} ${htmlSafe(r.stoma_appearance||'—')} ${htmlSafe(output)} ${htmlSafe(r.self_care_status||'—')} ${htmlSafe(outcome)} `; }).join(''); } function clearReviewFilters(){ ['rev-patient-filter','rev-from','rev-to'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); loadReviews(); } async function openAddReviewModal(defaultPatientId=''){ let pts=[]; try{pts=(await getProjectPatients()).filter(p=>p.is_active);} catch(e){const fallback=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname').eq('is_active',true).order('surname'); pts=fallback.data||[];} pts.sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))); const ptOpts=pts.map(p=>``).join(''); const h=`

New Clinical Review

Saves directly to daily_reviews
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewReview(){ const patId=document.getElementById('nr-patient')?.value; const by=document.getElementById('nr-by')?.value.trim(); const date=document.getElementById('nr-date')?.value; if(!patId||!by||!date){alert('Patient, date and reviewed by are required.');return;} const patient=await getProjectPatientById(patId); const newPathway=document.getElementById('nr-pathway')?.value||null; const payload={ patient_id:patId, episode_id:patient?.episode_id||null, stoma_id:patient?.stoma_id||null, review_date:date, review_time:document.getElementById('nr-time')?.value||null, ward:document.getElementById('nr-ward')?.value.trim()||patient?.ward||null, bed_number:document.getElementById('nr-bed')?.value.trim()||null, reviewed_by:by, review_type:document.getElementById('nr-type')?.value||'Daily Review', stoma_appearance:document.getElementById('nr-appearance')?.value||null, stoma_output:document.getElementById('nr-output')?.value||null, output_consistency:document.getElementById('nr-consistency')?.value||null, output_volume_ml:document.getElementById('nr-volume')?.value?parseInt(document.getElementById('nr-volume').value,10):null, peristomal_skin:document.getElementById('nr-skin')?.value||null, appliance_changed:document.getElementById('nr-appliance')?.value==='true', leakage_present:document.getElementById('nr-leak')?.value==='true', skin_problem_present:document.getElementById('nr-skin-problem')?.value==='true', complications:document.getElementById('nr-comp')?.value.trim()||null, problem_type:document.getElementById('nr-comp')?.value.trim()||null, self_care_status:document.getElementById('nr-selfcare')?.value||null, teaching_progress:document.getElementById('nr-teaching')?.value||null, discharge_planning_status:document.getElementById('nr-discharge')?.value||null, outcome:document.getElementById('nr-outcome')?.value||null, clinical_notes:document.getElementById('nr-notes')?.value.trim()||null, submitted_at:new Date().toISOString(), submitted_by:by, is_active:true, is_deleted:false }; let review=null; try{ const r=await SB.from('daily_reviews').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(r.error)throw r.error; review=r.data; }catch(e){ console.warn('daily_reviews insert skipped:',e?.message||e); // Fall back to events table try{await SB.from('events').insert({patient_id:patId,event_type:'daily_review',event_date:payload.review_date,nurse_name:payload.reviewed_by,stoma_appearance:payload.stoma_appearance,peristomal_skin:payload.peristomal_skin,output_consistency:payload.stoma_output,notes:payload.clinical_notes});}catch(e2){} } if(newPathway){ await saveProjectPatientPathway(patId,newPathway,patient?.pathway_status,'Updated via clinical review'); } try{ await SB.from('clinical_reviews').upsert({ id:review.id, patient_id:patId, review_date:date, reviewed_by:by, bag_change:payload.appliance_changed, skin_condition:payload.peristomal_skin, stoma_output:payload.stoma_output, stoma_colour:payload.stoma_appearance, complications:payload.complications, free_text_notes:payload.clinical_notes, pathway_status:newPathway||patient?.pathway_status||null },{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('Legacy clinical_reviews mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} closeMo(); loadReviews(); if(currentPatientId===patId)loadPdTab('patient-info',patId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','daily_reviews',review?.id||null,{description:`Daily review added for patient`}); } async function deleteReview(id){ if(!confirm('Delete this review?'))return; const{error}=await SB.from('daily_reviews').update({is_deleted:true,is_active:false}).eq('id',id); if(error){alert('Could not delete review: '+error.message);return;} try{await SB.from('clinical_reviews').delete().eq('id',id);}catch(e){} loadReviews(); if(currentPatientId)loadPdTab('patient-info',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','daily_reviews',id,{description:'Daily review deleted'}); } // ── TEACHING / EDUCATION ──────────────────────────── // Step 6: uses Project Bible table teaching_education directly. async function getProjectPatientNameMap(){ const map={}; try{ const pts=await getProjectPatients(); (pts||[]).forEach(p=>{map[p.id]=`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,'').trim()||p.patient_number||'Unknown';}); }catch(e){ try{ const fallback=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname'); (fallback.data||[]).forEach(p=>{map[p.id]=`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,'').trim()||'Unknown';}); }catch(_e){} } return map; } function teachingUnderstandingBadge(value){ const v=String(value||'').toLowerCase(); if(!v)return '—'; let bg='#eef2f7', color='var(--navy)'; if(v.includes('good')||v.includes('excellent')||v.includes('understood')||v.includes('independent')){bg='#d4edda';color='#155724';} else if(v.includes('reinforcement')||v.includes('partial')||v.includes('fair')){bg='#fff3cd';color='#856404';} else if(v.includes('poor')||v.includes('unable')){bg='#f8d7da';color='#721c24';} return `${htmlSafe(value)}`; } async function loadTeaching(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('teaching-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading...'; const patF=document.getElementById('teach-patient-filter')?.value||''; const fromF=document.getElementById('teach-from')?.value||''; const toF=document.getElementById('teach-to')?.value||''; let data=[],error=null; try{ let q=SB.from('teaching_education').select('*').eq('is_deleted',false).order('education_date',{ascending:false}).limit(200); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); if(fromF)q=q.gte('education_date',fromF); if(toF)q=q.lte('education_date',toF); const r=await q;data=r.data||[];error=r.error; }catch(e){error=e;} if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`teaching_education not available. Use Teaching tab in patient profile.`;return;} const rows=data||[]; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No teaching records found';return;} const nameMap=await getProjectPatientNameMap(); tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const pt=nameMap[r.patient_id]||'Unknown'; const carerBadge=r.carer_involved?`Carer: ${htmlSafe(r.carer_name||'Yes')}`:'—'; return ` ${r.education_date?new Date(r.education_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(pt)} ${htmlSafe(r.nurse||r.submitted_by||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.education_type||r.topic||'—')}
${htmlSafe(r.topic&&r.education_type!==r.topic?r.topic:'')} ${htmlSafe(r.method||'—')} ${teachingUnderstandingBadge(r.patient_understanding)} ${carerBadge} `; }).join(''); } function clearTeachingFilters(){ ['teach-patient-filter','teach-from','teach-to'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';}); loadTeaching(); } async function openAddTeachingModal(preselectedPatientId=''){ let pts=[]; try{pts=(await getProjectPatients()).filter(p=>p.is_active);} catch(e){const fallback=await SB.from('patients').select('id,first_name,surname').eq('is_active',true).order('surname');pts=fallback.data||[];} const ptOpts=(pts||[]) .sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))) .map(p=>``).join(''); const educationTypes=['Pre-Op Education','Post-Op Education','Appliance Education','Skin Care Education','Diet / Fluids','Discharge Education','Family / Carer Education','Long-Term Education']; const topics=['Bag change','Emptying bag','Diet advice','Fluid advice','Skin care','Recognising complications','Appliance supplies','Activity and lifestyle','Swimming/Bathing','Returning to work','Support groups','Medication management','Odour control','Clothing tips','Discharge preparation']; const h=`

New Teaching Session

Record a patient education session — saves to teaching_education
