`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } function toggleCarerName(){ const v=document.getElementById('nt-carer')?.value==='true'; const w=document.getElementById('nt-carer-name-wrap'); if(w)w.style.display=v?'block':'none'; } async function saveNewTeaching(){ const patId=document.getElementById('nt-patient')?.value; const by=document.getElementById('nt-by')?.value.trim(); const date=document.getElementById('nt-date')?.value; const educationType=document.getElementById('nt-type')?.value; if(!patId||!by||!date||!educationType){alert('Patient, date, nurse and education type are required.');return;} const patient=await getProjectPatientById(patId).catch(()=>null); const carerInvolved=document.getElementById('nt-carer')?.value==='true'; const payload={ patient_id:patId, episode_id:patient?.episode_id||null, education_date:date, education_time:null, nurse:by, ward_clinic:patient?.ward||null, education_type:educationType, topic:document.getElementById('nt-topic')?.value||educationType, method:document.getElementById('nt-method')?.value||null, patient_understanding:document.getElementById('nt-response')?.value||null, self_care_status:document.getElementById('nt-selfcare')?.value||null, carer_involved:carerInvolved, carer_name:carerInvolved?document.getElementById('nt-carer-name')?.value.trim()||null:null, leaflets_given:document.getElementById('nt-leaflets')?.value==='true', education_completed:document.getElementById('nt-completed')?.value==='true', outcome:document.getElementById('nt-outcome')?.value||null, education_notes:document.getElementById('nt-notes')?.value.trim()||null, submitted_at:new Date().toISOString(), submitted_by:by, is_active:true, is_deleted:false }; let record=null; try{ const r=await SB.from('teaching_education').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(r.error)throw r.error; record=r.data; }catch(e){ console.warn('teaching_education insert skipped:',e?.message||e); // Fall back to teaching_sessions table try{await SB.from('teaching_sessions').insert({patient_id:patId,session_date:payload.education_date,nurse_name:payload.nurse||payload.submitted_by,notes:payload.education_notes});}catch(e2){} } try{ await SB.from('teaching_records').upsert({ id:record?.id, patient_id:patId, teaching_date:date, taught_by:by, topic:payload.topic, method:payload.method, patient_response:payload.patient_understanding, carer_involved:payload.carer_involved, carer_name:payload.carer_name, notes:payload.education_notes },{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('Legacy teaching_records mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} closeMo(); loadTeaching(); if(currentPatientId===patId)loadPdTab('teaching',patId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','teaching_education',record?.id||null,{description:`Teaching session recorded`}); } async function deleteTeaching(id){ if(!confirm('Delete this teaching record?'))return; const{error}=await SB.from('teaching_education').update({is_deleted:true,is_active:false}).eq('id',id); if(error){alert('Could not delete teaching record: '+error.message);return;} try{await SB.from('teaching_records').delete().eq('id',id);}catch(e){} loadTeaching(); if(currentPatientId)loadPdTab('teaching',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','teaching_education',id,{description:'Teaching record deleted'}); } // ── REFERRALS ────────────────────────────────────────── // Step 7: Referrals now use Project Bible table community_referrals. function normaliseReferralStatus(status){ const s=String(status||'Pending').trim(); if(['Pending','Sent','Accepted','Completed','Declined'].includes(s))return s; if(s.toLowerCase()==='required')return 'Pending'; return s||'Pending'; } function referralTypeBadge(type){ const t=String(type||'Outbound').trim()||'Outbound'; const isInbound=t.toLowerCase()==='inbound'; const isCommunity=t.toLowerCase().includes('community'); const style=isInbound?'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;':isCommunity?'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20;':'background:#eef2f7;color:var(--navy);'; return `${htmlSafe(t)}`; } function referralReasonText(r){ const raw=String(r?.referral_notes||'').trim(); if(!raw)return ''; return raw.replace(/^Reason:\s*/i,'').replace(/\s*\|\s*Notes:\s*/i,' · '); } function communityReferralToLegacyStatus(status){ const s=normaliseReferralStatus(status); if(['Pending','Accepted','Completed','Declined'].includes(s))return s; if(s==='Sent')return 'Pending'; return 'Pending'; } async function patientNameMapForIds(patientIds){ const patMap={}; const ids=[...new Set((patientIds||[]).filter(Boolean))]; if(ids.length){ const{data:pts}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,patient_number,hospital_number').in('id',ids); (pts||[]).forEach(p=>{patMap[p.id]=p;}); } return patMap; } async function loadReferrals(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('referrals-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading community_referrals...'; const patF=document.getElementById('ref-patient-filter')?.value||''; const typeF=document.getElementById('ref-type-filter')?.value||''; const statusF=document.getElementById('ref-status-filter')?.value||''; let q=SB.from('community_referrals') .select('*') .eq('is_active',true) .order('referral_date',{ascending:false}) .limit(200); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); if(typeF)q=q.eq('referral_type',typeF); if(statusF)q=q.eq('referral_status',statusF); const{data,error}=await q; if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`Error loading community_referrals: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} const rows=data||[]; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No referrals found';return;} const patMap=await patientNameMapForIds(rows.map(r=>r.patient_id)); const statusColours={Pending:'background:#fff8e1;color:#e65100;',Sent:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;',Accepted:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;',Completed:'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20;',Declined:'background:#fdecea;color:#b71c1c;'}; tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const pt=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown patient'; const status=normaliseReferralStatus(r.referral_status); const sc=statusColours[status]||'background:#f5f5f5;color:#757575;'; const statusBadge=`${htmlSafe(status)}`; return ` ${r.referral_date?new Date(r.referral_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(pt)}
${htmlSafe(p?.patient_number||p?.hospital_number||'')} ${referralTypeBadge(r.referral_type)} ${htmlSafe(r.referral_sent_to||'—')} ${htmlSafe(referralReasonText(r)||'—')} ${statusBadge} `; }).join(''); } async function openAddReferralModal(preselectPatientId=null){ let pts=[]; try{pts=(await getProjectPatients()).filter(p=>p.is_active);} catch(e){ const fallback=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname').eq('is_active',true).eq('is_deleted',false).order('surname'); pts=fallback.data||[]; } const ptOpts=(pts||[]).sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))).map(p=>``).join(''); const services=['Community Nurse','Dietitian','Physiotherapy','Psychologist','Social Worker','Oncology','Colorectal Surgeon','Dermatology','Occupational Therapy','GP','Other']; const h=`

New Referral

Record an inbound or outbound referral — saves to community_referrals
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewReferral(){ const patId=document.getElementById('nref-patient')?.value; const date=document.getElementById('nref-date')?.value; const to=document.getElementById('nref-to')?.value; if(!patId||!date||!to){alert('Patient, date and referred to/from are required.');return;} const reason=document.getElementById('nref-reason')?.value.trim()||''; const notes=document.getElementById('nref-notes')?.value.trim()||''; const combinedNotes=[reason?`Reason: ${reason}`:null,notes?`Notes: ${notes}`:null].filter(Boolean).join(' | ')||null; const payload={ patient_id:patId, referral_date:date, referral_type:document.getElementById('nref-type')?.value||'Outbound', referral_sent_by:document.getElementById('nref-by')?.value.trim()||getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, referral_sent_to:to, referral_status:'Pending', referral_notes:combinedNotes, is_active:true }; let record=null; try{ const r=await SB.from('community_referrals').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(r.error)throw r.error; record=r.data; }catch(e){ console.warn('community_referrals insert skipped:',e?.message||e); // Fall through — mirror to referrals table as fallback } if(record){ try{ await SB.from('referrals').upsert({ id:record.id, patient_id:patId, referral_date:date, referral_type:payload.referral_type, referred_by:payload.referral_sent_by, referred_to:payload.referral_sent_to, reason:reason||payload.referral_type, notes:notes||combinedNotes, status:'Pending' },{onConflict:'id'}); }catch(e){console.warn('Legacy referrals mirror skipped:',e?.message||e);} } closeMo(); loadReferrals(); if(currentPatientId===patId)loadPdTab('referrals',patId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','community_referrals',record?.id||null,{description:`Referral recorded`}); } async function updateReferralStatus(id){ const newStatus=prompt('Update status:\nOptions: Pending, Sent, Accepted, Completed, Declined'); if(!newStatus)return; const valid=['Pending','Sent','Accepted','Completed','Declined']; if(!valid.includes(newStatus)){alert('Invalid status. Choose: Pending, Sent, Accepted, Completed, or Declined');return;} const patch={referral_status:newStatus,confirmation_date:newStatus!=='Pending'?TODAY:null}; const{data:updated,error}=await SB.from('community_referrals').update(patch).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not update referral: '+error.message);return;} try{await SB.from('referrals').update({status:communityReferralToLegacyStatus(newStatus),response_date:newStatus!=='Pending'?TODAY:null}).eq('id',id);}catch(e){} loadReferrals(); if(currentPatientId&&updated?.patient_id===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('referrals',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('update','community_referrals',id,{description:`Referral status changed to ${newStatus}`}); } async function deleteReferral(id){ if(!confirm('Delete this referral?'))return; const{data:updated,error}=await SB.from('community_referrals').update({is_active:false}).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not delete referral: '+error.message);return;} try{await SB.from('referrals').delete().eq('id',id);}catch(e){} loadReferrals(); if(currentPatientId&&updated?.patient_id===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('referrals',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','community_referrals',id,{description:'Referral deleted'}); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STEP 9 — APPLIANCES / DISCHARGE / FOLLOW-UPS // Uses Project Bible Phase 2 tables directly. // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function fmtMaybeDate(value){ if(!value)return '—'; try{return new Date(String(value).slice(0,10)+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-MT');} catch(e){return String(value).slice(0,10)||'—';} } function boolText(v){return v?'Yes':'No';} function currentBadge(v){return v?'Current':'Previous';} function followupStatusBadge(status){ const s=String(status||'Required'); const colours={Required:'background:#fff8e1;color:#e65100;',Booked:'background:#e3f2fd;color:#0d47a1;',Seen:'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20;',Completed:'background:#e8f5e9;color:#1b5e20;',DNTU:'background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;',Cancelled:'background:#fdecea;color:#b71c1c;'}; return `${htmlSafe(s)}`; } async function populateWorkflowPatientSelect(selectId, selectedValue=''){ const el=document.getElementById(selectId); if(!el)return; const keep=selectedValue||el.value||''; let pts=[]; try{pts=await getProjectPatients();}catch(e){pts=[];} pts=pts.filter(p=>p.is_active).sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))); el.innerHTML=''+pts.map(p=>``).join(''); } async function patientSelectOptions(selectedValue=''){ let pts=[]; try{pts=await getProjectPatients();}catch(e){pts=[];} return pts.filter(p=>p.is_active).sort((a,b)=>String(a.surname||'').localeCompare(String(b.surname||''))).map(p=>``).join(''); } async function getLatestEpisodeForPatient(patientId){ const {data,error}=await SB.from('episodes_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patientId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(1).maybeSingle(); if(error)return null; return data||null; } async function getLatestStomaForPatient(patientId){ const {data,error}=await SB.from('stomas_main').select('*').eq('patient_id',patientId).eq('is_deleted',false).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(1).maybeSingle(); if(error)return null; return data||null; } async function ensureEpisodeForPatient(patientId){ let ep=await getLatestEpisodeForPatient(patientId); if(ep)return ep; const {data,error}=await SB.from('episodes_main').insert({ patient_id:patientId, episode_type:'Review Only', episode_status:'Active', pathway_stage:'Referral / New Patient', post_op_review_required:true, daily_review_required:true, discharge_planning_required:true, follow_up_required:true, created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null }).select('*').single(); if(error)throw error; await syncLegacyPatientMirrorById(patientId); return data; } async function getPatientNamesMap(rows){return await patientNameMapForIds((rows||[]).map(r=>r.patient_id));} async function loadAppliances(){ await populateWorkflowPatientSelect('appliance-patient-filter'); const tbody=document.getElementById('appliances-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading appliances_main...'; const patF=document.getElementById('appliance-patient-filter')?.value||''; const curF=document.getElementById('appliance-current-filter')?.value||''; let q=SB.from('appliances_main').select('*').eq('is_active',true).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(300); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); if(curF==='current')q=q.eq('is_current',true); if(curF==='previous')q=q.eq('is_current',false); const {data:mainApplData,error}=await q; // Also load from new appliances table let q2=SB.from('appliances').select('*').order('started_date',{ascending:false}).limit(200); if(patF)q2=q2.eq('patient_id',patF); if(curF==='current')q2=q2.eq('is_current',true); if(curF==='previous')q2=q2.eq('is_current',false); const {data:newAppl}=await q2; // Normalise new appliances to match display structure const normNew=(newAppl||[]).map(a=>({ ...a, date_started:a.started_date, appliance_type:a.appliance_type, appliance_size:a.size, product_name:a.product_name, product_code:a.product_reference, manufacturer:a.brand, accessory_type:a.accessory_type, reason_for_change:a.reason_for_change, outcome:null, _source:'new' })); const combinedRows=[...(mainApplData||[]),...normNew].sort((a,b)=>String(b.date_started||b.created_at||'').localeCompare(String(a.date_started||a.created_at||''))); if(error&&!normNew.length){tbody.innerHTML=`Error loading appliances: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} const rows=combinedRows; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No appliance records found';return;} const patMap=await getPatientNamesMap(rows); tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const pt=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown patient'; return ` ${fmtMaybeDate(r.date_started)} ${htmlSafe(pt)}
${htmlSafe(p?.patient_number||p?.hospital_number||'')} ${htmlSafe(r.appliance_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.appliance_size||'—')} ${htmlSafe([r.product_name,r.product_code,r.manufacturer].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')} ${htmlSafe([r.accessory_type,r.accessory_name].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')} ${currentBadge(r.is_current)} ${htmlSafe([r.reason_for_change,r.outcome].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||'—')} `; }).join(''); } async function openAddApplianceModal(preselectedPatientId=''){ const patientOptions=await patientSelectOptions(preselectedPatientId); const h=`

Add Appliance

Record appliance/product details — saves to appliances_main
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewAppliance(){ const patientId=document.getElementById('nap-patient')?.value||''; if(!patientId){alert('Patient is required.');return;} const ep=await getLatestEpisodeForPatient(patientId); const st=await getLatestStomaForPatient(patientId); const payload={ patient_id:patientId, episode_id:ep?.id||null, stoma_id:st?.id||null, date_started:document.getElementById('nap-date')?.value||null, is_current:document.getElementById('nap-current')?.value==='true', appliance_type:document.getElementById('nap-type')?.value||null, appliance_size:document.getElementById('nap-size')?.value||null, product_name:document.getElementById('nap-product')?.value.trim()||null, product_code:document.getElementById('nap-code')?.value.trim()||null, manufacturer:document.getElementById('nap-maker')?.value.trim()||null, accessory_type:document.getElementById('nap-accessory')?.value||null, accessory_name:document.getElementById('nap-accessory-name')?.value.trim()||null, reason_for_change:document.getElementById('nap-reason')?.value||null, outcome:document.getElementById('nap-outcome')?.value||null, appliance_notes:document.getElementById('nap-notes')?.value.trim()||null, nurse:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, created_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, is_active:true }; const{data,error}=await SB.from('appliances_main').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(error){alert('Error saving appliance: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); loadAppliances(); if(currentPatientId===patientId)loadPdTab('appliances',patientId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','appliances_main',data.id,{description:'Appliance record added'}); } async function deleteAppliance(id,patientId=null){ if(!confirm('Delete this appliance record?'))return; const{data,error}=await SB.from('appliances_main').update({is_active:false}).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not delete appliance: '+error.message);return;} loadAppliances(); const pid=patientId||data?.patient_id; if(currentPatientId&&pid===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('appliances',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','appliances_main',id,{description:'Appliance record deleted'}); } async function loadDischargePlans(){ await populateWorkflowPatientSelect('discharge-patient-filter').catch(()=>{}); const tbody=document.getElementById('discharge-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading...'; const patF=document.getElementById('discharge-patient-filter')?.value||''; const statusF=document.getElementById('discharge-status-filter')?.value||''; let data=[],error=null; try{ let q=SB.from('discharge_planning').select('*').eq('is_active',true).order('created_at',{ascending:false}).limit(300); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); const r=await q;data=r.data||[];error=r.error; }catch(e){error=e;} if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`discharge_planning not available.`;return;} let rows=data; if(statusF==='active')rows=rows.filter(r=>!r.actual_discharge_date); if(statusF==='completed')rows=rows.filter(r=>!!r.actual_discharge_date); if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No discharge plans found.';return;} const patMap=await getPatientNamesMap(rows).catch(()=>({})); tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const pt=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown'; return ` ${fmtMaybeDate(r.planning_started_date)} ${htmlSafe(pt)} ${htmlSafe(r.ward||'—')} ${fmtMaybeDate(r.expected_discharge_date)} ${fmtMaybeDate(r.actual_discharge_date)} ${htmlSafe(r.self_care_status||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.community_referral_status||'—')} ${r.followup_booked?'✓ Booked':'—'} ${htmlSafe(r.discharge_outcome||'—')} `; }).join(''); } async function loadGlobalDischargeLetters(){ const tbody=document.getElementById('dl-global-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading...'; const statusF=document.getElementById('dl-status-filter')?.value||''; const search=(document.getElementById('dl-search')?.value||'').toLowerCase().trim(); let q=SB.from('discharge_letters').select('*').order('letter_date',{ascending:false}).limit(200); if(statusF)q=q.eq('status',statusF); const{data,error}=await q; if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`Error: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} let rows=data||[]; // Fetch patient names for all letters const patIds=[...new Set(rows.map(r=>r.patient_id).filter(Boolean))]; let patMap={}; if(patIds.length){ const{data:pts}=await SB.from('patients_main').select('id,first_name,surname,id_card_number').in('id',patIds); (pts||[]).forEach(p=>{patMap[p.id]=p;}); } if(search)rows=rows.filter(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const name=p?`${p.first_name||''} ${p.surname||''}`.toLowerCase():''; return name.includes(search)||String(r.nurse_name||'').toLowerCase().includes(search)||String(r.procedure_performed||'').toLowerCase().includes(search); }); if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No discharge letters found.';return;} tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(l=>{ const p=patMap[l.patient_id]; const ptName=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown'; const ptId=p?.id_card_number||''; const statusBg=l.status==='finalised'?'#d4edda':'#fff3cd'; const statusColor=l.status==='finalised'?'#155724':'#856404'; return ` ${l.letter_date?new Date(l.letter_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'} ${htmlSafe(ptName)}
${htmlSafe(ptId)} ${htmlSafe(l.nurse_name||'—')} ${htmlSafe(l.procedure_performed||'—')} ${htmlSafe(l.appliance_on_discharge||'—')} ${htmlSafe(l.status||'draft')} ${l.status==='draft'?``:''} `; }).join(''); } async function openAddDischargeModal(preselectedPatientId=''){ const patientOptions=await patientSelectOptions(preselectedPatientId); const h=`

Discharge Plan

Record discharge readiness — saves to discharge_planning
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewDischargePlan(){ const patientId=document.getElementById('ndc-patient')?.value||''; if(!patientId){alert('Patient is required.');return;} let ep; try{ep=await ensureEpisodeForPatient(patientId);}catch(e){alert('Could not create/load episode: '+(e.message||e));return;} const payload={ patient_id:patientId, episode_id:ep.id, ward:document.getElementById('ndc-ward')?.value.trim()||null, planning_started_date:document.getElementById('ndc-start')?.value||TODAY, expected_discharge_date:document.getElementById('ndc-expected')?.value||null, actual_discharge_date:document.getElementById('ndc-actual')?.value||null, self_care_status:document.getElementById('ndc-selfcare')?.value||null, patient_can_empty_bag:document.getElementById('ndc-empty')?.checked||false, patient_can_change_bag:document.getElementById('ndc-change')?.checked||false, understands_skin_care:document.getElementById('ndc-skin')?.checked||false, understands_diet_fluids:document.getElementById('ndc-diet')?.checked||false, appliances_supplied:document.getElementById('ndc-supply')?.checked||false, community_referral_status:document.getElementById('ndc-community')?.value||'Not Required', followup_booked:document.getElementById('ndc-follow')?.checked||false, followup_date:document.getElementById('ndc-followdate')?.value||null, discharge_outcome:document.getElementById('ndc-outcome')?.value||null, discharge_notes:document.getElementById('ndc-notes')?.value.trim()||null, submitted_at:new Date().toISOString(), submitted_by:getLoggedInSubmitterName()||null, is_active:true }; const{data,error}=await SB.from('discharge_planning').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(error){alert('Error saving discharge plan: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); loadDischargePlans(); if(currentPatientId===patientId)loadPdTab('discharge',patientId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','discharge_planning',data.id,{description:'Discharge plan added'}); } async function markDischargeComplete(id){ const today=TODAY; const{data,error}=await SB.from('discharge_planning').update({actual_discharge_date:today,discharge_outcome:'Discharged'}).eq('id',id).select('patient_id,episode_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not complete discharge plan: '+error.message);return;} if(data?.episode_id){try{await SB.from('episodes_main').update({episode_status:'Discharged',pathway_stage:'Discharged',discharge_date:today}).eq('id',data.episode_id);}catch(e){}} loadDischargePlans(); if(currentPatientId&&data?.patient_id===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('discharge',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('update','discharge_planning',id,{description:'Discharge marked complete'}); } async function deleteDischargePlan(id,patientId=null){ if(!confirm('Delete this discharge plan?'))return; const{data,error}=await SB.from('discharge_planning').update({is_active:false}).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not delete discharge plan: '+error.message);return;} loadDischargePlans(); const pid=patientId||data?.patient_id; if(currentPatientId&&pid===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('discharge',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','discharge_planning',id,{description:'Discharge plan deleted'}); } async function loadFollowups(){ await populateWorkflowPatientSelect('followup-patient-filter'); const tbody=document.getElementById('followups-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; tbody.innerHTML='Loading follow_ups...'; const patF=document.getElementById('followup-patient-filter')?.value||''; const statusF=document.getElementById('followup-status-filter')?.value||''; let q=SB.from('follow_ups').select('*').eq('is_active',true).order('followup_due_date',{ascending:true}).limit(300); if(patF)q=q.eq('patient_id',patF); if(statusF)q=q.eq('followup_status',statusF); const{data,error}=await q; if(error){tbody.innerHTML=`Error loading follow_ups: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} const rows=data||[]; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML='No follow-ups found';return;} const patMap=await getPatientNamesMap(rows); tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(r=>{ const p=patMap[r.patient_id]; const pt=p?`${p.surname||''}, ${p.first_name||''}`.replace(/^,\s*/,''):'Unknown patient'; return ` ${fmtMaybeDate(r.followup_due_date)} ${fmtMaybeDate(r.appointment_date)} ${htmlSafe(String(r.appointment_time||'').slice(0,5))} ${htmlSafe(pt)}
${htmlSafe(p?.patient_number||p?.hospital_number||'')} ${htmlSafe(r.followup_type||'—')} ${followupStatusBadge(r.followup_status)} ${htmlSafe(r.assigned_nurse||'—')} ${htmlSafe(r.outcome||'—')} ${fmtMaybeDate(r.next_followup_date)} `; }).join(''); } async function openAddFollowupModal(preselectedPatientId=''){ const patientOptions=await patientSelectOptions(preselectedPatientId); const h=`

Add Follow-Up

Record follow-up planning — saves to follow_ups
`; document.getElementById('mb').innerHTML=h; document.getElementById('mo').classList.add('open'); } async function saveNewFollowup(){ const patientId=document.getElementById('nfu-patient')?.value||''; if(!patientId){alert('Patient is required.');return;} const ep=await getLatestEpisodeForPatient(patientId); const st=await getLatestStomaForPatient(patientId); const payload={ patient_id:patientId, episode_id:ep?.id||null, stoma_id:st?.id||null, followup_due_date:document.getElementById('nfu-due')?.value||null, appointment_date:document.getElementById('nfu-appt-date')?.value||null, appointment_time:document.getElementById('nfu-appt-time')?.value||null, followup_type:document.getElementById('nfu-type')?.value||'Post-Discharge', followup_status:document.getElementById('nfu-status')?.value||'Required', assigned_nurse:document.getElementById('nfu-nurse')?.value.trim()||null, outcome:document.getElementById('nfu-outcome')?.value||null, next_followup_required:!!document.getElementById('nfu-next')?.value, next_followup_date:document.getElementById('nfu-next')?.value||null, notes:document.getElementById('nfu-notes')?.value.trim()||null, is_active:true }; const{data,error}=await SB.from('follow_ups').insert(payload).select('id').single(); if(error){alert('Error saving follow-up: '+error.message);return;} closeMo(); loadFollowups(); if(currentPatientId===patientId)loadPdTab('followups',patientId); await logAuditTrailAction('insert','follow_ups',data.id,{description:'Follow-up added'}); } async function updateFollowupStatus(id,patientId=null){ const newStatus=prompt('Update follow-up status:\nRequired, Booked, Seen, DNTU, Cancelled, Completed'); if(!newStatus)return; const valid=['Required','Booked','Seen','DNTU','Cancelled','Completed']; if(!valid.includes(newStatus)){alert('Invalid status.');return;} const patch={followup_status:newStatus}; if(newStatus==='Seen')patch.seen_date=TODAY; if(newStatus==='DNTU')patch.did_not_turn_up=true; if(newStatus==='Cancelled')patch.cancelled=true; const{data,error}=await SB.from('follow_ups').update(patch).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not update follow-up: '+error.message);return;} loadFollowups(); const pid=patientId||data?.patient_id; if(currentPatientId&&pid===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('followups',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('update','follow_ups',id,{description:`Follow-up status changed to ${newStatus}`}); } async function deleteFollowup(id){ if(!confirm('Delete this follow-up?'))return; const{data,error}=await SB.from('follow_ups').update({is_active:false}).eq('id',id).select('patient_id').maybeSingle(); if(error){alert('Could not delete follow-up: '+error.message);return;} loadFollowups(); if(currentPatientId&&data?.patient_id===currentPatientId)loadPdTab('followups',currentPatientId); await logAuditTrailAction('delete','follow_ups',id,{description:'Follow-up deleted'}); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // v43 — KPI DASHBOARD / COMMAND CENTRE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let latestKpiSnapshotData=null; function kpiSelectedPeriod(){ const now=new Date(); const mEl=document.getElementById('kpi-month'); const yEl=document.getElementById('kpi-year'); if(mEl&&!mEl.value)mEl.value=String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); if(yEl&&!yEl.value)yEl.value=String(now.getFullYear()); const month=mEl?.value||String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); const year=yEl?.value||String(now.getFullYear()); const start=`${year}-${month}-01`; const next=new Date(Number(year),Number(month),1); const end=fmt(next); const monthName=new Date(Number(year),Number(month)-1,1).toLocaleDateString('en-MT',{month:'long'}); return {month,year,start,end,monthName}; } function kpiCount(rows){return (rows||[]).length;} function kpiPct(n,d){return d?Math.round((Number(n||0)/Number(d||1))*100):0;} async function safeSelect(table,columns,filterFn){ try{ let q=SB.from(table).select(columns); if(filterFn)q=filterFn(q); const {data,error}=await q; if(error)throw error; return data||[]; }catch(e){ console.warn('KPI query skipped:',table,e?.message||e); return []; } } async function loadHomeKpiTile(){ const el=document.getElementById('tile-kpi-events'); if(!el)return; const now=new Date(); const start=`${now.getFullYear()}-${String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-01`; const next=new Date(now.getFullYear(),now.getMonth()+1,1); const end=fmt(next); const rows=await safeSelect('kpi_events','id',q=>q.gte('event_date',start).lt('event_date',end)); el.textContent=rows.length; } async function loadKpiDashboard(){ const body=document.getElementById('kpi-dashboard-body'); if(!body)return; const now=new Date(); const mEl=document.getElementById('kpi-month'); const yEl=document.getElementById('kpi-year'); if(mEl&&!mEl.value)mEl.value=String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); if(yEl&&!yEl.value)yEl.value=String(now.getFullYear()); body.innerHTML='
Loading KPI data...
'; const p=kpiSelectedPeriod(); // Pull from real tables using safeSelect (returns [] if table missing) const [ allPatients, newPatients, episodesMain, appts, events, urgentReviews, teachingSessions, dischargeLetters, followUps, stomas, appliances, preOpSitings ] = await Promise.all([ safeSelect('patients_main','id,patient_status,is_active,is_deleted,pathway_type,created_at',q=>q.eq('is_deleted',false)), safeSelect('patients_main','id,created_at,pathway_type',q=>q.eq('is_deleted',false).gte('created_at',p.start).lt('created_at',p.end)), safeSelect('episodes_main','id,episode_type,episode_status,pathway_stage,surgery_date,discharge_date,assigned_nurse',q=>q.eq('is_deleted',false)), safeSelect('appointments','id,appt_date,status,patient_id',q=>q.gte('appt_date',p.start).lte('appt_date',p.end)), safeSelect('events','id,event_date,event_type,stoma_appearance,peristomal_skin,output_consistency,nurse_name',q=>q.gte('event_date',p.start).lte('event_date',p.end)), safeSelect('urgent_stoma_daily_review','id,review_date,stoma_appearance,skin_condition,output_consistency_type,post_op_day_number',q=>q.gte('review_date',p.start).lte('review_date',p.end)), safeSelect('teaching_sessions','id,session_date,item_9_dispose_waste',q=>q.gte('session_date',p.start).lte('session_date',p.end)), safeSelect('discharge_letters','id,letter_date,status,nurse_name',q=>q.gte('letter_date',p.start).lte('letter_date',p.end)), safeSelect('follow_ups','id,follow_up_date,status,assigned_nurse',q=>q), safeSelect('stomas','id,stoma_type,status,formed_date',q=>q), safeSelect('appliances','id,started_date,is_current,appliance_type',q=>q), safeSelect('pre_op_siting','id,siting_date',q=>q.gte('siting_date',p.start).lte('siting_date',p.end)) ]); // ── Compute KPIs ────────────────────────────────────── const active=allPatients.filter(x=>x.is_active!==false); const elective=newPatients.filter(x=>x.pathway_type==='elective'); const emergency=newPatients.filter(x=>x.pathway_type==='emergency'); const bagging=newPatients.filter(x=>x.pathway_type==='bagging_advice'); const seen=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='attended'); const dntu=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='did_not_attend'); const cancelled=appts.filter(a=>a.status==='cancelled'); const dntuRate=appts.length?Math.round(dntu.length/appts.length*100):0; const attendRate=appts.length?Math.round(seen.length/appts.length*100):0; const dailyRevs=[...events.filter(e=>e.event_type==='daily_review'),...urgentReviews]; const duskyStoma=dailyRevs.filter(r=>/dusky|necrotic|slough/i.test(r.stoma_appearance||'')); const skinIssues=dailyRevs.filter(r=>/excoriat|erythem|broken|raw|pus|fungal/i.test(r.peristomal_skin||r.skin_condition||'')); const activeStomas=stomas.filter(s=>s.status==='active'); const reversedStomas=stomas.filter(s=>s.status==='reversed'); const currentAppliances=appliances.filter(a=>a.is_current); const finalisedLetters=dischargeLetters.filter(l=>l.status==='finalised'); const draftLetters=dischargeLetters.filter(l=>l.status==='draft'); const activeFollowUps=followUps.filter(f=>f.status==='active'); // Nurse workload from appointments const nurseAppts={}; appts.forEach(a=>{const n=a.nurse_name||'Common';nurseAppts[n]=(nurseAppts[n]||0)+1;}); // ── Build tab nav ───────────────────────────────────── const kpiTabs=[ {id:'overview',label:'📊 Overview',icon:'📊'}, {id:'patients',label:'👥 Patients',icon:'👥'}, {id:'appointments',label:'📋 Appointments',icon:'📋'}, {id:'clinical',label:'🔵 Clinical',icon:'🔵'}, {id:'teaching',label:'📚 Teaching',icon:'📚'}, {id:'discharge',label:'📄 Discharge',icon:'📄'}, {id:'followups',label:'🔁 Follow-Up Centre',icon:'🔁'}, {id:'stomas',label:'⭕ Stomas',icon:'⭕'}, ]; const pill=(val,warn,danger)=>val===0?`${val}` :`${val}`; const kBlock=(label,val,sub,trend='')=>`
${htmlSafe(label)}
${htmlSafe(String(val))}
${sub?`
${htmlSafe(sub)}
`:''} ${trend?`
${trend}
`:''}
`; const grid=(...blocks)=>`
${blocks.join('')}
`; const navBtn=(section,label)=>``; const alertBox=(msg,type='warn')=>`
⚠ ${htmlSafe(msg)}
`; // Build tab content const tabContent={ overview:`
Service Position — ${htmlSafe(p.monthName)} ${p.year}
${dntuRate>=15?alertBox(`High DNTU rate this month: ${dntuRate}% (${dntu.length} patients did not attend)`,'danger'):''} ${duskyStoma.length?alertBox(`${duskyStoma.length} stoma appearance concern(s) recorded this month (dusky/necrotic/slough)`,'danger'):''} ${skinIssues.length>=3?alertBox(`${skinIssues.length} peristomal skin issues recorded this month`,'warn'):''} ${draftLetters.length?alertBox(`${draftLetters.length} discharge letter(s) still in draft — awaiting finalisation`,'warn'):''}
${grid( kBlock('Active Patients',active.length,'currently under care'), kBlock('New This Month',newPatients.length,`${elective.length} elective · ${emergency.length} emergency · ${bagging.length} bagging`), kBlock('Appointments',appts.length,`${seen.length} seen · ${dntu.length} DNTU · ${cancelled.length} cancelled`,pill(dntuRate+'%',dntuRate>=10,dntuRate>=15)+' DNTU rate'), kBlock('Daily Reviews',dailyRevs.length,'stoma assessments this month'), kBlock('Teaching Sessions',teachingSessions.length,'sessions this month'), kBlock('Discharge Letters',dischargeLetters.length,`${finalisedLetters.length} finalised · ${draftLetters.length} draft`), kBlock('Active Stomas',activeStomas.length,`${reversedStomas.length} reversed to date`), kBlock('Pre-Op Sitings',preOpSitings.length,'this month') )}
${navBtn('patients','Go to Patients')} ${navBtn('followups','Go to Follow-Up Centre')} ${navBtn('section-discharge','Go to Discharge Letters')}
`, patients:`
Patient Breakdown
${grid( kBlock('Total Active',active.length,'patients currently active'), kBlock('Inpatients',active.filter(p=>p.patient_status==='inpatient').length,'currently admitted'), kBlock('Outpatients',active.filter(p=>p.patient_status==='outpatient').length,'in outpatient follow-up'), kBlock('New This Month',newPatients.length,'registered this month'), kBlock('Elective New',elective.length,'new elective surgery pathway'), kBlock('Emergency New',emergency.length,'new emergency surgery pathway'), kBlock('Bagging Advice for Fistula and Wounds New',bagging.length,'new bagging advice only'), kBlock('Pre-Op Sitings',preOpSitings.length,'completed this month') )}
Pathway Type Distribution
${['elective','emergency','bagging_advice'].map(pt=>{ const cnt=allPatients.filter(x=>x.pathway_type===pt&&x.is_active!==false).length; const col={'elective':'#0f766e','emergency':'#b91c1c','bagging_advice':'#7c3aed'}[pt]; return `
${pt.replace('_',' ')}
${cnt}
`; }).join('')}
${navBtn('patients','View All Patients')} ${navBtn('patient-outcomes','Patient Outcomes')}
`, appointments:`
Appointment Outcomes — ${htmlSafe(p.monthName)} ${p.year}
${dntuRate>=15?alertBox(`DNTU rate is ${dntuRate}% — above acceptable threshold`,'danger'):''} ${grid( kBlock('Total Booked',appts.length,'appointments this month'), kBlock('Attended',seen.length,attendRate+'% attendance rate',pill(attendRate+'%',attendRate<80,attendRate<65)), kBlock('Did Not Turn Up',dntu.length,dntuRate+'% DNTU rate',pill(dntuRate+'%',dntuRate>=10,dntuRate>=15)), kBlock('Cancelled',cancelled.length,'cancelled this month'), kBlock('DNTU Rate',dntuRate+'%','of all appointments',dntuRate>=15?'🔴 High':dntuRate>=10?'🟡 Monitor':'🟢 Normal') )}
Appointment Attendance Breakdown
${appts.length?`
`:'
'}
🟢 Attended ${attendRate}% 🔴 DNTU ${dntuRate}% 🟡 Cancelled ${appts.length?Math.round(cancelled.length/appts.length*100):0}%
${navBtn('followups','Go to Follow-Up Centre')} ${navBtn('dntu','Go to DNTU')}
`, clinical:`
Clinical Activity — ${htmlSafe(p.monthName)} ${p.year}
${duskyStoma.length?alertBox(`${duskyStoma.length} concerning stoma appearance(s) recorded — review patient timeline`,'danger'):''} ${skinIssues.length?alertBox(`${skinIssues.length} peristomal skin issue(s) recorded this month`,'warn'):''} ${grid( kBlock('Daily Reviews',dailyRevs.length,'total stoma assessments'), kBlock('Stoma Concerns',duskyStoma.length,'dusky / necrotic / slough',pill(duskyStoma.length,duskyStoma.length>0,duskyStoma.length>2)), kBlock('Skin Issues',skinIssues.length,'peristomal skin problems',pill(skinIssues.length,skinIssues.length>0,skinIssues.length>3)), kBlock('Stoma Events',events.length,'all clinical events this month'), kBlock('Active Stomas',activeStomas.length,'currently active'), kBlock('Reversed',reversedStomas.length,'stomas reversed to date') )}
Stoma Type Mix (active stomas)
${['Colostomy','Ileostomy','Urostomy','Loop Colostomy','Loop Ileostomy'].map(t=>{ const cnt=activeStomas.filter(s=>(s.stoma_type||'').includes(t.split(' ')[t.split(' ').length-1])||s.stoma_type===t).length; return cnt?`
${cnt} ${htmlSafe(t)}
`:''; }).join('')}
${navBtn('patients','View Patients')}
`, teaching:`
Patient Teaching — ${htmlSafe(p.monthName)} ${p.year}
${grid( kBlock('Sessions This Month',teachingSessions.length,'teaching sessions recorded'), kBlock('Fully Completed',teachingSessions.filter(s=>s.item_9_dispose_waste).length,'all 9 items ticked'), kBlock('Partial',teachingSessions.filter(s=>!s.item_9_dispose_waste).length,'sessions not yet complete') )}
Teaching Progress Note
Teaching completion is tracked per-session (9 checklist items). Open a patient profile and go to the Teaching tab to view or add sessions. Full independence (all 9 items ticked) is the target before discharge.
${navBtn('patients','Go to Patients')}
`, discharge:`
Discharge Letters — ${htmlSafe(p.monthName)} ${p.year}
${draftLetters.length?alertBox(`${draftLetters.length} discharge letter(s) still in draft — nurse must review and finalise before filing`,'warn'):''} ${grid( kBlock('Letters This Month',dischargeLetters.length,'generated this month'), kBlock('Finalised',finalisedLetters.length,'ready for filing',pill(finalisedLetters.length,false,false)), kBlock('Draft',draftLetters.length,'awaiting finalisation',pill(draftLetters.length,draftLetters.length>0,false)) )}
Letters by Nurse
${Object.entries(dischargeLetters.reduce((acc,l)=>{const n=l.nurse_name||'Unknown';acc[n]=(acc[n]||0)+1;return acc;},{})).map(([n,c])=>`
${c} ${htmlSafe(n)}
`).join('')||'No letters recorded this month.'}
${navBtn('discharge','Go to Discharge Letters')}
`, followups:`
Follow-Up Status
${grid( kBlock('Active Follow-Up Centre',activeFollowUps.length,'patients in follow-up'), kBlock('Paused',followUps.filter(f=>f.status==='paused').length,'paused follow-ups'), kBlock('DNTU Streak ≥3',followUps.filter(f=>f.status==='paused_dntu').length,'auto-paused by DNTU rule',pill(followUps.filter(f=>f.status==='paused_dntu').length,true,false)) )}
Follow-Up Centre by Nurse
${Object.entries(followUps.filter(f=>f.status==='active').reduce((acc,f)=>{const n=f.assigned_nurse||'Common';acc[n]=(acc[n]||0)+1;return acc;},{})).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([n,c])=>`
${c} ${htmlSafe(n)}
`).join('')||'No follow-up data yet.'}
${navBtn('followups','Go to Follow-Up Centre')} ${navBtn('dntu','Go to DNTU')}
`, stomas:`
Stoma Register
${grid( kBlock('Active Stomas',activeStomas.length,'currently active'), kBlock('Reversed',reversedStomas.length,'reversed to date'), kBlock('Refashioned',stomas.filter(s=>s.status==='refashioned').length,'refashioned'), kBlock('Current Appliances',currentAppliances.length,'active appliance records'), kBlock('Formed This Month',stomas.filter(s=>s.formed_date&&s.formed_date>=p.start&&s.formed_date<=p.end).length,'new stomas formed') )}
Stoma Types (active)
${Object.entries(activeStomas.reduce((acc,s)=>{const t=s.stoma_type||'Unknown';acc[t]=(acc[t]||0)+1;return acc;},{})).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([t,c])=>`
${c} ${htmlSafe(t)}
`).join('')||'No stoma data yet.'}
${navBtn('patients','View Patients')}
` }; // Render tab bar + active tab const activeKpiTab=window._kpiActiveTab||'overview'; body.innerHTML=`
${kpiTabs.map(t=>``).join('')}
${tabContent[activeKpiTab]||tabContent.overview}
`; // Store tab content so buttons can switch tabs without re-fetching window.kpiTabContent=tabContent; } async function saveKpiSnapshot(){ alert('KPI snapshot saved to audit log.'); await logAuditTrailAction('kpi_snapshot','kpi_dashboard',null,{description:'KPI snapshot viewed and saved by '+getLoggedInSubmitterName()}).catch(()=>{}); } /* v60 — final Patient Appointments renderer: same two-tone style, different colours per outcome */ function appointmentColumnBadgeHTMLV60(n){ if(!n)return ''; const label = n.type==='common'?'General':(n.type==='core-ot'||n.type==='ot')?'Overtime':n.type==='til'?'TIL':(n.type==='absent'||n.type==='ot-booked')?'Booked / Not Working':''; if(!label)return ''; const bg = label==='General'?'#6c757d':label==='TIL'?'#0d7377':label==='Booked / Not Working'?'#c0392b':'#e6a817'; return `${label}`; } function appointmentStatusClassV60(status){ const key=String(status||'booked').toLowerCase(); if(key==='attended')return 'status-seen'; if(key==='did_not_attend'||key==='dntu'||key==='dna')return 'status-dntu'; if(key==='cancelled')return 'status-cancelled'; return 'status-booked'; } function appointmentOutcomeBoxHTMLV60(appt){ const key=String(appt?.status||'booked').toLowerCase(); const cls=key==='attended'?'seen':((key==='did_not_attend'||key==='dntu'||key==='dna')?'dntu':(key==='cancelled'?'cancelled':'booked')); const chip={booked:'Booked',seen:'Seen',dntu:'DNTU',cancelled:'Cancelled'}[cls]; const text={booked:'Appointment booked',seen:'Patient seen / attended',dntu:'Did not turn up recorded',cancelled:'Cancelled appointment'}[cls]; return `
${chip}${text}
`; } // duplicate removed /* v61 — keep Follow-Up buttons aligned, but all in the same blue colour family */ // duplicate removed // v66-11 — Patient Outcomes hub opens true sub-pages with their own headers and tables let currentPatientOutcomeView=''; let currentPatientOutcomeRows=[]; const PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA={ active:{key:'active',titleKey:'outcome-active',label:'Active Patients',pill:'active'}, reversal:{key:'reversal',titleKey:'outcome-reversal',label:'Reversed Patients',pill:'reversal'}, deceased:{key:'deceased',titleKey:'outcome-deceased',label:'Deceased Patients',pill:'deceased'}, relocated:{key:'relocated',titleKey:'outcome-relocated',label:'Relocated Overseas',pill:'relocated'}, gozo:{key:'gozo',titleKey:'outcome-gozo',label:'Discharged to Gozo',pill:'gozo'} }; function showPatientOutcomesHub(){ const section=document.getElementById('section-patient-outcomes'); if(section)section.classList.remove('platform-focused'); clearPlatformFocusTitle('section-patient-outcomes'); const page=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-page');if(page){page.style.display='none';} const hub=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-hub');if(hub){hub.style.display='block';} const heading=document.getElementById('patient-outcomes-heading');if(heading){heading.style.display='flex';} currentPatientOutcomeView='';currentPatientOutcomeRows=[]; const tbody=document.getElementById('patient-outcomes-tbody');if(tbody)tbody.innerHTML='Choose an outcome view.'; const search=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-search');if(search)search.value=''; loadPatientOutcomeCounts(); } function patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,view,dntuIds){ if(view==='active')return patientMatchesCommandView(p,'active',dntuIds); if(view==='reversal')return patientMatchesCommandView(p,'reversal',dntuIds)||patientMatchesCommandView(p,'reversed',dntuIds); if(view==='deceased')return patientMatchesCommandView(p,'deceased',dntuIds); if(view==='relocated')return patientMatchesCommandView(p,'relocated',dntuIds); if(view==='gozo')return patientMatchesCommandView(p,'gozo',dntuIds); return true; } function patientOutcomePill(p,view){ const data=PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA[view]||PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA.active; let label=data.label; if(view==='active')label='Active'; if(view==='reversal')label='Reversed / Closed'; if(view==='deceased')label='Deceased'; if(view==='relocated')label='Relocated Overseas'; if(view==='gozo')label='Discharged to Gozo'; return `${htmlSafe(label)}`; } async function loadPatientOutcomeCounts(){ try{ const rows=await getProjectPatients(); const dntu=await getDntuPatientIds(); const set=(id,v)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=String(v);}; set('po-count-active',rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,'active',dntu)).length); set('po-count-reversal',rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,'reversal',dntu)).length); set('po-count-deceased',rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,'deceased',dntu)).length); set('po-count-relocated',rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,'relocated',dntu)).length); set('po-count-gozo',rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,'gozo',dntu)).length); }catch(e){console.warn('Patient outcome counts skipped:',e?.message||e);} } async function showPatientOutcomePage(view){ const data=PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA[view]||PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA.active; const section=document.getElementById('section-patient-outcomes'); if(section)section.classList.add('platform-focused'); const hub=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-hub');if(hub)hub.style.display='none'; const heading=document.getElementById('patient-outcomes-heading');if(heading)heading.style.display='none'; const page=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-page');if(page)page.style.display='block'; setPlatformFocusTitle('section-patient-outcomes',getPlatformTitleData(data.titleKey),'showPatientOutcomesHub()'); const titleCard=document.querySelector('#section-patient-outcomes .platform-title-card'); if(titleCard)titleCard.dataset.view=view; currentPatientOutcomeView=view; const search=document.getElementById('patient-outcome-search');if(search)search.value=''; await loadPatientOutcomePageRows(view); } async function loadPatientOutcomePageRows(view){ const tbody=document.getElementById('patient-outcomes-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; const data=PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA[view]||PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA.active; tbody.innerHTML=`Loading ${htmlSafe(data.label)}...`; let rows=[];let dntuIds=new Set(); try{rows=await getProjectPatients();dntuIds=await getDntuPatientIds();} catch(error){tbody.innerHTML=`Error loading patient outcomes: ${htmlSafe(error.message)}`;return;} currentPatientOutcomeRows=rows.filter(p=>patientOutcomeMatchesView(p,view,dntuIds)); renderPatientOutcomeRows(currentPatientOutcomeRows,view); loadPatientOutcomeCounts(); } function filterPatientOutcomeRows(value){ const q=String(value||'').trim().toLowerCase(); let rows=currentPatientOutcomeRows||[]; if(q){ rows=rows.filter(p=>[p.first_name,p.surname,p.id_card,p.hospital_number,p.patient_number,p.ward,p.locality,p.stoma_type,p.patient_status,p.pathway_status,p.allocated_nurse].some(v=>String(v||'').toLowerCase().includes(q))); } renderPatientOutcomeRows(rows,currentPatientOutcomeView||'active'); } function renderPatientOutcomeRows(rows,view){ const tbody=document.getElementById('patient-outcomes-tbody'); if(!tbody)return; const data=PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA[view]||PATIENT_OUTCOME_VIEW_DATA.active; if(!rows.length){tbody.innerHTML=`No records found for ${htmlSafe(data.label)}.`;return;} tbody.innerHTML=rows.map(p=>{ const name=`${p.first_name||''} ${p.surname||''}`.trim()||'Unnamed patient'; const location=[p.ward,p.locality].filter(Boolean).join(' / ')||'—'; const surg=p.surgery_date?new Date(p.surgery_date).toLocaleDateString('en-MT'):'—'; const id=p.id_card||p.hospital_number||p.patient_number||'—'; return ` ${htmlSafe(name)}
${htmlSafe(p.patient_number||'')} ${htmlSafe(id)} ${htmlSafe(p.stoma_type||'—')} ${htmlSafe(location)} ${htmlSafe(surg)} ${htmlSafe(p.allocated_nurse||'Common')} ${patientOutcomePill(p,view)}
${htmlSafe(p.patient_status||p.pathway_status||'')} `; }).join(''); } // v66-20 — pathway workflow, locked patient details, care tracker, encounters, and paper-table refinements const _v6620OriginalSavePathwayPagePatient = window.savePathwayPagePatient; const _v6620OriginalResetPathwayRegistrationForm = window.resetPathwayRegistrationForm; const _v6620OriginalSwitchPathwayRegistrationTab = window.switchPathwayRegistrationTab; window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked = window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked || {}; window._pathwayEncounterRows = window._pathwayEncounterRows || {}; window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab = window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab || {}; function isSurgeryPathway(tab){return tab==='elective'||tab==='emergency';} function pathwayInputValue(id){return (document.getElementById(id)?.value||'').trim();} function pathwayTodayIso(){return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);} function pathwayNowTime(){return new Date().toTimeString().slice(0,5);} function syncPathwayOperationFindings(tab){ const op=pathwayInputValue(`pp-${tab}-operation`); const findings=pathwayInputValue(`pp-${tab}-findings`); const hidden=document.getElementById(`pp-${tab}-opfindings`); if(hidden)hidden.value=[op?`Operation Performed: ${op}`:'',findings?`Findings: ${findings}`:''].filter(Boolean).join('\n'); } function setPathwayStatusDate(id,dateId){ const status=document.getElementById(id); const date=document.getElementById(dateId); if(status&&date&&status.value&&!date.value)date.value=pathwayTodayIso(); } function setPathwaySystemVisibility(tab,row){ const val=document.getElementById(`pp-${tab}-appliance-${row}-system`)?.value||''; document.querySelectorAll(`[data-appliance-row="${tab}-${row}"]`).forEach(el=>{ const kind=el.getAttribute('data-appliance-kind'); const show=(val==='One-piece system'&&kind==='one')||(val==='Two-piece system'&&kind==='two')||!val; el.style.display=show?'':'none'; }); } function validateAndLockPathwayPatientDetails(tab){ const required=[['fn','First name'],['sn','Surname'],['dob','Date of birth'],['sex','Gender'],['locality','Locality']]; for(const [id,label] of required){ const fieldId=`pp-${tab}-${id}`; if(!pathwayInputValue(fieldId)){ alert(label+' is required before locking patient details.'); const el=document.getElementById(fieldId); if(el){el.focus();el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});} return false; } } window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]=true; applyPathwayPatientLockState(tab); alert('Patient details saved and locked. Proceed to Step 2: Adding Stoma & Surgery Details.'); switchPathwayRegistrationTab(tab,'stoma'); return true; } function unlockPathwayPatientDetails(tab){ const reason=prompt('Patient details are already saved. Enter the reason for unlocking/editing these details:'); if(!reason||!reason.trim())return; window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]=false; const audit=document.getElementById(`pp-${tab}-patient-unlock-reason`); if(audit)audit.value=`${new Date().toLocaleString('en-MT')} — ${getLoggedInSubmitterName()||'Logged-in user'}: ${reason.trim()}`; applyPathwayPatientLockState(tab); } function updatePathwayMainSaveButton(tab){ const card=document.getElementById(`pathway-new-form-${tab}`); if(!card)return; const btn=card.querySelector('[data-pathway-main-save="true"]'); if(!btn)return; const meta=getPathwayFormMeta(tab); if(isSurgeryPathway(tab)){ btn.textContent=window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab] ? 'Save Full Pathway Record' : 'Save & Lock Patient Details'; }else{ btn.textContent=`Save ${meta.short} Patient`; } } function applyPathwayPatientLockState(tab){ const card=document.getElementById(`pathway-new-form-${tab}`); if(!card)return; const locked=!!window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]; card.querySelectorAll('[data-patient-detail="true"]').forEach(el=>{ if(el.id===`pp-${tab}-patient-unlock-reason`)return; el.disabled=locked; el.classList.toggle('pathway-locked-field',locked); }); const banner=card.querySelector(`#patient-lock-banner-${tab}`); if(banner){ banner.classList.toggle('locked',locked); banner.innerHTML=locked ? `Patient details locked.Protected from accidental changes. Unlock only for a genuine correction and record the reason.` : `Step 1: Adding Patient DetailsSave and lock patient details first. Then continue to Step 2: Adding Stoma & Surgery Details.`; } card.querySelectorAll('.pathway-form-tab[data-needs-lock="true"]').forEach(btn=>btn.classList.toggle('tab-disabled',!locked)); updatePathwayMainSaveButton(tab); } function pathwayTabConfig(tab){ const commonPatient={key:'patient',label:isSurgeryPathway(tab)?'Step 1: Adding Patient Details':'Patient Details',panel:renderPathwayPatientDetailsPanel(tab),requiresLock:false}; const tracker={key:'tracker',label:'Episode Dashboard',panel:renderEpisodeTrackerPanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const encounters={key:'encounters',label:'Encounters',panel:renderEncountersPlanningPanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const stoma={key:'stoma',label:isSurgeryPathway(tab)?'Step 2: Adding Stoma & Surgery Details':'Stoma & Surgery Details',panel:renderPathwayStomaSurgeryPanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const preop={key:'preop',label:'Pre-operative Stoma Care',panel:renderPreOperativeStomaCarePanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const postop={key:'postop',label:'Post-operative Stoma Care',panel:renderPostOperativeStomaCarePanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const teaching={key:'teaching',label:'Management & Teaching Plan',panel:renderManagementTeachingPanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const discharge={key:'discharge',label:'Discharge / Follow-up Planning',panel:renderDischargePlanningPanel(tab),requiresLock:isSurgeryPathway(tab)}; const appliance={key:'appliance',label:'Appliance in Use',panel:renderApplianceInUsePanel(tab),requiresLock:false}; const advice={key:'advice',label:'Advice / Teaching Given',panel:renderAdviceTeachingPanel(tab),requiresLock:false}; const followup={key:'followup',label:'Follow-up Plan',panel:renderFollowupPlanPanel(tab),requiresLock:false}; if(tab==='elective')return [commonPatient,tracker,encounters,preop,stoma,postop,teaching,discharge]; if(tab==='emergency')return [commonPatient,tracker,encounters,stoma,postop,teaching,discharge]; if(tab==='bagging')return [commonPatient,tracker,encounters,{key:'assessment',label:'Appliance / Bagging Assessment',panel:renderBaggingAssessmentPanel(tab),requiresLock:false},appliance,advice,followup]; return [commonPatient,tracker,encounters,{key:'existing',label:'Existing Stoma Details',panel:renderExistingStomaDetailsPanel(tab),requiresLock:false},{key:'skin',label:'Appliance / Skin Assessment',panel:renderSkinAssessmentPanel(tab),requiresLock:false},teaching,{key:'handover',label:'Follow-up / Handover Plan',panel:renderHandoverPlanPanel(tab),requiresLock:false}]; } function renderPathwayRegistrationTabs(tab){ const tabs=pathwayTabConfig(tab); return `
${tabs.map((t,i)=>``).join('')}
${tabs.map((t,i)=>`
${t.panel}
`).join('')}`; } window.switchPathwayRegistrationTab=function(tab,panel){ if(isSurgeryPathway(tab)&&panel!=='patient'&&!window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]){ alert('Please complete Step 1: Adding Patient Details and press Save & Lock Patient Details before continuing.'); panel='patient'; } const card=document.getElementById(`pathway-new-form-${tab}`); if(!card)return; card.querySelectorAll('.pathway-form-tab').forEach(btn=>btn.classList.toggle('active',btn.id===`pf-tab-${tab}-${panel}`)); card.querySelectorAll('.pathway-form-panel').forEach(pane=>pane.classList.toggle('active',pane.id===`pf-panel-${tab}-${panel}`)); updatePathwayMainSaveButton(tab); }; window.resetPathwayRegistrationForm=function(tab){ const card=document.getElementById(`pathway-new-form-${tab}`); if(!card)return; window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]=false; card.querySelectorAll('input,textarea,select').forEach(el=>{if(el.type==='checkbox')el.checked=false;else el.value='';el.disabled=false;el.classList.remove('pathway-locked-field');}); applyPathwayPatientLockState(tab); switchPathwayRegistrationTab(tab,'patient'); }; window.savePathwayPagePatient=async function(tab){ if(isSurgeryPathway(tab)&&!window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]){ // If the nurse presses the main save button while still on Step 1, treat it as Save & Lock Patient Details. return validateAndLockPathwayPatientDetails(tab); } syncPathwayOperationFindings(tab); if(typeof _v6620OriginalSavePathwayPagePatient==='function')return _v6620OriginalSavePathwayPagePatient(tab); }; function renderPathwayPatientDetailsPanel(tab){ const isSurgery=isSurgeryPathway(tab); return `${isSurgery?`
Step 1: Adding Patient DetailsSave and lock patient details first. Then continue to Step 2: Adding Stoma & Surgery Details.
`:''}
`; } function renderPathwayStomaSurgeryPanel(tab){ return `
`; } function renderExistingStomaDetailsPanel(tab){return `
`;} function renderPreopChecklist(tab){ const rows=['Introduction and role of the stoma care nurse explained','Assessed present level of understanding regarding surgery','Explanation given of colostomy / ileostomy / urostomy','Figure of stoma and appliance shown','Opportunity to discuss implications of stoma on lifestyle','Waistband noted and marked','Creases, dips or scars noted','Site agreed and visible to patient','Stoma site marked','Other issues discussed / specify on other sheet']; return `
Nurse identity, date/time and audit trail are captured automatically from the logged-in account. Manual initials/signatures are not required.
${rows.map((r,i)=>``).join('')}
Checklist itemStatusDateComments
${i+1}. ${htmlSafe(r)}
`; } function renderPostOpDayTable(tab){ const days=['1st','2nd','3rd','4th','5th','6th','7th']; const rows=['Date','STOMA','Pink / healthy','Dusky','Flush / Retracted','Other','STOMA OUTPUT','Haem serous','Green / bilious','Liquid Stool','Semi-formed / formed','SKIN CONDITION','Healthy / intact','Red','Broken / excoriated','Time']; return `
Daily review can continue through Encounters beyond day 7. Logged-in nurse identity is captured automatically.
${days.map(d=>``).join('')}${rows.map((r,ri)=>`${days.map((d,di)=>``).join('')}`).join('')}
Post-operative Day${d}Comments
${htmlSafe(r)}
Skin condition needs only to be filled when flange is changed. Further daily reviews should be added as Encounters.
`; } function renderApplianceRows(tab){ const onePiece=['One-piece closed pouch','One-piece drainable pouch','One-piece transparent pouch','One-piece opaque pouch','Other one-piece appliance']; const flanges=['Two-piece flange / baseplate','Convex flange / baseplate','Flat flange / baseplate','Cut-to-fit flange','Pre-cut flange','Other flange']; const bags=['Two-piece closed bag','Two-piece drainable bag','Two-piece transparent bag','Two-piece opaque bag','Other two-piece bag']; return `
${[1,2,3].map(i=>``).join('')}
DateSystemOne-piece applianceFlange / BaseplateBag / PouchSizeComments
Exact appliance/flange/bag product lists can be added later. The dropdowns are already separated by one-piece and two-piece systems.
`; } function renderTeachingTable(tab){ const rows=['Patient has seen stoma and first flange and bag change','Able to assemble items needed','Able to remove old bag','Able to remove flange','Able to clean stoma','Able to empty bag (applicable for drainable pouches)','Able to apply new bag with flange','Able to apply flange','Able to dispose of waste']; return `
Select Met or Unmet. The date is added automatically when status is entered. Nurse identity is captured from login/audit trail.
${rows.map((r,ri)=>``).join('')}
Teaching planStatusDate commenced / enteredComments
${htmlSafe(r)}
`; } function renderDischargeChecklist(tab){ const items=[['dispensing','Discussed appliance dispensing procedure'],['schedulev','Schedule V application and prescriptions for home supply given'],['homesupply','Home supply brought'],['literature','Patient information / literature with discharge advice and clinic contact numbers given'],['clinicfollow','To be followed up in Stoma Clinic']]; return `
${items.map(([id,label])=>`
`).join('')}
`; } function renderBaggingAssessmentPanel(tab){return `
`;} function renderSkinAssessmentPanel(tab){return `
`;} function renderEpisodeTrackerPanel(tab){ const domains=['Patient details','Surgery / stoma details','Daily/repeated stoma review','Peristomal skin review','Stoma function/output','Appliance / bagging issues','Teaching / education progress','Patient readiness / willingness','Discharge planning','Supplies / Schedule V','Community nurse referral','Follow-up plan']; return `
${domains.map((d,i)=>`
`).join('')}
This dashboard helps ensure key areas are reviewed before discharge even during long admissions.
`; } function renderEncountersPlanningPanel(tab){ return `
Encounter Template

Each contact/review should become a separate encounter with an encounter number after the patient episode is created. Use the encounter workspace after saving the patient to document daily reviews, skin reviews, teaching attempts and discharge planning.

`; } function renderPathwaySearch(tab){ window._pathwayPatientDetailsLocked[tab]=false; const meta=getPathwayFormMeta(tab); setTimeout(()=>applyPathwayPatientLockState(tab),0); return `

Add new ${htmlSafe(meta.label)} patient

${htmlSafe(meta.subtitle)} This is a full-page pathway form with guided tabs and encounter planning.

${renderPathwayRegistrationTabs(tab)}
Required fields: first name, surname, date of birth, gender, locality, date of surgery and ward. Hospital number, patient status and pathway type are intentionally not shown because this page already defines the pathway. Manual signatures are removed because logged-in user identity is captured automatically.
`; } function pathwayEpisodeTabButton(tab,key,label){return ``;} function switchPathwayEpisodeTab(tab,key){window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab[tab]=key;const pane=document.getElementById('pathway-pane-'+tab);const patient=window._pathwayPatient?.[tab]||_pathwayPatient?.[tab];if(pane&&patient)renderPathwayForm(tab,pane,patient);} async function renderPathwayForm(tab,pane,patient){ const steps=PATHWAY_STEPS[tab]||[]; const completions=await loadPathwayCompletions(tab,patient.id); const totalMandatory=steps.filter(s=>s.mandatory).length; const completedMandatory=steps.filter(s=>s.mandatory&&completions[s.id]).length; const pct=totalMandatory?Math.round(completedMandatory/totalMandatory*100):0; const colours={elective:'#0f766e',emergency:'#991b1b',bagging:'#5b21b6',readmission:'#b45309'}; const col=colours[tab]||'#0f766e'; window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab[tab]=window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab[tab]||'dashboard'; const active=window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab[tab]; const allDone=completedMandatory===totalMandatory; pane.innerHTML=`
${htmlSafe(patient.name||'—')}
ID: ${htmlSafe(patient.idCard||'—')} · Episode: ${htmlSafe(patient.episode?.episode_number||patient.episode?.episode_type||'First episode / active pathway')}
${completedMandatory}/${totalMandatory} mandatory items · ${pct}%
${pathwayEpisodeTabButton(tab,'dashboard','Episode Dashboard')}${pathwayEpisodeTabButton(tab,'encounters','Encounters')}${pathwayEpisodeTabButton(tab,'checklist','Care Progress / Discharge Checklist')}
${active==='encounters'?renderSavedEncounterWorkspace(tab,patient):active==='checklist'?renderPathwayStepsPanel(tab,patient,steps,completions,col,allDone,totalMandatory,completedMandatory):renderSavedEpisodeDashboard(tab,patient,steps,completions,col)}
`; } function renderSavedEpisodeDashboard(tab,patient,steps,completions,col){ const isSurgTab=tab==='elective'||tab==='emergency'; const hasSurgery=!!(patient.surgDate||patient.episode?.surgery_date||patient.surgery_date); const awaitingOp=tab==='elective'&&!hasSurgery; const domains=[ ['Patient details','Completed','Patient demographics saved and locked during registration.'], ...(isSurgTab?[['Surgery / stoma details',completions.surgery?'Completed':(awaitingOp?'Awaiting Operation — Surgery Not Yet Scheduled':'In progress'),awaitingOp?'Surgery date not yet set. Patient is in Outpatient / Awaiting Operation. When admitted, update surgery details and advance to inpatient.':'Operation, findings, stoma type and surgery date.']]:[]), ['Encounters / daily reviews',(_pathwayEncounterRows[patient.id]||[]).length?'In progress':'Not started','Daily stoma, skin, output, teaching and plan reviews.'], ['Teaching / readiness',completions.teaching?'Completed':'Deferred / patient not ready','Can be revisited across many encounters.'], ['Discharge planning',completions.discharge_planning?'Completed':'In progress','Supplies, Schedule V, community nurse and follow-up.'] ]; return `
${domains.map(([d,s,n])=>`
${htmlSafe(d)}
${htmlSafe(s)}

${htmlSafe(n)}

`).join('')}
${awaitingOp?`
⏳ Awaiting Operation: Patient is in outpatient status. When the operation is scheduled and the patient is admitted, advance to Step 3 — Surgery / Stoma Formed. If surgery is postponed or cancelled, use the Postpone Surgery button on the patient record.
`:`
Before discharge: review all incomplete/deferred areas, add required encounters, and confirm any outstanding reason in comments.
`}`; } function renderSavedEncounterWorkspace(tab,patient){ const rows=_pathwayEncounterRows[patient.id]||[]; return `
Each saved encounter gets its own encounter number. Logged-in nurse and date/time are captured automatically.
${rows.length?rows.map(r=>``).join(''):``}
Encounter No.Date / TimeTypeLocationPrioritySummaryReviewed By
${htmlSafe(r.no)}${htmlSafe(r.date)} ${htmlSafe(r.time)}${htmlSafe(r.type)}${htmlSafe(r.location||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.priority||'Routine')}${htmlSafe(r.summary||'—')}${htmlSafe(r.nurse||'—')}
No encounters recorded yet.
`; } async function savePathwayEncounter(tab,patientId){ const v=id=>document.getElementById(`enc-${tab}-${id}`)?.value?.trim()||''; const type=v('type'), date=v('date')||pathwayTodayIso(), time=v('time')||pathwayNowTime(); const nurse=getLoggedInSubmitterName()||'Logged-in user'; const existing=_pathwayEncounterRows[patientId]||[]; const no=`ENC-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${String(existing.length+1).padStart(4,'0')}`; const summary=[v('stoma'),v('skin'),v('output'),v('appliance'),v('readiness'),v('teaching'),v('plan'),v('comments')].filter(Boolean).join(' | '); const row={no,date,time,type,location:v('location'),priority:v('priority'),summary,nurse}; _pathwayEncounterRows[patientId]=[row,...existing]; try{await SB.from('encounters_main').insert({patient_id:patientId,encounter_number:no,encounter_date:date,encounter_type:type,location:row.location,clinical_summary:summary,reviewed_by:nurse,created_by:nurse});}catch(e){console.warn('Encounter table insert skipped:',e?.message||e);} try{await logAuditTrailAction('insert','encounters_main',patientId,{description:`${no} ${type}: ${summary}`});}catch(e){} const pane=document.getElementById('pathway-pane-'+tab);const patient=_pathwayPatient[tab];if(pane&&patient){window._pathwayEpisodeActiveTab[tab]='encounters';await renderPathwayForm(tab,pane,patient);} } function renderPathwayStepsPanel(tab,patient,steps,completions,col,allDone,totalMandatory,completedMandatory){ return `
📋 First episode care progression. Pre-op siting, education, post-op 1–7 review, daily reviews, teaching, discharge planning and discharge letter are first-episode-only steps. For later episodes, use Add New Episode from the patient record.
${!allDone?`
🔒 Episode cannot be closed until all mandatory steps are complete. ${totalMandatory-completedMandatory} step${totalMandatory-completedMandatory!==1?'s':''} remaining.
`:''}${steps.map((step,i)=>{const prev=i>0?steps[i-1]:null;const prevDone=!prev||completions[prev.id];const done=completions[step.id];const isActive=!done&&prevDone;const isLocked=!done&&!prevDone;const stepState=done?'complete':isActive?'active-step':isLocked?'locked':'pending';const numState=done?'complete':isActive?'active':'locked';const doneInfo=completions[step.id];return `
${done?'✓':i+1}
${step.icon} ${htmlSafe(step.title)}${step.mandatory?'':' Optional'}
${htmlSafe(step.description)}${doneInfo&&doneInfo.date?' · ✓ '+doneInfo.date+(doneInfo.nurse?' by '+doneInfo.nurse:''):''}
${done?'Complete':isActive?'Action Required':'Pending'}${isActive||done?'▾':'▸'}
${renderPathwayStepBody(tab,step,patient,done,isLocked,col)}
`;}).join('')}
All mandatory steps must be complete before closing the episode.
`; }
